rel-be13fc5b7731a1251c7b8cdcfa9abe28.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam is the legal framework that governs actions and transactions within Việt Nam.

rel-493cf21a46994a90f99cb9a5432fe942.tgt_id: Người đại diện theo pháp luật
rel-493cf21a46994a90f99cb9a5432fe942.description: Người đại diện theo pháp luật must reside in Việt Nam.

rel-33ca0d78adc46d405096259f8a4db028.description: People from other countries are subject to certain legal provisions when present in Việt Nam.

rel-0c861b7085deb2e984a28ef550cf6e07.description: Legal entities are subject to the laws of the country where they are established, including Việt Nam.

rel-311bf72358d57f6b38cee921fe614f3c.description: Assets are subject to the laws of the country where they are located, including Việt Nam.

rel-206d7d1b5394d8fa87cae3c326586889.description: Intellectual property rights are determined by the laws of the country where the intellectual property is sought to be protected, including Việt Nam.

rel-7ea13a05a5ec70176c0c0729dc22f1b8.description: Inheritance is determined by the laws of the country where the deceased had citizenship, including Việt Nam.<SEP>The law of the country where the deceased had citizenship immediately before death applies to inheritance in Việt Nam.

rel-e61c1cd37b83e9e0efed6e924407e922.tgt_id: Năng Lực Pháp Luật Dân Sự
rel-e61c1cd37b83e9e0efed6e924407e922.description: Civil legal capacity of individuals is determined by the laws of the country where they have citizenship, including Việt Nam.

rel-801e765feb6967b2e5411663b2901b08.tgt_id: Năng Lực Hành Vi Dân Sự
rel-801e765feb6967b2e5411663b2901b08.description: Civil conduct capacity of individuals is determined by the laws of the country where they have citizenship, including Việt Nam.

rel-ee0e9fc4732c8ad5b9fbe0fffe526ad5.tgt_id: Việc Xác Định Cá Nhân Mất Tích Hoặc Chết
rel-ee0e9fc4732c8ad5b9fbe0fffe526ad5.description: The determination of a missing or deceased individual is based on the laws of the country where the individual had citizenship at the time of the last known information, including Việt Nam.

rel-73c6e5ea7054c8e97b5b1a4958b693b4.tgt_id: Quyền Sở Hữu Và Quyền Khác Đối Với Tài Sản
rel-73c6e5ea7054c8e97b5b1a4958b693b4.description: The establishment, exercise, modification, and termination of ownership and other rights over property are determined by the laws of the country where the property is located, including Việt Nam.

rel-1b67915f82ba3bba49ea5e9ee01fede4.description: The form of a di chúc is recognized in Việt Nam if it is consistent with the laws of the country where the testator resides or has citizenship.

rel-8706f5369ba981948f5b925e6e20076f.description: The law of the country where the person under guardianship resides applies to guardianship in Việt Nam.

rel-da2e85404a2f66f1a8d0ced7468d036a.description: The applicable law for a hợp đồng is determined by the law of the country with the closest connection to the contract, and the form of the hợp đồng is recognized in Việt Nam if it is consistent with the laws of the country where the contract is made or with Vietnamese law.

rel-d1abb678c48c10d61dd716f5456a03eb.description: The Chairman of the company must obtain permission before leaving Việt Nam for more than 30 days and must delegate authority in writing to another person.

rel-7af455fd136220fe4337919483b0e992.description: More than half of the kiểm soát viên must reside in Việt Nam.

rel-1870ba6c0f26d037dee10e1092e238c6.description: The branch of the parent company is located in Vietnam.

rel-58471d11bd00bb65b8855e69a693457d.tgt_id: Phán quyết của trọng tài nước ngoài
rel-58471d11bd00bb65b8855e69a693457d.description: Phán quyết của trọng tài nước ngoài is an arbitration decision made by foreign arbitrators, which can be recognized in Việt Nam.

rel-8002f19646f64dde5e7dace7fc2ce3ba.tgt_id: Địa điểm giải quyết tranh chấp
rel-8002f19646f64dde5e7dace7fc2ce3ba.description: Địa điểm giải quyết tranh chấp can be within or outside the territory of Việt Nam.

rel-5170d5b3fa3ce11ed2a0b6eabf42c40a.tgt_id: Tổ chức trọng tài nước ngoài
rel-5170d5b3fa3ce11ed2a0b6eabf42c40a.description: Tổ chức trọng tài nước ngoài is a foreign arbitration organization permitted to operate in Vietnam.

rel-743e6567e6017bf23e1a1edec940297f.src_id: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã
rel-743e6567e6017bf23e1a1edec940297f.tgt_id: Quyết định tuyên bố mất tích
rel-743e6567e6017bf23e1a1edec940297f.description: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã records the declaration of missing.

rel-19d00cd2c4a28796eb7147ec72eb9114.src_id: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã
rel-19d00cd2c4a28796eb7147ec72eb9114.tgt_id: Quyết định hủy bỏ quyết định tuyên bố mất tích
rel-19d00cd2c4a28796eb7147ec72eb9114.description: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã records the revocation of the missing declaration.

rel-c5e1fe7e3b02858db64b1acb56cefd8a.src_id: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã
rel-c5e1fe7e3b02858db64b1acb56cefd8a.description: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã records the declaration of death.

rel-278982f06a9b767e664d0c9f50cff40f.src_id: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã
rel-278982f06a9b767e664d0c9f50cff40f.description: A local government body is responsible for appointing a guardian if there is no natural guardian.

rel-85258228791a88cba5a8993595629422.src_id: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã
rel-85258228791a88cba5a8993595629422.description: Ủy ban nhân dân cấp xã receives and publicly announces lost or abandoned property.

rel-057f9f65f2c4c668e0180e07c1a59b53.src_id: Ủy Ban Nhân Dân Cấp Xã
rel-057f9f65f2c4c668e0180e07c1a59b53.description: Ủy Ban Nhân Dân Cấp Xã authenticates and witnesses the signing of a di chúc.

rel-45c9f820750b6f7c5ea367edf3dd1ec1.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-45c9f820750b6f7c5ea367edf3dd1ec1.description: Người quản lý tài sản manages the assets of the missing individual.

rel-4cb08d45d6e6b8bd0475476f04683de5.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-4cb08d45d6e6b8bd0475476f04683de5.tgt_id: Vợ hoặc chồng của người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-4cb08d45d6e6b8bd0475476f04683de5.description: Vợ hoặc chồng of the missing individual may seek a divorce.

rel-8e3b7fb66228e2c1517a99eb783c940e.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-8e3b7fb66228e2c1517a99eb783c940e.tgt_id: Con thành niên hoặc cha, mẹ của người mất tích
rel-8e3b7fb66228e2c1517a99eb783c940e.description: Con thành niên or parents manage the assets if the spouse is divorced.

rel-67bd4d8af309861b3a8ae5a7f9751ade.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-67bd4d8af309861b3a8ae5a7f9751ade.tgt_id: Người thân thích của người mất tích
rel-67bd4d8af309861b3a8ae5a7f9751ade.description: Người thân thích manages the assets if there are no other suitable individuals.

rel-7c363df4cc75fbe98821328a13555920.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-7c363df4cc75fbe98821328a13555920.description: Điều 69 governs the management of assets for a person declared missing.

rel-b54a811490dd98b11db94b65a43d2ce6.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-b54a811490dd98b11db94b65a43d2ce6.description: Điều 70 governs the revocation of a missing person declaration.

rel-4a647ea0c3693ddfcf9b0b41e646f069.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-4a647ea0c3693ddfcf9b0b41e646f069.description: Đиều 71 governs the declaration of death for a missing person.

rel-e28d663536e744d1e7ad1c108747a3e2.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố mất tích
rel-e28d663536e744d1e7ad1c108747a3e2.description: Đиều 72 governs the personal and property relationships of a person declared dead.

rel-a95244f0f84f33560c1064584297aef2.description: Điều 53 outlines the role of the asset manager for a member declared missing by the court.

rel-21a252d9c55d43ceacef60a973e57aea.description: Công ty can distribute profits to its members according to the conditions outlined in Điều  69.

rel-8cf18b51f3245753c347d7084cb8ac8e.description: Thành viên can receive profits from the company according to the conditions outlined in Điều 69.

rel-645db6749edcb10b3fcdb75fc556413d.description: Công ty can reclaim distributed capital or profits according to the conditions outlined in Điều 70.

rel-29e2af53efe934069bbcb7d285e5753e.description: Thành viên must return distributed capital or profits according to the conditions outlined in Điều 70.

rel-8d41cd79cfb510b05018c516a5d1358e.tgt_id: Đơn yêu cầu huỷ phán quyết trọng tài
rel-8d41cd79cfb510b05018c516a5d1358e.description: Đơn yêu cầu huỷ phán quyết trọng tài must meet the requirements specified in Điều  70 to be considered valid.

rel-89f40090c13137d0bcbff97f1ce15534.description: Article 71 outlines the responsibilities of the Chairman of the Board of Members, Director, General Director, other managers, Legal Representative, and Inspector within the company.

rel-fadc3585eb6899cdc8e0f6445614adcc.description: Article 72 outlines the procedures for initiating a lawsuit against managers for failing to fulfill their responsibilities within the company.

rel-358aa4a9cc47e3d24cb3bb14f72fc3a6.description: Cơ quan có thẩm quyền is responsible for protecting and enforcing civil rights.

rel-910693eb5f80bdda68a132e17cc20e55.tgt_id: Hủy quyết định cá biệt trái pháp luật
rel-910693eb5f80bdda68a132e17cc20e55.description: Cơ quan có thẩm quyền has the authority to revoke unlawful individual decisions.

rel-a9b6e0846995738806aa4c41612954c0.description: Article 2 of the Civil Code addresses the recognition, respect, protection, and assurance of civil rights.

rel-29dc1e7bf96a0df71e3818b3f66bb41b.description: The Civil Code ensures the protection and assurance of civil rights according to the Constitution and laws.

rel-d8794d8115430fa0254a199994a882a0.tgt_id: Người đại diện theo pháp luật
rel-d8794d8115430fa0254a199994a882a0.description: Người đại diện theo pháp luật acts on behalf of individuals with limited or no legal capacity in matters related to personal rights.

rel-46a1988931fdea3ab1e58fd65afa9e7d.description: Thời hiệu khởi kiện does not apply to personal rights that are not tied to property.

rel-5bd77c68707897b488144cddba0a4ad6.description: Thời hiệu khởi kiện does not apply to the right of ownership over property, except where otherwise provided by law.

rel-cc95ec89d35322b41fc086c5e30b8262.tgt_id: Quyền khác đối với tài sản
rel-cc95ec89d35322b41fc086c5e30b8262.description: Other rights over property that are not ownership still have effect even if ownership is transferred, except where otherwise provided by law.

rel-01134fd9d7aa485ab6a2cda4ea08776f.description: The current legal code regulates the establishment and exercise of ownership rights.

rel-bec735104d14f29663c4252201baeaf6.description: Điều 158 defines the rights of ownership.

rel-57f8276aca05322bc0034938bd25e983.description: Đиều 160 outlines the principles for establishing and exercising ownership rights.

rel-c5ff9db1ef75c182b7c52cfbc3ecf0e9.src_id: Năng lực pháp luật dân sự
rel-c5ff9db1ef75c182b7c52cfbc3ecf0e9.description: Năng lực pháp luật dân sự of Người thành niên is full and unrestricted.

rel-c7d325b9d42496671977d4cfc9f09ac5.src_id: Năng lực pháp luật dân sự
rel-c7d325b9d42496671977d4cfc9f09ac5.description: Năng lực pháp luật dân sự of Người chưa thành niên is limited based on age.

rel-28e4045a891cc932ced1a635a09a14e9.src_id: Năng lực pháp luật dân sự
rel-28e4045a891cc932ced1a635a09a14e9.description: Pháp nhân has civil legal capacity (Năng lực pháp luật dân sự), which is the ability to have civil rights and obligations.

rel-bfa9436b7d4f2313c9047fec1947bba3.src_id: Năng lực hành vi dân sự
rel-bfa9436b7d4f2313c9047fec1947bba3.description: Năng lực hành vi dân sự of Người thành niên is full and unrestricted.

rel-b6db60e437635fd99e96de8adb5c3e91.src_id: Năng lực hành vi dân sự
rel-b6db60e437635fd99e96de8adb5c3e91.description: Năng lực hành vi dân sự of Người chưa thành niên is limited based on age.

rel-ef767799d5ae0cbd00897e5d991e9499.src_id: Năng lực hành vi dân sự
rel-ef767799d5ae0cbd00897e5d991e9499.description: A civil transaction can be declared invalid if the person lacks the legal capacity to engage in such transactions.

rel-abea4ac17efea8ab6fa5da755b7baa65.description: Civil transactions by people who have not reached the age of majority can be declared invalid.

rel-c07aac1c858f2cf67e22e45e57a3a056.description: Bên bán may be required to compensate the buyer for damages under certain conditions.

rel-07a61953440cd47709e9fe06ce9f1f68.src_id: Hủy quyết định cá biệt trái pháp luật
rel-07a61953440cd47709e9fe06ce9f1f68.tgt_id: Tòa án hoặc cơ quan có thẩm quyền khác
rel-07a61953440cd47709e9fe06ce9f1f68.description: Tòa án hoặc cơ quan có thẩm quyền khác has the authority to revoke unlawful individual decisions.

rel-123a7e0e9fa4ec9f2a71babf7aa79da1.tgt_id: Người Đứng Đầu Cơ Sở Khám Bệnh, Chữa Bệnh
rel-123a7e0e9fa4ec9f2a71babf7aa79da1.description: The examination of a deceased body can be authorized by the person in charge of a medical facility.

rel-d0b6b2d2e675e8c5c9853ae1085640f7.tgt_id: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền
rel-d0b6b2d2e675e8c5c9853ae1085640f7.description: The examination of a deceased body can be authorized by an authorized government agency.

rel-7f9fddf3ad0fe3706f74185059da00cd.description: Father can give consent for the examination of a deceased body if the deceased did not provide prior consent.

rel-27bcdb8fe2471e34cab90834744fba70.description: Mother can give consent for the examination of a deceased body if the deceased did not provide prior consent.

rel-970605c47724a20ae9cffc9015a4e559.description: Wife can give consent for the examination of a deceased body if the deceased did not provide prior consent.

rel-7c3eb8cb8e5693217044f806e43041b0.description: Husband can give consent for the examination of a deceased body if the deceased did not provide prior consent.

rel-99c4adfa820765b71e2cb4c06c0a554d.description: Adult child can give consent for the examination of a deceased body if the deceased did not provide prior consent.

rel-a21c18e3c8bd4199b01fde655e5b9858.description: Guardian can give consent for the examination of a deceased body if the deceased did not provide prior consent.

rel-be2a1bf2aff6e4cca274f4ff046d878d.src_id: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền
rel-be2a1bf2aff6e4cca274f4ff046d878d.description: Guardianship must be registered with the authorized government agency.

rel-d660f4064e3f092835b3c873f5158b21.src_id: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền
rel-d660f4064e3f092835b3c873f5158b21.description: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền makes decisions that can lead to the termination of ownership rights over assets.

rel-179cea50434c8233d22b0b5adc2346b1.src_id: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền
rel-179cea50434c8233d22b0b5adc2346b1.description: The terms of the Hợp Đồng Mua Bán must comply with the regulations set by the Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền.

rel-6836de80a4c99cf0ef4653fd591bdc90.src_id: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền
rel-6836de80a4c99cf0ef4653fd591bdc90.tgt_id: Mức Lãi Suất Được Quy Định
rel-6836de80a4c99cf0ef4653fd591bdc90.description: The maximum interest rate (Mức Lãi Suất Được Quy Định) set by the law (Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền).

rel-bfbd376255088a43d6ef13379380e797.src_id: Cơ Quan Nhà Nước Có Thẩm Quyền
rel-bfbd376255088a43d6ef13379380e797.description: If the rightful owner cannot be found, the property must be handed over to an authorized government agency.

rel-61539faf2e0c8c390f1ef2e357647b0f.description: Tòa Án is responsible for initiating legal proceedings to search for a missing person.

rel-f71cc850cb6f7ec60188ca990ae1f202.tgt_id: Người Giám Sát Việc Giám Hộ
rel-f71cc850cb6f7ec60188ca990ae1f202.description: Tòa Án resolves disputes regarding the appointment of supervisors.

rel-616a5bb1a9ef53fd593fb8f2bb0a14ba.tgt_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Bất Động Sản
rel-616a5bb1a9ef53fd593fb8f2bb0a14ba.description: Chủ sở hữu bất động sản can consult Tòa án in case of disputes regarding pathways and drainage systems.

rel-6060b154eda45f1b182e50b16234782d.description: Tòa Án can revoke the right of use if the user seriously violates their obligations.

rel-bdcf52bd49e75e9122bb873c28bb2003.description: Quyền Hưởng Dụng can be terminated by a decision of Tòa Án.

rel-bb20fa849aead26a3a865aac387f3d82.description: Tòa Án may declare a person dead.

rel-d0b758964e59e1f8ed698541361bb26a.description: Tòa Án resolves disputes regarding the interpretation of a will.

rel-a1ec8997ef21d773456a84fed5684e99.tgt_id: Hạn Chế Phân Chia Di Sản
rel-a1ec8997ef21d773456a84fed5684e99.description: The court that may be involved in determining the division of the estate when it affects the living conditions of the surviving spouse or family.

rel-b036733b0457163f692fd60c49df3fc9.description: Thành Viên can request the Tòa Án to invalidate decisions made by the Hội Đồng Thành Viên if they do not comply with the law or the company's charter.

rel-4c8aef4c948afcb48a276f86ff3c2806.description: The Court has the authority to prohibit individuals from practicing certain professions or engaging in specific business activities, affecting the owner's rights.

rel-aadbf53efd51778ed2c691901d70c414.tgt_id: Chào Bán Trái Phiếu Riêng Lẻ
rel-aadbf53efd51778ed2c691901d70c414.description: Chào Bán Trái Phiếu Riêng Lẻ must comply with the legal decisions of Tòa Án regarding the transfer of private bonds.

rel-a4ee0309e2b9cb42041b997925ee4f7f.description: Cổ Đông Nhóm can request the Tòa Án to invalidate a resolution of the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông.

rel-bd3985d3aa20c8e269d19fa1eed4b076.description: The court can prohibit an owner of a private enterprise from practicing or engaging in certain activities within the scope of the business.

rel-799219777665c9303eb9abd30a999b5c.src_id: Phương Tiện Thông Tin Đại Chúng
rel-799219777665c9303eb9abd30a999b5c.description: Information that negatively affects an individual's reputation must be corrected or removed from the medium of public information.

rel-d80791acad33c4398305d40695889226.description: An individual's rights to protect their dignity, reputation, and honor are outlined in the legal document known as the law.

rel-640e66c8c519dedb70a1d727ef6168f5.tgt_id: Luật Hiến, Lấy, Ghép Mô, Bộ Phận Cơ Thể Người và Hiến, Lấy Xác
rel-640e66c8c519dedb70a1d727ef6168f5.description: An individual's rights to donate or receive body parts and organs are governed by a specific law.

rel-0ac311dedd03bd9de10d03e97ea3db88.description: An individual's rights are also protected by other related laws.

rel-19577569c79b173673dfcbfedf994dad.description: An individual must register changes to their identity in the legal document known as the household registration.<SEP>Individuals have the right to update their legal records, such as their household registration, after a gender transition.

rel-28bcf2bf12fe2134ec10beddb9351cd6.tgt_id: Quyền Được Bảo Vệ Danh Dự, Nhân Phẩm, Uy Tín
rel-28bcf2bf12fe2134ec10beddb9351cd6.description: The right to have one's dignity, reputation, and honor protected by law is a fundamental right of an individual.

rel-c4c748ccf3b2d452e17c828610e644b3.tgt_id: Quyền Hiến, Nhận Mô, Bộ Phận Cơ Thể Người và Hiến, Lấy Xác
rel-c4c748ccf3b2d452e17c828610e644b3.description: The right to donate or receive body parts and organs for medical purposes or research is a legal right of an individual.

rel-b97d1f134247821d1390edd8b9220e7b.tgt_id: Quyền Xác Định Lại Giới Tính
rel-b97d1f134247821d1390edd8b9220e7b.description: The right to legally change one's gender identity is a legal right of an individual.

rel-6a35433c7c0673d510b755d5c332814c.description: The process of legally changing one's gender identity is a legal right of an individual.

rel-ae6ec43a63a40885ef0c0e7e5324e840.description: The process of gender transition allows individuals to change their gender and update their legal records accordingly.

rel-9772d39b4c526b185fde322fca8df2c4.tgt_id: Quyền Nhân Thân Trong Hôn Nhân Và Gia Đình
rel-9772d39b4c526b185fde322fca8df2c4.description: Individuals have personal rights within marriage and family relationships, including the right to marry, divorce, and other rights related to family relationships.

rel-3a479091c9e46f7984bd61a328af52e2.description: The place where an individual resides is legally recognized as their residence.

rel-27779c62e421c2770fddfa24a8fa276e.description: Người đại diện theo pháp luật must be present in Việt Nam or appoint a substitute if absent for more than 30 days.

rel-5cb5b14d29671479f262c4351e82f72d.description: The legal representative of a limited liability company or a joint-stock company is included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-9d420b62188d5f07a3f664afcd72cab2.description: Đиều 54 outlines the role of the legal representative of a company.

rel-4cf2c029a0afe8a7a92aa20f8c17689f.description: Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật is the legal representative of the company.

rel-4e8814c75aafcecef2f34cb8f4d7ae5c.src_id: Người đại diện theo pháp luật
rel-4e8814c75aafcecef2f34cb8f4d7ae5c.description: Người đại diện theo pháp luật has the right to demand the company to stop using the name of a former Thành viên hợp danh.

rel-4e6606bd1012591a782e1c69abf7cd95.description: Individuals who have difficulties in understanding and controlling their behavior but have not lost their legal capacity can engage in civil transactions with the consent of a legal representative.<SEP>Civil transactions by people who have difficulties in understanding and controlling their actions can be declared invalid.

rel-47688366539d9ba95948e8453fe5f218.description: Individuals with difficulties in perception and control of behavior require a legal representative.

rel-b39a4ac64ada319093b9028ad866a787.src_id: Người bị hạn chế năng lực hành vi dân sự
rel-b39a4ac64ada319093b9028ad866a787.description: Individuals whose legal capacity is restricted due to drug addiction or other conditions can engage in civil transactions with the consent of a legal representative.

rel-a6fc965d49ac9353732b5c207e3bb099.src_id: Người bị hạn chế năng lực hành vi dân sự
rel-a6fc965d49ac9353732b5c207e3bb099.description: Civil transactions by people whose capacity for civil conduct is limited can be declared invalid.

rel-76302cb8d2fd22a616967916befcc14a.src_id: Người bị hạn chế năng lực hành vi dân sự
rel-76302cb8d2fd22a616967916befcc14a.description: Individuals with restricted legal capacity require a legal representative.

rel-e8e6aa2b3051c83dd7b58c7df4316eb3.tgt_id: Người từ đủ mười lăm tuổi đến chưa đủ mười tám tuổi
rel-e8e6aa2b3051c83dd7b58c7df4316eb3.description: Individuals between the ages of 15 and 18 can independently engage in civil transactions, except for certain types of transactions.

rel-a0cbcb9691db2210c70245f520a6c5e7.description: A civil transaction can be declared invalid if it does not comply with the formal requirements.

rel-f96c3616e761a8cfad682f713fa6a171.description: An invalid civil transaction has legal consequences, including the restoration of the original state and compensation for damages.

rel-3e5b4c404f593717c304375789e0fafa.description: Điều 128 specifies the criteria for declaring a civil transaction as invalid due to the person not recognizing and controlling their actions.

rel-bcaa48c8c92fb3fd924ff3a8075b98ce.description: Điều 129 specifies the criteria for declaring a civil transaction as invalid due to non-compliance with formal requirements.

rel-7a2de7d95863f643a1773a99e18aa28c.description: Điều 130 specifies the criteria for declaring a civil transaction as partially invalid.

rel-97e7af274474fac291fa1dafdad0f8ab.description: Điều 131 specifies the legal consequences of an invalid civil transaction.

rel-625918ac0a3d05e8cb0bd77fd4e09bd3.description: Điều 132 specifies the statute of limitations for requesting the court to declare a civil transaction as invalid.

rel-d2f4845e736a8744d954206ad209ff81.description: The representative is authorized to conduct civil transactions on behalf of another party.

rel-c0c50209fdd36c18b4b15972829c11fc.description: Điều 133 provides legal provisions regarding the validity of civil transactions and the protection of rights for a bona fide third party.

rel-97acf5a7483e7ecb9733021cdd24944a.description: The pledge of immovable property has specific legal requirements for effectiveness against third parties.

rel-027115006b0dc2ebaabdb1b07171b122.tgt_id: Giao dịch dân sự vô hiệu
rel-027115006b0dc2ebaabdb1b07171b122.description: Legal representatives can request the court to declare civil transactions invalid.

rel-f1835a678ad02bbfadc24fde5f68de65.description: The representative is authorized to conduct civil transactions within the scope of representation.

rel-f2642ff16f3b74bcf8bf92699c5f79c0.description: An unauthorized representative is an individual or entity that conducts civil transactions without proper authorization.

rel-ffd0269f0d8915c90e6eea1bdba2ac2d.description: The representative is authorized to conduct civil transactions with another party.

rel-c421c9b52be24f919f4a976ac97b47d2.description: Điều 144 states that if a representative and a person engaging in a transaction intentionally establish or execute a civil transaction beyond the scope of representation, causing damage to the represented party, they must jointly bear the responsibility for compensation.

rel-00d7418009f17280bebf52f22e9ea73e.description: Người đại diện and Người giao dịch are involved in a transaction where they may bear joint responsibility if they exceed the scope of representation and cause damage to the represented party.

rel-0b67b3c5f92e791757911dcbff70d6cf.description: Người đại diện acts on behalf of Người được đại diện and may be held responsible for any damage caused by exceeding the scope of representation.

rel-0dcf242337971d61a273c5ad3375af69.description: Điều 134 defines the role of a representative who acts on behalf of another for civil transactions.

rel-edc4e78adc558c1c51fe92e7f495c259.description: Điều 135 establishes the basis for the right of representation, including authorization and legal designation.

rel-076240556e8af21674222922d1fc384a.description: If the person for whom the work is performed dies, the person performing the work without authorization must continue the work until the representative takes over.

rel-d47aabbcc747cee3b85c146bddd71556.description: Điều 53 specifies the role of the representative for a member who is restricted or incapacitated.

rel-d5c4cffed7b0f5607917a5d7dfd6ca41.src_id: Giao dịch dân sự vô hiệu
rel-d5c4cffed7b0f5607917a5d7dfd6ca41.description: Misunderstandings can lead to civil transactions being declared invalid.

rel-d0b20e3f6dfd322b332411447aa8aed1.description: Deception can invalidate a civil transaction.

rel-39d2dac5e54960d9dee8e32444827324.src_id: Giao dịch dân sự vô hiệu
rel-39d2dac5e54960d9dee8e32444827324.description: Threats can invalidate a civil transaction.

rel-27880973a7653d7bc9d82e685787e36f.src_id: Giao dịch dân sự vô hiệu
rel-27880973a7653d7bc9d82e685787e36f.description: Coercion can invalidate a civil transaction.

rel-c87fac874be630726b754886545c1d2a.description: Fictitious civil transactions created to evade obligations towards third parties are declared invalid.

rel-d927504c1e0fdadf8297052a57209c15.description: Đиều 153 discusses the continuous nature of the time limit for enjoying civil rights.

rel-9196f273613eaf7c15969f57f1b9fa69.description: Đиều 151 explains how the time limit for being exempt from civil obligations is calculated.

rel-30b804df536ee1857e85171292ce7589.description: Người được hưởng lợi benefits from the time limit for being exempt from civil obligations.

rel-5e651db6fb1288acdc07c0624653f07d.description: Đиều 155 lists situations where the time limit for initiating a lawsuit does not apply.

rel-e7680e0e2c556679b71ccdfeb8876ef1.description: The statute of limitations for initiating legal proceedings can be restarted if the party with an obligation acknowledges or partially fulfills their obligation.

rel-1c757d97e60410d7dcbcfe8042705e19.description: Điều 156 outlines the circumstances under which the statute of limitations for initiating legal proceedings does not apply.

rel-96188ed8bc6a8a087c4887e6aaa88e2f.description: Điều 157 describes the conditions under which the statute of limitations for initiating legal proceedings can be restarted.

rel-379e94a7a6bd769056377b487449069f.description: Hội đồng trọng tài considers the statute of limitations when resolving disputes and making decisions.

rel-c1cf38db40e0db497893b33dedf5858a.src_id: Thời hiệu yêu cầu giải quyết việc dân sự
rel-c1cf38db40e0db497893b33dedf5858a.description: Đиều 151 explains how the time limit for requesting the resolution of a civil matter is calculated.

rel-6de7aacdc2c26c6ebbfb8c7aa6e3ea8c.src_id: Thời hiệu yêu cầu giải quyết việc dân sự
rel-6de7aacdc2c26c6ebbfb8c7aa6e3ea8c.description: Đиều 154 outlines when the time limit for requesting the resolution of a civil matter begins.

rel-5628003497cec3b4d71ad609c9ad4538.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố là đã chết
rel-5628003497cec3b4d71ad609c9ad4538.description: The property relations of a person declared dead are handled according to inheritance laws.

rel-40be51ebde5a1bf09669803118f20faa.description: The personal relations of a person declared dead are restored when the court revokes the declaration.

rel-f3a5db6695ec4657e15717614f063c16.description: The spouse of a person declared dead may have been granted a divorce or remarried, which remains legally valid.

rel-c751a440f1ac2c7a99b34bbacb8574ec.src_id: Người bị tuyên bố là đã chết
rel-c751a440f1ac2c7a99b34bbacb8574ec.description: Heirs of a person declared dead must return the inherited property if the person is found to be alive.

rel-5712b2de52f7d3dbd3cb5163cf213dee.tgt_id: Luật hôn nhân và gia đình
rel-5712b2de52f7d3dbd3cb5163cf213dee.description: The marriage and family law governs the personal relations of individuals, including those declared dead.

rel-d0412ab8c8f67792a4d3c6c9e0e3a72a.tgt_id: Người thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-d0412ab8c8f67792a4d3c6c9e0e3a72a.description: If the person for whom the work is performed dies, the person performing the work without authorization must continue the work until the heir takes over.

rel-fe29ff3d98f2ac89d0d060351a22aa20.description: Thời hiệu thừa kế is the time limit within which Người thừa kế can claim inheritance.

rel-f29e0d430f180be22e344bddfaf2f677.description: Người thừa kế is responsible for fulfilling the financial obligations left by the deceased.

rel-51734702fab5dee0bedb10c7e4a57ef7.description: Người thừa kế must be alive or born and alive after the time of inheritance but conceived before the death of the deceased.

rel-5df66e1d7dc7084f0d72c8d93cf6d9a8.description: The person managing the estate can represent the heirs and is entitled to compensation.

rel-078fd0a657e479db5738b483e88d2c61.description: The heirs have the right to refuse the inheritance under certain conditions.

rel-73fca44969bf3e5584bff65de8f6be4e.description: Điều 53 specifies the rights of heirs to become members of a company.

rel-4596064258b88fabfc63204deb05121e.description: Bộ luật Dân sự defines the legal framework for inheritance rights of heirs.

rel-10a6a5fda592ab48d0e3df59c3d098bb.description: The business law governs the establishment, operation, and dissolution of commercial entities.

rel-63f675d8dc95490fd76e5949997e2a0a.tgt_id: Luật về tổ chức bộ máy nhà nước
rel-63f675d8dc95490fd76e5949997e2a0a.description: The state organization law governs the establishment, operation, and dissolution of non-commercial entities.

rel-454d2281aba4310263fc637fcdc80032.src_id: Tranh chấp về quyền sử dụng đất
rel-454d2281aba4310263fc637fcdc80032.description: The land law regulates disputes over land use rights.

rel-fd7043bc0d464dc30b3d6d05a7fb82ec.description: Bên có nghĩa vụ must fulfill their obligations to have the assets released from the legal holding.

rel-57176ee25b5b5e078cd98caae49c4f5a.description: Bên có nghĩa vụ is responsible for fulfilling their obligations; failure to do so constitutes a violation of the contract.

rel-dd18f1850849cec76b6ec744f91612ac.description: Điều 279 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for delivering specific items.

rel-e034c245f998056c7071991aae5ce0cf.description: Điều 280 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for paying money.

rel-a521b5c83aeb80eede3f40b34d0b6092.description: Điều 281 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for performing or not performing a task.

rel-f67fc2ab09dc785c19dbc511d8ce6482.description: Điều 282 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for performing tasks on a regular basis.

rel-f48c9c180db654eb5b2c3c3af23f94e5.description: Điều 283 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for performing tasks through a third party.

rel-3301a18bbb912d745838b092a45b0540.description: Điều 284 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for performing tasks with conditions.

rel-142036cf01cd4df181d9e6689e7076ac.description: Điều 285 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for performing tasks with optional objects.

rel-85acff43be81256cf449a51ff440193e.description: Điều 286 outlines the obligations for the party responsible for performing substitute tasks.

rel-a4d69f9da4eb45889ad2e4a9be2d6c45.description: The party responsible for delivering specific items must ensure the correct items are delivered.

rel-95c051777c279fd6b76afb08d8dea1ca.description: The party responsible for delivering items of the same type must ensure the correct quantity and quality are delivered.

rel-d709c55a779dfc4d54702da80548a7ea.description: The party responsible for delivering items as a complete set must ensure all items are delivered together.

rel-84904fd7caa2270a3b24bdc93987df56.description: The party responsible for paying money must include interest on the principal debt.

rel-8517a0e897f7d1225d7bbb75515f2777.tgt_id: Điều kiện thực hiện nghĩa vụ
rel-8517a0e897f7d1225d7bbb75515f2777.description: The party responsible for fulfilling obligations must adhere to the conditions specified.

rel-4aedc3134cd1dfd24a6e0fb34b675941.description: The party responsible for fulfilling obligations may perform substitute obligations if the original obligations cannot be fulfilled.

rel-3bb7004a59923fa5ee5b36b13bf3226b.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ must fulfill an obligation, and Bên Có Quyền can demand its fulfillment.

rel-cddc71c619cbd29c711bcc28e8d2aa43.description: A third party may be authorized to perform obligations on behalf of the party responsible.

rel-b03dd84dd2f6db8d3f5074d77f5ce10d.description: Người đại diện theo ủy quyền acts on behalf of the shareholders, members, or owners and is responsible for their actions towards third parties.

rel-abe20846fcd2e1bf9cebf4b03aaa89ee.description: Sử dụng tài sản chung is the concept of using shared property collectively by all owners.

rel-2c3d11a280e19f9816611eb5ab4dc5b7.description: Định đoạt tài sản chung is the concept of disposing of shared property collectively by all owners.

rel-441609baa6ca6a754bfbde003af38d61.description: Điều 224 establishes that the owner of a property has rights over the produce or income from the property, starting from the time it is obtained.

rel-d15bf5cafd605a1516628b50a15c1094.description: Chủ sở hữu has rights over the produce or income from a property.

rel-f8a76378996f373fec8c68c79f610f0d.description: Thỏa thuận establishes the rights of the owner over the produce or income from a property.

rel-b42b0bbf067e5d9393be2e18b851778e.description: The owner has a responsibility to protect trees that serve as boundary markers between properties.

rel-f86cca3b4ca447298018a7fa158d969a.tgt_id: Hoa lợi thu được từ cây

rel-7e288963894589b71271b773941893c6.description: The owner can enter into an alternative agreement regarding the use and maintenance of shared trees.

rel-be3e9fbac3f4a86e605e73330b3497fd.tgt_id: Bất động sản liền kề và xung quanh
rel-be3e9fbac3f4a86e605e73330b3497fd.description: The owner has a legal obligation to protect adjacent and surrounding properties from potential damage.

rel-4fcec08d50bd4ee3197a673fd96718f7.description: The owner must comply with legal regulations regarding the opening of doors and windows towards shared pathways.

rel-0ab8bc416e7a8d162d10e2043131e143.description: Chủ sở hữu chung must agree to sell property through an auction.

rel-940e20165c00e2f57b279d0c63bd9a09.description: Chủ Sở Hữu has the right to use property according to their will, as long as it does not cause harm or affect national, ethnic, public interests, or the legal rights and interests of others.

rel-2510def00293d95c8ead17c4a442c582.description: Chủ Sở Hữu must respect and maintain the boundaries between adjacent real properties.

rel-a3284168c9b320ceb8bc5d9608892df1.description: Điều 255 allows the owner of real estate to install power lines and communication lines through other properties reasonably, ensuring safety and convenience.

rel-2b8af141a1f2a7c18cf151515da8574e.description: Đиều 263 outlines the rights and obligations of the property owner.

rel-88f187dd3aebdcd2dddab0d737fb4089.description: A person who uses another's property without legal basis must return it to the rightful owner.

rel-9b6f96bd36c26ddedcc51cebd351f45b.description: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền is authorized by the Chủ Sở Hữu to represent their interests.

rel-19e703ed359a1cd16c8abbcfbafb9225.description: The person who processes the raw materials into a new object may become the owner if they are in good faith.

rel-290fa741dbde2aad3a61cb9c8a1b26a6.description: Bên Đặt Gia Công provides the raw materials and retains ownership of them until the processing is complete.

rel-171c5d08397296682290ee762f80aed0.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công processes the raw materials and bears the risk associated with them until the finished product is delivered.

rel-f733ae681594eeb76b2feaa344952b19.description: The person who discovers property or assets that have no known owner may become the owner under certain conditions.

rel-f9048ac5df4b63641012566de89e110a.description: If the discovered property or assets are immovable, they belong to the state.

rel-00fbd01f492bb52709911c6f93c5f0d5.description: The person who discovers property or assets must report to the local police body.

rel-7de652fa4f86461c09055119fa1024b0.description: Nhà Nước represents the state as the owner of public property and manages it uniformly.

rel-9208137403d6b35b5dd9c55b13d86864.description: Nhà Nước manages public property invested in enterprises according to the law.

rel-a3f8c9c95d45dea3548bc4c4fc128b25.description: Nhà Nước recognizes and protects the existence and development of various types of enterprises, ensuring equality before the law and protecting the legal rights and interests of enterprises and their owners.

rel-149c7cf06c2a847aa152142b29e98e4e.description: Doanh nghiệp must notify Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh of changes in its registration content.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp registers branches, representative offices, and business locations with the registration authority.<SEP>Business entities must register with the registration authority and follow regulations for suspension, cessation, and termination.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is responsible for registering the business entity and updating its legal status.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is responsible for registering businesses and supervising their compliance with legal requirements.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp must report to and register with Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh.

rel-b5ffd0a0d343ce03bebad9b0487d81ff.description: Chủ sở hữu bất động sản can install electrical lines through neighboring properties.

rel-24ecade6621cd6a28f4e8d2d75355d71.src_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Bất Động Sản
rel-24ecade6621cd6a28f4e8d2d75355d71.description: Chủ sở hữu bất động sản can install communication lines through neighboring properties.

rel-994d5aebd350f975ab3efef045da4387.src_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Bất Động Sản
rel-994d5aebd350f975ab3efef045da4387.tgt_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Bất Động Sản Liền Kề
rel-994d5aebd350f975ab3efef045da4387.description: Chủ sở hữu bất động sản must ensure that their drainage systems do not affect neighboring property owners.

rel-beb2d0f2dd1627826584bd001517335c.src_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Bất Động Sản
rel-beb2d0f2dd1627826584bd001517335c.description: Người sử dụng lối đi must limit damage to the property of the owner through whom they are using a pathway and compensate if damage occurs.

rel-1e41e110ca0aae902fb2e55b4bac70e3.src_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Bất Động Sản
rel-1e41e110ca0aae902fb2e55b4bac70e3.tgt_id: Người Sử Dụng Đất Canh Tác
rel-1e41e110ca0aae902fb2e55b4bac70e3.description: Người sử dụng đất canh tác can request pathways through neighboring properties for watering or draining crops, and the property owner must comply.

rel-4111d9b3079e6b195600738a01e6c36d.description: Chủ sở hữu bất động sản must install drainage ditches to manage wastewater.

rel-2bcc9a6c71f3b5487506de536c25f252.description: Người bắt được gia súc captures lost livestock and may be entitled to ownership under certain conditions.

rel-ca8536a21621d61131c4c76f6ce9105d.description: Điều 231 provides the legal framework for establishing ownership of lost livestock.

rel-70db1428dd81f495a9f97717e5bfe1b9.description: Người Bắt Được Gia Cầm takes care of lost Gia Cầm and can claim certain rights until the original owner is found.

rel-aeb17d261af3b062fc9f9fc5ef8926fe.description: Điều 232 provides the legal framework for establishing ownership of lost poultry.

rel-3b05f4582c44cf0ab1cc555340ec44c7.tgt_id: Suy đoán về tình trạng và quyền của người chiếm hữu
rel-3b05f4582c44cf0ab1cc555340ec44c7.description: Chiếm hữu công khai is a basis for the presumption about the status and rights of the possessor.

rel-5faab2af97d4bc890279f8fc4deaed2a.description: Bảo vệ việc chiếm hữu provides protection for the possessor, including the right to demand cessation of infringement and restoration of the original state.

rel-9eb09639f68c86c6a43d91f0a47423f9.src_id: Quyền chiếm hữu của chủ sở hữu
rel-9eb09639f68c86c6a43d91f0a47423f9.tgt_id: Quyền sử dụng của chủ sở hữu
rel-9eb09639f68c86c6a43d91f0a47423f9.description: Quyền chiếm hữu của chủ sở hữu allows the owner to use the property according to their will without causing damage or affecting national, ethnic, public interests, or the rights and legitimate interests of others.

rel-cbe0e00d8af44470cdb46661df34a938.src_id: Quyền chiếm hữu của chủ sở hữu
rel-cbe0e00d8af44470cdb46661df34a938.tgt_id: Quyền chiếm hữu của người được chủ sở hữu ủy quyền quản lý tài sản
rel-cbe0e00d8af44470cdb46661df34a938.description: Quyền chiếm hữu của người được chủ sở hữu ủy quyền quản lý tài sản is the right of possession for a person authorized by the owner to manage the property within the scope, manner, and duration specified by the owner.

rel-ea0e3d83e9d86394b08eae86c9068cbd.src_id: Quyền chiếm hữu của chủ sở hữu
rel-ea0e3d83e9d86394b08eae86c9068cbd.tgt_id: Quyền chiếm hữu của người được giao tài sản thông qua giao dịch dân sự
rel-ea0e3d83e9d86394b08eae86c9068cbd.description: Quyền chiếm hữu của người được giao tài sản thông qua giao dịch dân sự is the right of possession for a person who receives property through a civil transaction without the transfer of ownership.

rel-435057db3085bc8354555c4fe3acc6c5.tgt_id: Quyền sử dụng của chủ sở hữu
rel-435057db3085bc8354555c4fe3acc6c5.description: Quyền sử dụng is the right to exploit the utility of property and enjoy its fruits and benefits, which is also applicable to the owner.

rel-a46a94b41582277ae2369d268a4527e2.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Bảo Vệ Môi Trường
rel-a46a94b41582277ae2369d268a4527e2.description: Chủ Thể must comply with legal provisions on environmental protection when exercising rights over property.

rel-c0954ee3fcb9f5fa97e028460b73814e.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Tôn Trọng, Bảo Đảm Trật Tự, An Toàn Xã Hội
rel-c0954ee3fcb9f5fa97e028460b73814e.description: Chủ Thể must respect and ensure social order and safety when exercising rights over property.

rel-829d6c2246acffb7ef5c4c850efbccf1.src_id: Ranh Giới Giữa Các Bất Động Sản
rel-829d6c2246acffb7ef5c4c850efbccf1.description: Người Sử Dụng Đất must use the land within the determined boundaries and not affect the use of land by others.

rel-c86a9539eb342a7c5cb9013d49f608d8.tgt_id: Pháp Luật Về Bảo Vệ Môi Trường
rel-c86a9539eb342a7c5cb9013d49f608d8.description: Chủ Thể must comply with legal provisions on environmental protection when exercising rights over property.

rel-137210af95868f481b7c47eea136b2cd.tgt_id: Thế Chấp Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
rel-137210af95868f481b7c47eea136b2cd.description: Thế Chấp Quyền Sử Dụng Đất involves collateralizing land use rights without collateralizing the assets attached to the land, depending on the relationship between the user and the owner of the assets.

rel-53b7b4014b83ed2c13feb67afd37c81d.description: Người Có Ruộng, Ao, Hồ can claim ownership of Vetus Nuôi Dưới Nước that move into their property.

rel-5f0fe88c0027db6179d67275b7daa567.src_id: Trường Hợp Vật Nuôi Dưới Nước Có Dấu Hiệu Riêng Biệt
rel-5f0fe88c0027db6179d67275b7daa567.description: Người Có Ruộng, Ao, Hồ must publicly notify if Vetus Nuôi Dưới Nước have distinct marks that identify them as not belonging to the current owner.

rel-dbc24f981e78af1c5aa6fadd7395014d.description: Điều 219 outlines the conditions under which jointly owned property can be divided.

rel-3e48a9240ce1f8016ea590ad417054b6.description: Điều 220 specifies the conditions under which joint ownership of a property ends.

rel-f1919b89170202d2f72f044e40a5f509.description: Điều 221 defines the basis for establishing ownership rights, including intellectual property rights.

rel-e4f9b8b880b7e403427248e74685c0b8.description: Intellectual property rights can be used as capital contribution assets.

rel-0e130fb2318bf04c3843d978e631d198.description: Quyền sở hữu trí tuệ is intellectual property rights used as a form of payment in the company.

rel-851dbc43089826d713cec688888ae276.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh can receive remuneration (Thù Lao) if there is an agreement with Bên Được Bảo Lãnh.

rel-69dd20fc85ed811723fb759af7398a94.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh must fulfill the Nhiệm Vụ Bảo Lãnh if Bên Được Bảo Lãnh fails to meet their obligations.

rel-f04dc4372975fb80a7c98073770da1ca.tgt_id: Miễn Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Bảo Lãnh
rel-f04dc4372975fb80a7c98073770da1ca.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh's obligation to fulfill the guarantee can be waived by Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh.

rel-da9d8083e9d67c4040e0d63e033c7e7d.tgt_id: Trách Nhiệm Dân Sự Của Bên Bảo Lãnh
rel-da9d8083e9d67c4040e0d63e033c7e7d.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh is liable for civil responsibilities if they fail to fulfill their guarantee obligations.

rel-94abdfb927144dcab598881bb66cc83e.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh's guarantee can be terminated under certain conditions.

rel-bdb22bdbf561af53db7c4299137c6a7c.tgt_id: Nhiệm Vụ Phát Sinh Trong Tương Lai
rel-bdb22bdbf561af53db7c4299137c6a7c.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh provides a guarantee for future obligations (Nhiệm Vụ Phát Sinh Trong Tương Lai) until certain conditions are met.

rel-2ffce66da0dadddef2e142747225c5df.description: Bảo Đảm Bằng Tài Sản is a method used by Bên Bảo Lãnh to secure the guarantee.

rel-d0da1ca3148abb743328f26ba62f0c69.description: Bên Bảo Lãnh guarantees the obligations of the party being guaranteed and will fulfill them if the other party fails to do so.

rel-f6b746a1248331df30c4eae64144f2be.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh has the right to demand the fulfillment of the Nhiệm Vụ Bảo Lãnh from Bên Bảo Lãnh.

rel-5acc814b789c18c069fa1ac18eedb19e.tgt_id: Miễn Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Bảo Lãnh
rel-5acc814b789c18c069fa1ac18eedb19e.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh can waive the obligation of Bên Bảo Lãnh to fulfill the guarantee.

rel-7f6b117f2ccce03974f2f1a3ce2c9775.tgt_id: Trách Nhiệm Dân Sự Của Bên Bảo Lãnh
rel-7f6b117f2ccce03974f2f1a3ce2c9775.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh can demand the fulfillment of civil liabilities from Bên Bảo Lãnh if they fail to fulfill their guarantee obligations.

rel-2945bd9786d7a502371fa0839e40a917.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh can demand the termination of the guarantee under certain conditions.

rel-0fe55139707eb83ec907dcf4fa270dec.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh receives the guarantee from the third party and has the right to enforce it if the other party fails to fulfill their obligations.

rel-2ab835acb08fac03ab6d9ec6365d22c4.description: Bên Được Bảo Lãnh's obligations are guaranteed by Bên Bảo Lãnh.

rel-66f41b05d6bc2a356517b5245dcbaeb9.tgt_id: Miễn Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Bảo Lãnh
rel-66f41b05d6bc2a356517b5245dcbaeb9.description: Bên Được Bảo Lãnh is not required to fulfill their obligations if the guarantee is waived by Bên Nhận Bảo Lãnh.

rel-4145860c7762b85a816464d74dcecaed.tgt_id: Trách Nhiệm Dân Sự Của Bên Bảo Lãnh
rel-4145860c7762b85a816464d74dcecaed.description: Bên Được Bảo Lãnh's obligations are covered by the civil liability of Bên Bảo Lãnh.

rel-46a0e64bc04b578bb123f0803d55f39d.description: Bên Được Bảo Lãnh's obligations are terminated when the guarantee is terminated.

rel-32b79de8a692028eb3b5de723bac3272.description: Bên Được Bảo Lãnh is the party whose obligations are guaranteed by the third party and will be fulfilled if they fail to do so.

rel-af75958d95389d657962ea621932c150.description: Thù Lao is the compensation paid to members of the Hội Đồng Quản Trị and is included in the company's business expenses.

rel-f04c7c5728b35e9716d8928e3ee45ee6.src_id: Nhiệm Vụ Phát Sinh Trong Tương Lai
rel-f04c7c5728b35e9716d8928e3ee45ee6.description: Pháp Nhân Bảo Lãnh provides a guarantee for future obligations (Nhiệm Vụ Phát Sinh Trong Tương Lai) until the legal entity ceases to exist.

rel-16ddd8c776b2058bcccfddab2d727c23.description: Pháp Nhân Bảo Lãnh is a legal entity that provides a guarantee for the obligations of another party and will fulfill them if the other party fails to do so.

rel-83aa67f00cb1e3b515f47c7c2dda933c.description: Người Thứ Ba is responsible for managing and preserving the collateral asset and returning it as required.

rel-6dc27288615e3acd2053df5df2d2bd4e.description: Người Thứ Ba must return the collateral asset to the recipient of the collateral.

rel-ad48615a769c67e2bbfe9c4ce73afd33.description: Người Thứ Ba must return the collateral asset to the provider of the collateral.

rel-4247f38ce84c1673848faf35d5de05db.description: Bên Bán must ensure that the purchased property is not disputed by a third party, and if a dispute arises, the buyer has the right to cancel the contract and request compensation.

rel-647b24561b88c9465b550ec4ac668aa7.description: Đиều 415 specifies the execution of contracts for the benefit of a third party.

rel-7c03dae02e52e43e9853b25611b2f826.description: Đиều 416 grants the right of refusal to a third party in contracts.

rel-534b0b9149333be78a8b98081adc00ea.description: Bên Được Ủy Quyền must communicate with Người Thứ Ba regarding the scope and execution of the authorized tasks.

rel-316c2a6a481e6cbb27149cb88eb14a0b.description: If a third party receives property from someone who possessed it without legal basis, the third party must return it.

rel-d92153f628aae9388950b9307c7da2cc.description: Bên Nhận Thế Chấp receives the collateral asset and is involved in its management.

rel-aecf166d4d24393ce9d711f08e7a236d.description: Bên Thế Chấp provides the collateral asset and is involved in its management.

rel-1156a9b429bc3bdf2504c4fab8c5bb7a.src_id: Thế Chấp Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất
rel-1156a9b429bc3bdf2504c4fab8c5bb7a.tgt_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất
rel-1156a9b429bc3bdf2504c4fab8c5bb7a.description: Thế Chấp Tài Sản Gắn Liền Với Đất involves collateralizing assets attached to the land without collateralizing the land use rights, depending on the relationship between the owner and the user of the land.

rel-bb781788ccf7b902b06bbb5ad9f5d9e1.src_id: Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản
rel-bb781788ccf7b902b06bbb5ad9f5d9e1.description: The termination of collateralization can occur when the obligations secured by the collateral are fulfilled.

rel-7697ce558c8dc2ca902bd17c7012ca6e.src_id: Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản
rel-7697ce558c8dc2ca902bd17c7012ca6e.description: The termination of collateralization can occur when it is replaced by alternative security measures.

rel-e5da178573de24d3fd9b8c27a2468fae.src_id: Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản
rel-e5da178573de24d3fd9b8c27a2468fae.tgt_id: Tài Sản Đã Được Xử Lý
rel-e5da178573de24d3fd9b8c27a2468fae.description: The termination of collateralization can occur when the collateral asset has been processed.

rel-eee3d1a9f111060d694ea87cf5f4f6d7.src_id: Chấm Dứt Thế Chấp Tài Sản
rel-eee3d1a9f111060d694ea87cf5f4f6d7.description: The termination of collateralization can occur based on an agreement among the parties.

rel-643b5ae5a834e28760327cbeb1913c7e.description: Đặt Cọc involves providing an asset (Tài Sản Đặt Cọc) to ensure the execution of a contract.

rel-4694a71da8a45a88454cbcaf73c41386.description: Ký Cược involves providing an asset (Tài Sản Ký Cược) to ensure the return of the leased asset.

rel-cb9a97385ee1966867652f27fd3030f6.description: Ký Cược involves the lessee (Bên Thuê) providing an asset (Tài Sản Ký Cược) to ensure the return of the leased asset.

rel-3a2322af88df5478e3950ece9c1102de.description: Ký Cược involves the lessor (Bên Cho Thuê) receiving an asset (Tài Sản K_ Ký Cược) to ensure the return of the leased asset.

rel-208f17934a0fc4fcec681936bd4ed95e.description: Ký quỹ involves depositing collateral such as money, precious metals, or valuable documents into a blocked account at a financial institution.

rel-9a0f4e7c66f738b39ee2b76e174684cd.description: Tài Sản Ký Cược is deposited into a tài khoản phong tỏa at a financial institution as part of the ký quỹ process.

rel-d34f8d13fffd51d21f380075f8347a2c.tgt_id: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-d34f8d13fffd51d21f380075f8347a2c.description: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ includes various measures to ensure the fulfillment of obligations.

rel-5acf3c60a70339d286626823c82fccd9.tgt_id: Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm
rel-5acf3c60a70339d286626823c82fccd9.description: Phạm Vi Nghĩa V_ụ Được Bảo Đảm refers to the scope of an obligation that can be secured, which can be partial or full, and can include current, future, or conditional obligations.

rel-9b60f664f49bc67d232a5602dff2c047.tgt_id: Địa Điểm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-9b60f664f49bc67d232a5602dff2c047.description: Địa Điểm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ is the location where obligations or duties are to be performed.

rel-f9c773cf48ccac98c7fc87b91e741076.tgt_id: Thời Hạn Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-f9c773cf48ccac98c7fc87b91e741076.description: Thời Hạn Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ is the time period within which obligations or duties must be fulfilled.

rel-618602822c22c53f91d84e79a023995b.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for fulfilling the Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-8d305f797dc7d57eed3daf239f4311e9.description: Bên Có Quyền has the right to demand the fulfillment of the Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-5f1a20484f3d29f2e3c8bbfc4392d418.description: Nghĩa Vụ may involve the delivery of a Vật Đặc Định.

rel-4b3942e8a330ebfa5ddedf74c9050478.description: Bù Trừ Nghĩa Vụ can lead to the termination of a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-180f621916c7afe0a4778e0c66e84ea2.description: Chấm Dứt Nghĩa Vụ refers to the termination of a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-9ef4266af44f3531acca416b78b51d6f.description: Miễn Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ refers to the exemption from fulfilling a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-3ade981bd079e188189b25a6fb27638b.tgt_id: Thỏa Thuận Thay Thế Nghĩa Vụ
rel-3ade981bd079e188189b25a6fb27638b.description: Thỏa Thuận Thay Thế Nghĩa Vụ refers to agreements to replace one Nghĩa Vụ with another.

rel-cbee00df4172bc07f70445ae8f08afbb.tgt_id: Hòa Nhập Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ và Bên Có Quyền
rel-cbee00df4172bc07f70445ae8f08afbb.description: Hòa Nhập Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ và Bên Có Quyền can lead to the termination of a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-5dc29a916ddf6643e492a6b4600b0a8d.tgt_id: Thời Hiệu Miễn Trừ Nghĩa Vụ
rel-5dc29a916ddf6643e492a6b4600b0a8d.description: Thời Hiệu Miễn Trừ Nghĩa Vụ can lead to the termination of a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-4fd3c905321b8977f98a1e1435236d72.description: Cá Nhân Chết can lead to the termination of a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-881059387339af9d7ad4a6fed971d2dc.tgt_id: Pháp Nhân Chấm Dứt Tồn Tại
rel-881059387339af9d7ad4a6fed971d2dc.description: Pháp Nhân Chấm Dứt Tồn Tại can lead to the termination of a Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-a2a05cc27e4363232723938696ba1a0a.description: Điều 374 addresses the completion of Nghĩa Vụ when the party with the right is slow to accept the object of the obligation.

rel-3802b342a7b87a718930c964fcc10d0c.description: Điều 375 allows for the termination of Nghĩa Vụ by mutual agreement, provided it does not harm national, public, or individual interests.

rel-f107cf8fb9cf381cdd4926d1be0356ed.description: Điều 376 addresses the termination of Nghĩa Vụ when the party with the right exempts the party with the obligation from fulfilling it.

rel-3326a2280ef8a6d1e9c8af5d1ec936a5.description: Điều 377 addresses the termination of Nghĩa Vụ when they are replaced by other obligations.

rel-49fd782297f3391c7640fa08892993cc.description: Điều 378 addresses the offsetting of Nghĩa Vụ between parties.

rel-0c506abf460e15e87c64aff4c7a19534.description: Điều 379 lists cases where Nghĩa Vụ cannot be offset.

rel-512d06ee95c91daa3f7830ccd7192090.description: Đиều 380 addresses the termination of Nghĩa Vụ when the party with the obligation becomes the party with the right.

rel-09d263b55781dab41e44fe3a0abaeb1f.description: Đиều 381 addresses the termination of Nghĩa Vụ when the statute of limitations for exemption has expired.
rel-09d263b55781dab41e44fe3a0abaeb1f.keywords: legal provision,termination by statute of limitations

rel-e3d7bf6fb34e524072725c9c9ee1b6e3.description: Đиều 382 addresses the termination of Nghĩa Vụ when the party with the right is an individual who has died or a legal entity that has ceased to exist.
rel-e3d7bf6fb34e524072725c9c9ee1b6e3.keywords: legal provision,termination by death or dissolution

rel-529a52b17fd270e30a3b801288c8c985.description: Đиều 383 addresses the termination of Nghĩa Vụ when the specific object of the obligation no longer exists.
rel-529a52b17fd270e30a3b801288c8c985.keywords: legal provision,termination by non-existence of object

rel-31e40117aab76fa5f35d618d971d2d7d.description: Bên Thuê leases an asset and is responsible for returning it or paying for it if they do not return it.<SEP>Bên Thuê has the right to use the Tài Sản Thuê as agreed upon in the lease agreement.

rel-15c81f37feec76fa44f20e9abd0db5ff.description: Bên Thuê must provide a reasonable time notice to terminate the lease agreement.

rel-794f3ab7508b7d92ca568299e91c0732.description: Bên Thuê may be entitled to compensation for damages if the other party breaches the lease agreement.

rel-8fa47bcf8b79bd51961b60de3386d11f.description: Bên Thuê is responsible for minor repairs and maintenance of the Tài Sản Thuê, but not for natural wear and tear.

rel-d4cf4e2c39574a352d0be72bcdaaf273.description: Bên Thuê may be entitled to a reduction in rent if the Tài Sản Thuê is defective or not in the agreed-upon condition.

rel-01f688a136e75369ab4d065e4aae3745.description: Bên Thuê may request to replace the Tài Sản Thuê with another property if it is defective or cannot be repaired.

rel-bb658f059c6a1f7d921d6ddbbc7364eb.tgt_id: Tranh Chấp Về Quyền Sở Hữu
rel-bb658f059c6a1f7d921d6ddbbc7364eb.description: Bên Thuê has the right to terminate the lease agreement if there is a dispute over the ownership of the Tài Sản Thuê.

rel-e755350d840204ec09e16b32e0ebd83f.description: Bên Thuê is not responsible for natural wear and tear that occurs from the use of the Tài Sản Thuê.

rel-00e5c26e80010f786cd10366a55c955e.description: Bên Thuê may improve or enhance the Tài Sản Thuê if approved by the Bên Cho Thuê and may request compensation for reasonable costs.

rel-057e258b1ffbca750ca55155e25f369e.description: Bên Thuê must comply with legal regulations that govern the terms and conditions of the lease agreement.

rel-39a9538b55dd521c526a9794562d184f.description: Bên Thuê must provide a notification to the landlord before terminating the lease agreement.

rel-282b60412ddb346dea028333e7fef59f.description: Bên Thuê has the right to sublease the leased property with the landlord's consent.

rel-53ac1764d0c9dc0b1dbfc2dc94f64d66.description: Bên Thuê has the right to terminate the lease agreement under certain conditions.

rel-952c0f4d218d844ef1b3d3adedf925e6.description: Bên Thuê is responsible for maintaining the leased property to prevent damage and ensure its usability.

rel-42e455e05bde7a691ece2634f00c48b4.description: Đиều 472 outlines the rights and obligations of the lessee in leasing contracts.

rel-828e94f0dcb1a5dec99fc60786ba218b.description: Đиều 473 outlines the determination of rental prices in leasing contracts.

rel-8fbff3f30cf37bcf51f8ece645af460c.description: Đиều 474 outlines the determination of lease terms in leasing contracts.

rel-50705a9cd9800d4eef2e59d1c5e978d2.description: Đиều 475 outlines the conditions under which a lessee can sublease the property they have leased.

rel-9ccd5d998efee3c6fbe3718b95029abc.description: Bên Cho Thuê provides the leased asset and has the right to reclaim it if the lease terms are not met.<SEP>Bên Cho Thuê is responsible for delivering the Tài Sản Thuê in the agreed-upon condition and maintaining its usability.

rel-696541051de8f46010583d120fe0fe0b.description: Bên Cho Thuê is responsible for delivering the leased property as agreed upon in the lease agreement.

rel-7fb1601e7a1841b76bee1392bfb92528.description: Đиều 472 outlines the rights and obligations of the lessor in leasing contracts.

rel-ea75fb5af1ce3c8bc549663082c77237.src_id: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai
rel-ea75fb5af1ce3c8bc549663082c77237.description: Tài Sản Bảo Đảm is used to secure future obligations under the concept of Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai.

rel-b2460f32f2ec1ee25652291334e99000.src_id: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai
rel-b2460f32f2ec1ee25652291334e99000.description: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai can include securing current obligations.

rel-6bbcd350178610d38dfbeae8776d71e6.src_id: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai
rel-6bbcd350178610d38dfbeae8776d71e6.description: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong T_ương Lai can include securing obligations that are subject to certain conditions.

rel-51139454056dde9d2cd71793ceab297e.src_id: Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai
rel-51139454056dde9d2cd71793ceab297e.description: The legal framework (Pháp Luật) governs the conditions and agreements related to securing future obligations under Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trong Tương Lai.

rel-5575545f5d8c01b014de6a98a071cc5a.tgt_id: Hiệu Lực Đối Kháng Với Người Thứ Ba
rel-5575545f5d8c01b014de6a98a071cc5a.description: The legal effect of Tài Sản Bảo Đảm against third parties arises from its registration or possession.

rel-2add977fefe6dc476ad7febefeb661c3.tgt_id: Các Trường Hợp Xử Lý Tài Sản Bảo Đảm
rel-2add977fefe6dc476ad7febefeb661c3.description: Các Trường Hợp Xử Lý Tài Sản Bảo Đảm outlines the circumstances under which Tài Sản Bảo Đảm can be processed.

rel-e8464f6dd24165bf04f17562cafabb04.description: Bên Bảo Đảm provides collateral and is responsible for fulfilling obligations.<SEP>Bên Bảo Đảm provides collateral as part of their legal obligation.

rel-37f23e53fe57bac50de587d696dcf835.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Đảm has the right to process collateral if obligations are not fulfilled.<SEP>Bên Nhận Bảo Đảm receives collateral as part of their legal right.

rel-42c3c7caa3f15c04180649510de801d6.tgt_id: Tổ chức Định Giá Tài Sản
rel-42c3c7caa3f15c04180649510de801d6.description: Tổ chức Định Giá Tài Sản is responsible for valuing the collateral.

rel-39330dde2c2c487b954a3bf9f25415da.src_id: Hiệu Lực Đối Kháng Với Người Thứ Ba
rel-39330dde2c2c487b954a3bf9f25415da.tgt_id: Đăng Ký Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm
rel-39330dde2c2c487b954a3bf9f25415da.description: Đăng Ký Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm is a method that leads to the legal effect of collateral measures against third parties.

rel-78e4d037d3bb140a8778fb99c6b950bf.tgt_id: Tổ chức Định Giá Tài Sản
rel-78e4d037d3bb140a8778fb99c6b950bf.description: Tổ chức Định Giá Tài Sản must comply with the legal framework as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-1480722f0f3c0a0b79fdba4680b8ad34.description: Bên Bảo Đảm must comply with the legal framework as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-276eb9de01c1e60fa3c64aa2f83fb586.description: Bên Nhận Bảo Đảm has the right to enforce the legal framework as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-3ed6381cc70b3ec3945c18038169d085.description: Bên Ủy Quyền must ensure that the authorization and execution of tasks comply with the legal requirements as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-e7663ba6c3e2dfaba37e94bf43cd0fa6.description: Bên Được Ủy Quyền must comply with the legal requirements as defined by Pháp Luật when executing the authorized tasks.

rel-f07f4f1dd1eea0ebfe0223209fff2446.description: Bên Vận Chuyển must comply with the legal requirements as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-95f2f1f02ec8e319492402c4fd19d3c5.description: Bên Thuê Vận Chuyển must comply with the legal requirements as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-5fc14283d7bcd021350202007ccd97d5.description: B_ên Nhận Tài Sản must comply with the legal requirements as defined by Pháp Luật.

rel-8c8c311e929a51ddfcf74c14a4348019.description: The owner of the company must comply with the law, which governs their rights and obligations, including capital contributions and separation of personal and company assets.

rel-1b2405df65fe8bd180dda2076c2d5a73.description: Hội Đồng Quản Trị must comply with the legal framework when making decisions.

rel-38fbc5893d636495f46c8b18e8c4f2ed.tgt_id: Báo Cáo Tài Chính Hằng Năm
rel-38fbc5893d636495f46c8b18e8c4f2ed.description: The legal framework outlined in Pháp Luật governs the inclusion of compensation and salaries in the company's business expenses, as reported in the Báo Cáo Tài Chính Hằng Năm.

rel-01eac3c9ad7d26ba4402f03649e04b35.description: Nghĩa Vụ Thay Thế Được can replace the original obligation if it cannot be fulfilled, provided it is accepted by the party with the right.

rel-a2bf4fa8d06e4e7d869970cf3410c2d3.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ can replace the original obligation with another if it cannot be fulfilled, provided it is accepted by Bên Có Quyền.

rel-c222bd3b84018986820b875ff956b6aa.description: Nhiều Người are responsible for their specific parts of the obligation, and each person is only required to fulfill their own part.

rel-145ad58d84af4d88fecf5ea5adee5a59.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for fulfilling their specific part of the obligation.

rel-1f19a5017913a5fbb0d23ed933630843.description: Nhiều Người are jointly responsible for fulfilling the obligation, and the party with the right can demand any one of them to fulfill the entire obligation.

rel-fc34ba5947cf2997d53442d787d02f6c.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ are jointly responsible for fulfilling the obligation, and Bên Có Quyền can demand any one of them to fulfill the entire obligation.

rel-7f9db59d825f0980cab4d179540c51bc.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Đối Với Nhiều Người Có Quyền Liên Đới
rel-7f9db59d825f0980cab4d179540c51bc.description: Nhiều Người Có Quyền can each demand the fulfillment of the entire obligation from the party with the obligation.

rel-c4d1cdc341c4421139b498f3dc15bfd1.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Đối Với Nhiều Người Có Quyền Liên Đới
rel-c4d1cdc341c4421139b498f3dc15bfd1.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ must fulfill the entire obligation to any of the multiple rights holders.

rel-f04cccb8138a7f5d3950a96a91753b01.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Phân Chia Được Theo Phần
rel-f04cccb8138a7f5d3950a96a91753b01.description: Đối Tượng Nghĩa Vụ can be divided into parts for fulfillment.

rel-bc11a221c1f37b3547431b51f5e57c33.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Phân Chia Được Theo Phần
rel-bc11a221c1f37b3547431b51f5e57c33.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ can fulfill the obligation in parts.

rel-769454219a85719ef253a554a7a839ae.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Không Phân Chia Được Theo Phần
rel-769454219a85719ef253a554a7a839ae.description: Đối Tượng Nghĩa Vụ must be fulfilled all at once.

rel-cf8f34b6f82ad6d72ee2623682626261.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Không Phân Chia Được Theo Phần
rel-cf8f34b6f82ad6d72ee2623682626261.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ must fulfill the obligation all at once.

rel-30e2311f8c5e4c783b68cc79d15c7efc.src_id: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-30e2311f8c5e4c783b68cc79d15c7efc.description: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ includes various measures to ensure the fulfillment of obligations by Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ.

rel-6ceb43e8082638550ea09f896cf0c0d1.src_id: Biện Pháp Bảo Đảm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-6ceb43e8082638550ea09f896cf0c0d1.description: The drafting party's measures to ensure the fulfillment of obligations are not affected by the invalidity of the main contract.

rel-2ada86cce946605f25cbd90897ed8a35.src_id: Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm
rel-2ada86cce946605f25cbd90897ed8a35.description: Phạm Vi Nghĩa Vụ Được Bảo Đảm refers to the scope of an obligation that can be secured for Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ, which can be partial or full, and can include current, future, or conditional obligations.

rel-e4392ece37c80cadb48106cc32a16942.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for fulfilling an obligation and may be held liable for not doing so.

rel-2ce469d75e338075e8dd63f88d80ff52.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is exempt from civil liability if the failure to fulfill an obligation is due to an uncontrollable event.

rel-cd1320f963dc53fe0904a42d79c2abbf.tgt_id: Trách Nhiệm Tiếp Tục Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-cd1320f963dc53fe0904a42d79c2abbf.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ must continue to fulfill an obligation if it has not been fulfilled correctly.

rel-192427cee3ef01bcf9f18df0bba1906b.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for the delay in fulfilling an obligation.

rel-9f6ab597e22547df44f6907fae1f23ef.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ must request postponement of fulfilling an obligation if it cannot be fulfilled on time.

rel-5db5478dabf21c16d28b8330e4a22453.tgt_id: Chậm Tiếp Nhận Việc Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ
rel-5db5478dabf21c16d28b8330e4a22453.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for the delay in accepting the fulfillment of an obligation.

rel-9a671782ec12c63916ef240926d9bb18.tgt_id: Trách Nhiệm Do Không Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Giao Vật
rel-9a671782ec12c63916ef240926d9bb18.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for not fulfilling an obligation to deliver a specific item.

rel-ece91cc4b4cb14f0ca120a332d047b85.tgt_id: Trách Nhiệm Do Chậm Thực Hiện Nghĩa Vụ Trả Tiền
rel-ece91cc4b4cb14f0ca120a332d047b85.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ is responsible for delaying the payment of money.

rel-4caf7a8a200c7f8e9cc3927b7bb53de2.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ must pay interest on delayed payments.

rel-85ad639db53e764b7df4f6ff2977f9a8.description: Bên Có Nghĩa Vụ deposits collateral as part of the ký quỹ process to ensure the fulfillment of their obligations.

rel-ed9fdab68bd45cc3d24d2b49bb46f1d0.description: The transfer of the right to demand is related to the party with the obligation.

rel-d2ba2c4cd2926f897e9dcec6ac33cb0b.description: Bên Có Quyền receives financial protection and compensation through the ký quỹ process if the other party fails to fulfill their obligations.

rel-15e749d91a6964294b0abc8daee4a074.description: The transfer of the right to demand is related to the party with the right.

rel-16271483eec80fd174ae9a3efc333dbc.description: Quyền Hưởng Dụng grants the right to the user to exploit and benefit from the utility and income of another's property.<SEP>Người Hưởng Dụng has the right to use a property and is entitled to the benefits derived from it.

rel-03e52537d7d62e3b838e545ad651a0e3.description: Bất Động Sản is the real estate property that can be subject to the right of use.

rel-31c42f29449b28359a92f0a1a73ad8c6.description: Điều 257 defines the right of use.

rel-c5387968ddcf27faadc71418af5fab6d.description: Đиều 258 establishes the basis for the right of use.

rel-174ab414cd53e88400ae8641425e6b24.description: Đиều 259 defines the effectiveness of the right of use.

rel-675e07ca74009bc5c07650710d1faff2.description: Đиều 260 specifies the duration of the right of use.

rel-68012e389e5a94bdb7611391d4abf17d.description: Điều 259 defines the effectiveness of the right of use.

rel-f8ba6d0cccc8e5c66ec40d54b02e6f22.description: Điều 260 specifies the duration of the right of use.

rel-d93c25b962c5a729ea55515a790ee534.description: Đиều 261 outlines the rights of the user.

rel-332cf1ee6d055876485df727836a8e94.description: Đиều 262 outlines the obligations of the user.

rel-ee84c64ec4de8a73a7596dbdcb3b6ebe.description: Điều 261 outlines the rights of the user.

rel-78dc64d4098b9317dd3d52ac489b7d38.description: Điều 262 outlines the obligations of the user.

rel-cb6ed5cd018706918024583e6f11d38c.description: Người Hưởng Dụng has the right to own the benefits and profits derived from the property.

rel-83ed0e1f005f540feaab9c9be52deec0.description: Điều 256 outlines the conditions under which rights to adjacent real estate are terminated.

rel-67b809e3c848548533173d70ece3770b.description: The applicable law for inheritance involving real estate is determined by the law of the country where the real estate is located.

rel-78bb1e6ba49a919bd9c089f03210fc57.description: An alternative agreement may override the invalid terms in a contract drafted by the drafting party.

rel-3d904c2028baa2053648ccb7f305e380.description: Bên Mua may be entitled to interest on late payments according to the agreed-upon interest rate.

rel-56511896a4530cc1306346641d978a9c.description: Bên Bán may be required to pay interest on late payments according to the agreed-upon interest rate.

rel-1cc449ac9742fec8c8c97a27272b7d9b.description: In a Hợp Đồng Vay Tài Sản, the interest rate agreed upon is subject to a maximum limit of 20% per year unless otherwise specified by law.

rel-d1fc8077c0fa40d74cb5fe192cf598ab.description: Đиều 468 defines the interest rate in a lending contract.

rel-374f44787960c99f99ac6fc499e286ca.description: Chủ Thể Quyền Bề Mặt has the right to use the surface of the land, water, and airspace above the land and water that belongs to another entity.<SEP>Chủ Thể Quyền Bề Mặt holds the rights associated with the surface of land, water, and airspace.

rel-f4527451922cb4e0bcdadd1ea1c8cb6c.description: Quyền Bề Mặt can be established based on a legal document such as a Di Chúc.

rel-ba69043c352cab06dc7bb0862551a06e.tgt_id: Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
rel-ba69043c352cab06dc7bb0862551a06e.description: Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất can transfer the right to use the surface of the land, water, and airspace above the land and water to another entity.

rel-fa92ae5bddc4d7a8af98c61ed13326ae.tgt_id: Chủ Thể Có Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
rel-fa92ae5bddc4d7a8af98c61ed13326ae.description: When the rights of the surface are transferred, the recipient inherits the rights according to the conditions and extent of the transferred rights.

rel-0aba4b2822d526428a76403175f4f9d8.description: A person who possesses another's property without legal basis must return any income or profits derived from it.

rel-f0a5cdf655038e9ac245c8cf454df632.description: A person who uses another's property without legal basis must return any income or profits derived from it.

rel-09611d47f4852843ad1024f32f38f934.tgt_id: Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
rel-09611d47f4852843ad1024f32f38f934.description: Chủ Thể Quyền Sử Dụng Đất has the right to use land.

rel-ce165ba73d63afeae89e7b08868770ef.tgt_id: Hợp Đồng Về Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
rel-ce165ba73d63afeae89e7b08868770ef.description: Hợp đồng về quyền sử dụng đất involves transferring or granting quyền sử dụng đất to another party.

rel-a4a5a5570931aaa78afeddbafe9e3137.description: Di chúc is created by Người lập di chúc to distribute their assets after death.<SEP>Người lập di chúc is the creator of a will, a legal document specifying asset distribution.

rel-b8b73c7c6456f5a1a83d0a9670052042.description: Người làm chứng is a witness to the creation of a will, contributing to its legal validation.

rel-c2b7310b05d97d0b4e1baf65b0e4d93a.description: The will can designate organizations as beneficiaries.

rel-bc80e065d384aa051cad48519cc1ff19.description: The will takes effect at the time of inheritance distribution.

rel-45cd944d66209735be09d1421c61ed0c.description: The will specifies the distribution of the estate.

rel-b77ef758c604e3ffcc1a955039e6faaf.tgt_id: Thời Hiệu Yêu Cầu Chia Di Sản
rel-b77ef758c604e3ffcc1a955039e6faaf.description: The period during which claims for the division of the estate can be made is relevant to the will's legal effect.

rel-1cdba0efa06d9344c6e179fa838a9d61.tgt_id: Di Chúc Bị Thất Lạc, Hư Hại
rel-1cdba0efa06d9344c6e179fa838a9d61.description: The event where a will is lost or damaged to the point where it cannot be fully understood affects the will's validity.

rel-bf522ef7825d767c9ab7aa9219c7ca80.description: The legal validity and enforceability of a will are determined by its effectiveness.

rel-62a7b5ab16cb3949c8fc37bb1b5d179f.tgt_id: Người Thừa Kế Không Là Cá Nhân
rel-62a7b5ab16cb3949c8fc37bb1b5d179f.description: Di Chúc determines the distribution of inheritance to Người Thừa Kế Không Là Cá Nhân.

rel-796f9b3c52799665032bc52067bf6625.tgt_id: Tổ chức hành nghề công chứng
rel-796f9b3c52799665032bc52067bf6625.description: Tổ chức hành nghề công chứng can store and validate wills.

rel-62ae6ea9102f1eb07ded2f10c3f50206.description: Công chứng viên is responsible for authenticating and validating wills.

rel-31d461bb293df44f38dc30f152ec96dd.description: The estate specified in the Di Chúc must settle the financial obligations of the deceased.

rel-1385757a0bd394352049f4f4f561c6c3.description: The person responsible for dividing the estate according to the terms of the will.

rel-643582bd975e3491b7479acf6c334a8f.description: The person who left the estate and created the will.

rel-955dac1f99c95c1bc3274bc170c47fb4.description: The legal capacity to create, modify, or revoke a di chúc is determined by the law of the country where the testator had citizenship at the time of the action.

rel-2f50218aad02af6aeb32dc993b62576c.description: The form of a di chúc is determined by the law of the country where the di chúc is made.

rel-370dd91e93c5acce4f4da97f2c34314f.description: Bên thế chấp has the right to use and manage the collateral asset, subject to certain conditions.<SEP>Bên thế chấp uses their own property as collateral to secure an obligation.

rel-3b76d6db77596874c032069cf791f0ad.description: Điều 299 outlines the conditions under which the collateral asset can be processed.

rel-b716459febb12fb10246480f249df989.description: Bên nhận thế chấp receives the property as collateral for an obligation.

rel-4e1c9e9cae26fd21c6a36b7362f3540a.description: Điều 317 defines the concept of using property as collateral.

rel-e538c869ae26506d669c50c10eec2fd2.description: Điều 318 specifies the details of what constitutes collateral property.

rel-dced3cde9f3fc5a39af0287b827550d6.description: Điều 319 describes the effectiveness of the pledge agreement involving the collateral property.

rel-b2a99c9863101e4c91c2c1577f360c14.description: Tổ chức bảo hiểm provides insurance for the collateral property.
