rel-b8fee50e6864d949459a8b48bbd54afd.description: Đиều 419 defines the compensation for damages resulting from a breach of contract, including the right to claim compensation for the benefits that would have been received from the contract and the right to claim compensation for costs incurred due to the breach, affecting the party that is responsible for fulfilling the terms of the contract.

rel-febf730af7f77c0fec296d4003efb4b0.description: Đиều 419 defines the compensation for damages resulting from a breach of contract, including the right to claim compensation for the benefits that would have been received from the contract and the right to claim compensation for costs incurred due to the breach, affecting the party that has the right to claim compensation.

rel-8dd25f9526b19a114849139e99a4fadc.description: Điều 417 ensures that a contract for the benefit of a third party cannot be modified or canceled without the third party's consent, which is related to the concept of penalties for contract violations.

rel-a8a7e23dd71525a2187eea1c4e3c4b42.description: Điều 419 defines the compensation for damages resulting from a breach of contract, including the right to claim compensation for the benefits that would have been received from the contract and the right to claim compensation for costs incurred due to the breach.

rel-3fdd45507d2c45d39056a47d7971b359.description: Điều 420 addresses the execution of a contract when there is a fundamental change in circumstances, including the conditions for such a change and the rights of the affected party to renegotiate or terminate the contract.

rel-6e1a20b6b2b21f8992e4fffe1182c2fc.description: Điều 418 outlines the agreement on penalties for contract violations, including the amount of the penalty and the conditions under which the penalty is applied.

rel-f56e665b0dd5838b2e28874dc6bddc6b.description: Bên Đề Nghị can receive a notification of acceptance of the proposal to enter into a contract.

rel-ad19ebf85ba6d57c916a431025311c29.description: Article 362 of the Civil Code outlines the obligation to prevent and limit damages.

rel-c6016992641db187316c79ce5c504a18.description: Article 363 of the Civil Code outlines the compensation for damages when the party being violated is at fault.

rel-1ae9d737718831ad6782ad568c5c824c.description: Fault in civil liability is related to the transfer of the right to demand.

rel-4f9ba83851aa561ac8eaafc8d32aafa9.description: Article 364 of the Civil Code defines fault in civil liability, including intentional and unintentional fault.

rel-73cf0e5393610b029250905f81c9052d.description: The transfer of the right to demand is related to the substitute party.

rel-acb6bb7892aff2abd447422c9e261ee8.description: Article 365 of the Civil Code outlines the transfer of the right to demand to a substitute party according to an agreement.

rel-b4dae6b0b0b084e5c2ef89cd11894355.description: Đиều 428 also considers other related laws that may impact the responsibilities and rights of the parties in a contract.

rel-41d47cf1581226adf143ff455fade391.description: Điều 406 provides the legal framework for Điều kiện giao dịch chung.

rel-852cc7499a12f0cc40f0e1d79201a854.description: Điều 407 provides the legal framework for Hợp đồng vô hiệu.

rel-478d8e108f6a3f6fb85b8ce6f45901a7.tgt_id: Đối Tượng Không Thể Thực Hiện Được
rel-478d8e108f6a3f6fb85b8ce6f45901a7.description: If the subject matter of a contract cannot be performed, the contract is invalid.

rel-45bb27c842c83c522856235f187f1489.tgt_id: Ngôn Từ Sử Dụng Trong Hợp Đồng
rel-45bb27c842c83c522856235f187f1489.description: When there is a conflict between the mutual intent of the parties and the language used in the contract, the mutual intent is used to interpret the contract.

rel-c282cc801cdc3d0c2999300022afc9d2.description: If the drafting party includes terms that are disadvantageous to the other party, the interpretation of the contract must favor the other party.

rel-a2a66710e8038cb6e0c02ea466db8847.description: The drafting party may face a disadvantage when interpreting unclear or unfavorable contract terms.

rel-4f71adbccc91fe310c6029aafb9fc71e.description: The drafting party's attempt to include an exemption from liability is not valid if it increases the responsibility or removes the legitimate rights of the other party.

rel-98668fc1e52fef3e2f8c4e99e0bfc9db.description: The drafting party's attempt to increase the responsibility of the other party is not valid if it removes the legitimate rights of the other party.

rel-79fd8fca23c5366a6c2397fd57f73acd.tgt_id: Loại Bỏ Quyền Lợi Chính Đáng
rel-79fd8fca23c5366a6c2397fd57f73acd.description: The drafting party's attempt to remove the legitimate rights of the other party is not valid if it increases the responsibility or removes the legitimate rights of the other party.

rel-bb8b712b7d9f2f0bdfcffb5d829a96f9.description: If the drafting party knows or should know that the contract's subject matter cannot be performed but does not inform the other party, they must compensate for the damages.

rel-a661d6eb0d43d5986c4dd4e24338d76a.description: Bên Sử Dụng Dịch Vụ can request compensation for damages if the service provider breaches the agreement.

rel-aba60194e81bf5fcda14c776740df368.description: Bên Cung Ứng Dịch Vụ can request compensation for damages if the service user breaches the agreement.

rel-c1b7fe81bdc1c12dbf01b526426adfad.description: Nghĩa Vụ Giao Vật ceases in the event of Phá Sản according to the Bankruptcy Law.

rel-53ea706ed4d5d6541bfd26df82e82ac3.description: The Hợp Đồng Mua Bán includes the agreed-upon Phương Thức Thanh Toán for the transaction.

rel-a7274f3d07dbef3196eaa2fdcc34d072.description: The Hợp Đồng Mua Bán specifies the agreed-upon Thời Gian Thanh Toán for the transaction.

rel-5a9df49aa632712ce6ba68075dda426a.description: The Hợp Đồng Mua Bán includes the agreed-upon Địa Điểm Giao Tài Sản for the transaction.

rel-65150952254e3d09cbcaa74a1ff893a8.description: The Hợp Đồng Mua Bán specifies the agreed-upon Phương Thức Giao Tài Sản for the transaction.

rel-898c54899d68b7198acae41c82238c27.description: The Hợp Đồng Mua Bán outlines the responsibilities and rights of the parties when the quantity of Tài Sản delivered does not match the agreed-upon quantity.

rel-f66fdc2ffeddcf2c45ae063da7ff77ff.description: The Hợp Đồng Mua Bán outlines the responsibilities and rights of the parties when the delivered items are not complete or synchronized as required.

rel-99de2bbd35fe7429658ab4ab738c320a.description: The price of the Tài Sản is determined by the Giá Thị Trường when there is no clear agreement between the parties.

rel-5da9a43649889f97fb9b2f462d154d8b.description: Tiền Dịch Vụ is determined based on the market price of similar services at the time and location of the contract if not specified in the agreement.

rel-a3086c4f8f8c52f3b9355554804683ef.description: Bên bán is responsible for transferring ownership and related rights to the buyer.

rel-71e61252d40898526c61dca37969adbd.description: Bên bán may guarantee the debtor's ability to pay.

rel-2991f920b29a8d7de69ab3d852962ffd.description: Bên bán has the right to reclaim the sold property during the redemption period.

rel-df67cf3d3e12eca80466979bc5b87bd6.description: Bên dùng thử is not responsible for normal wear and tear caused by the use of the item during the trial period.

rel-569ad32515ed4cc35b31cdd2d9219dbd.description: Đиều 412 allows for the retention of assets in dual-party contracts.

rel-c70d2abd90116f07ddd15ad4d5874a66.description: Đиều 502 outlines the form and procedures for implementing land use rights contracts, ensuring they comply with legal regulations.

rel-18d7333f8afc07536b6af8d09f78381c.description: Đиều 504 defines the cooperative contract as an agreement between individuals or legal entities to contribute assets and labor for a specific task, share profits, and assume responsibilities.

rel-f6b9740d01babb54ca69cf8def8319cc.description: Đиều 505 details the content of a cooperative contract, including purposes, duration, names and addresses of individuals, assets contributed, labor contributions, profit-sharing methods, rights and obligations of members, and conditions for joining and leaving the contract.

rel-ba288f9575c18cb1ef7f0efa153d9dac.description: Đиều 506 describes the common property of cooperative members, including assets contributed, jointly created, and other assets as per the law, and the conditions for disposing of these assets.

rel-11147a3af792237971a494816dbc9837.description: Đиều 508 specifies the establishment and execution of civil transactions, either by a representative or collectively by the members.

rel-e59fdb77c5f6a42ddb9c07627d1c0c0b.description: Đиều 473 outlines the requirement for a reasonable time period in the determination of rental prices in leasing contracts.

rel-7f2c2f86a6f1d3da8ab4b17b627d0d65.description: Đиều 474 outlines the requirement for a reasonable time period in the determination of lease terms in leasing contracts.

rel-10f7aa9c0dbf95c900251b0a27a26e03.description: Đиều 475 outlines the requirement for a reasonable time period in the conditions under which a lessee can sublease the property they have leased.

rel-056298a800bdfb32bfd60a723eabca3c.tgt_id: Tiếp Tục Hợp Đồng Dịch Vụ
rel-056298a800bdfb32bfd60a723eabca3c.description: The Hợp Đồng Dịch Vụ automatically continues if the service is still being provided and the service user does not object after the initial term.

rel-83cf08ae7755d15a2df75545160e9b51.src_id: Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách
rel-83cf08ae7755d15a2df75545160e9b51.description: Bên vận chuyển is responsible for transporting passengers and luggage as per the terms of the Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách.<SEP>Bên vận chuyển has specific obligations under the Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách, including the responsibility to transport passengers safely and deliver luggage.

rel-5fff52e1ee92fbde5a745b341072f474.src_id: Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách
rel-5fff52e1ee92fbde5a745b341072f474.description: Hành khách is the party that uses the transportation service and is required to pay the transportation fee as per the terms of the Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách.<SEP>Hành khách has rights under the Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách, including the right to receive luggage at the agreed location and time.

rel-c3db64af3668197d06506dc5bc4b0717.src_id: Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách
rel-c3db64af3668197d06506dc5bc4b0717.description: Điều 522 defines the Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách and outlines the terms of the contract.

rel-50eb1d88280ae913d59e866dd4a2711a.src_id: Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách
rel-50eb1d88280ae913d59e866dd4a2711a.description: Điều 523 outlines the forms in which the Hợp đồng vận chuyển hành khách can be established.

rel-1d91cfbb64e84a9c855838004710df70.description: Bên vận chuyển is responsible for transporting and returning luggage to the passenger or the authorized recipient at the agreed-upon location and time.

rel-5c9f41cb5a690057750944d795017b81.description: Bên vận chuyển issues Vé as evidence of the contract between the carrier and the passenger.

rel-a3b1379de607feb15acdf1067fde739c.description: Bên vận chuyển uses Phương tiện vận chuyển to transport passengers and luggage to the agreed-upon destination.

rel-e8a89c34899ba7c4700a69d233a43b24.description: Điều 524 details the obligations of the Bên vận chuyển in providing the transportation service.

rel-ee3d0914787a884d6839a60cbe66e7be.description: Điều 525 details the rights of the Bên vận chuyển in providing the transportation service.

rel-b2568720c802311727636a78dedf9990.description: Bên vận chuyển provides transportation services to Hành khách and is liable for damages to the passenger's life, health, and luggage.

rel-40c72d353088634b36e48b721882b928.tgt_id: Hợp đồng vận chuyển tài sản
rel-40c72d353088634b36e48b721882b928.description: Bên vận chuyển has specific obligations under the Hợp đồng vận chuyển tài sản, including the responsibility to transport goods safely and deliver them to the agreed location.

rel-931d81a6a9f561c07feec69550dad82a.tgt_id: Bảo hiểm trách nhiệm dân sự
rel-931d81a6a9f561c07feec69550dad82a.description: Bên vận chuyển is required to purchase Bảo hiểm trách nhiệm dân sự as a legal obligation to cover civil liability for damages caused during transportation.

rel-3a327ebfa59fdcb6bdc96bbc577c5b51.description: Điều 526 details the obligations of the Hành khách in using the transportation service.

rel-980530f22c678c4d74b817cec5b29977.description: Điều 527 details the rights of the Hành khách in using the transportation service.

rel-9c865c7742052bf0b12795eae1237a23.description: Bên Gửi is responsible for paying for the storage and labor costs when retrieving assets from Bên Nhận Giữ Tài Sản.

rel-277ceeb000b3c8e9138cbe2621191a91.description: Bên Gửi must pay the agreed-upon compensation when retrieving the stored assets, as per the terms of the Hợp Đồng Ủy Quyền.

rel-24905064b8258647aa027c7bdf2040fd.description: Điều 561 specifies the legal obligation of Bên Gửi to pay compensation when retrieving stored assets.

rel-5e4a07d146818ff44be21f52291f5111.description: Điều 562 defines the legal framework for the Hợp Đồng Ủy Quyền.

rel-4d8c9234eec02019a13a114dac401061.description: Bên Ủy Quyền is involved in the Hợp Đồng Ủy Quyền, which defines the terms and conditions of the authority granted.

rel-6f50647ad746f70dbd20858b1f54d497.description: Bên Được Ủy Quyền is involved in the Hợp Đồng Ủy Quyền, which defines the terms and conditions of the authority granted.

rel-24f836406a1d24626463c3fb217590a2.description: Bên Ủy Quyền authorizes Bên Được Ủy Quyền to perform tasks on their behalf as per the Hợp Đồng Ủy Quyền.<SEP>Bên Ủy Quyền grants authority to Bên Được Ủy Quyền to perform certain tasks and is responsible for providing necessary information, documents, and means.

rel-eaf9fd1d8869cfb5c1ea807883832150.description: Điều 568 outlines the rights of Bên Ủy Quyền, including the right to request reports and the right to compensation for damages.

rel-780c9d6cdf9f3fd1c25e64ee37e8f4e1.description: Điều 569 describes the unilateral termination of the authority contract by Bên Ủy Quyền, with conditions for notice and compensation.

rel-6e31f1a6cba3413d8eb4e7ede2eb2eb3.description: Điều 569 describes the unilateral termination of the authority contract by Bên Được Ủy Quyền, with conditions for notice and compensation.

rel-e4474a645c3ee3709a6fdf9f2cc447cd.description: Điều 563 specifies the legal duration of authorization in a contract.

rel-477670a1a6fd38f7e7b06cd8aa72d13a.description: Điều 564 outlines the legal conditions under which re-authorization is permitted.

rel-1c373101f1a835c104ba1cad9595bc44.tgt_id: Quyền Của Bên Được Ủy Quyền
rel-1c373101f1a835c104ba1cad9595bc44.description: Điều 566 defines the legal rights of the authorized party.

rel-13140b94f39adf84a2b314e4b8bdc7b6.tgt_id: Nghĩa Vụ Của Bên Ủy Quyền
rel-13140b94f39adf84a2b314e4b8bdc7b6.description: Điều 567 defines the legal obligations of the authorizing party.

rel-e28971da2281216ab5ff6da519a4cc78.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Của Bên Được Ủy Quyền
rel-e28971da2281216ab5ff6da519a4cc78.description: Điều 565 defines the legal obligations of the authorized party.

rel-91b07983baafb97398fb32964172cf01.description: Bên Vận Chuyển is responsible for delivering the Tài Sản to Bên Nhận Tài Sản as agreed.

rel-617523ebcc91c656e065a31789927de0.description: Bên Vận Chuyển can verify the authenticity of the Tài Sản using the Vận Đơn.

rel-b7f6eb09a5570a1a13e44def350a0424.description: Bên Thuê Vận Chuyển must pay the transportation fees to Bên Vận Chuyển as agreed in the contract.<SEP>Bên Vận Chuyển has the right to require payment of transportation fees from Bên Thuê Vận Chuyển.

rel-a2306fec846fed8bb5bfddd8a5043c6c.description: Bên Vận Chuyển is responsible for managing the Chi Phí associated with the transportation of assets.

rel-39b3df5ac3e4175f6d1e9e64e7134dd8.description: Bên Thuê Vận Chuyển can designate a third party as Bên Nhận Tài Sản to receive the Tài Sản.

rel-94cfc1ccaa738960e9dc288f36cafaf9.description: Bên Thuê Vận Chuyển is responsible for paying the Chi Phí associated with the transportation of assets.

rel-c9ab3afedc4c238d33c12a9ea09c1771.description: Bên Nhận Tài Sản must present the Vận Đơn to receive the Tài Sản.

rel-fa5677614bdcc30e837647ca5c90af01.description: Bên Đặt Gia Công is responsible for paying the processing fee according to the terms of the Hợp Đồng Gia Công.

rel-ceb2f6291760b71d8b02ba978868e93d.description: Bên Đặt Gia Công is responsible for accepting the finished product and paying for it according to the contract.

rel-c9fdb224344e9fdaf8e86ddc09a41f36.description: Bên Đạt Gia Công assumes the risk for the raw materials or finished products if they are the owner of the materials.

rel-86b3e9611ca55f00d3e67c358cca4af2.tgt_id: Chậm Giao, Chậm Nhận Sản Phẩm Gia Công
rel-86b3e9611ca55f00d3e67c358cca4af2.description: Bên Đạt Gia Công must pay for the storage costs if they delay accepting the finished product.

rel-a402f99c34e6520e1801842851ac4aef.tgt_id: Đơn Phương Chấm Dứt Thực Hiện Hợp Đồng Gia Công
rel-a402f99c34e6520e1801842851ac4aef.description: Bên Đạt Gia Công can unilaterally terminate the contract and must pay for the work done.

rel-00d96fa1a8f26445df79ed6190a34f90.description: Bên Đạt Gia Công is obligated to pay the processing fee when receiving the finished product.

rel-fc040c139b1fecf5e8e4ccc784f75a75.description: Bên Đạt Gia Công is responsible for the settlement and return of remaining raw materials when the contract ends.

rel-6ba6e0f16bd691ebc88cd23789d0478f.tgt_id: Hợp Đồng Gửi Giữ Tài Sản
rel-6ba6e0f16bd691ebc88cd23789d0478f.description: Bên Đạt Gia Công can enter into a Hợp Đồng Gửi Giữ Tài Sản for safekeeping of assets.

rel-17174dca244dca8ac57d80942e90e27a.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công is responsible for performing the processing work as specified in the Hợp Đồng Gia Công.

rel-0ae92d10a78b9dc2003409d2963d5a59.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công is responsible for creating and delivering the finished product to the other party.

rel-a7cda42b47909f2453616c6f49edf368.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công assumes the risk for the finished product if they delay the delivery.

rel-b81c26aaea6808db0bbbcbcc9de352ae.tgt_id: Chậm Giao, Chậm Nhận Sản Phẩm Gia Công
rel-b81c26aaea6808db0bbbcbcc9de352ae.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công must deliver the finished product and may face termination if they delay the delivery.

rel-311c4b9cd4b625483d11cae165a1f9a0.tgt_id: Đơn Phương Chấm Dứt Thực Hiện Hợp Đồng Gia Công
rel-311c4b9cd4b625483d11cae165a1f9a0.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công can unilaterally terminate the contract but must compensate for any losses caused.

rel-84498a32c408169594749315485f53a5.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công receives the processing fee when the finished product is accepted.

rel-17530b50467469e0ef2d2973b1748ac3.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công returns the remaining raw materials to the other party when the contract ends.

rel-87a26f48661d51be6e4ef42265e6c724.tgt_id: Hợp Đồng Gửi Giữ Tài Sản
rel-87a26f48661d51be6e4ef42265e6c724.description: Bên Nhận Gia Công can enter into a Hợp Đồng Gửi Giữ Tài Sản for safekeeping of assets.

rel-aaf6b498404a71e90fa40f7c71f72905.src_id: Hợp Đồng Gửi Giữ Tài Sản
rel-aaf6b498404a71e90fa40f7c71f72905.description: Điều 554 specifies the legal provision for the terms of a contract for the safekeeping of assets.

rel-e1d7ee8c6b2ef05a096ff7507774d43a.description: Điều 548 specifies the legal provision for the assumption of risks associated with raw materials or finished products.

rel-3edf71c732c15e7ad89855ce023b8d55.src_id: Chậm Giao, Chậm Nhận Sản Phẩm Gia Công
rel-3edf71c732c15e7ad89855ce023b8d55.description: Điều 550 specifies the legal provision for the consequences of delays in the delivery or acceptance of the finished product.

rel-92f5e855cb7bfea2de5182bdfb5f27df.src_id: Đơn Phương Chấm Dứt Thực Hiện Hợp Đồng Gia Công
rel-92f5e855cb7bfea2de5182bdfb5f27df.description: Điều 551 specifies the legal provision for the unilateral termination of the processing contract.

rel-014d6407cd55a75252dd20f8a90bd82f.description: Điều 552 specifies the legal provision for the payment of the processing fee.

rel-f9b30e7b7bb06b1674e604f17b9e21f6.description: Điều 553 specifies the legal provision for the settlement and return of remaining raw materials when the contract ends.

rel-8b514e93eb4d336fbbb11de1fe014857.tgt_id: Giao, Nhận Sản Phẩm Gia Công
rel-8b514e93eb4d336fbbb11de1fe014857.description: Điều 549 specifies the legal provision for the delivery and acceptance of the finished product.

rel-009b066e1c554c1ce040904b20ab5302.description: Thành viên hợp tác have rights and obligations defined in the Hợp đồng hợp tác, including the conditions for joining, leaving, and the dissolution of the cooperative.

rel-7f8b78dc71e8d0878f8e8f1ca523041a.description: Thành viên hợp tác are responsible for the civil liabilities of the cooperative using the Tài sản chung, and if the Tài sản chung is insufficient, they must use their Tài sản riêng.

rel-d585f0dd5e108173595a803ef94333d9.description: Thành viên hợp tác may use their Tài sản riêng to fulfill the cooperative's obligations if the Tài sản chung is insufficient.

rel-a85e44deed38b4d4f2fc1cee8725856f.description: Điều 509 outlines the civil liability of Thành viên hợp tác.

rel-e36119fa1263929a9c5c8a7b4475bfa9.description: Điều 510 outlines the conditions under which Thành viên hợp tác can leave the cooperative.

rel-e16a1405c5fdc16499b860109d6b9707.description: Điều 511 outlines the conditions under which a new member can join the cooperative.

rel-977fa61769a87d9bb8d5958026ccc7e2.description: Điều 512 outlines the conditions under which the Hợp Đồng Hợp Tác can be terminated.

rel-2244db85ecfdbc7a5a6a504c11ef5e73.description: Bên cung ứng dịch vụ performs work for the service user as defined in the Hợp đồng dịch vụ.

rel-dd59f4b03c3ec3e610de2fcb544d02c9.description: Bên sử dụng dịch vụ receives services and pays for them as defined in the Hợp đồng dịch vụ.

rel-92eef0c7097924250e7db96568be1298.description: Điều 513 defines what a Hợp Đồng Dịch Vụ is.

rel-e6b53fa622a522db7d01d57eb033338f.tgt_id: Đơn Phương Chấm Dứt Hợp Đồng
rel-e6b53fa622a522db7d01d57eb033338f.description: Either party can unilaterally terminate the Hợp Đồng Dịch Vụ under certain conditions.

rel-d555730f86ed7d029a7b98ce175ce074.description: Bên cung ứng dịch vụ provides services to Bên sử dụng dịch vụ, and Bên sử dụng dịch vụ pays for the services.<SEP>Bên Sử Dụng Dịch Vụ can request the service provider to perform the service according to the agreed quality, quantity, time frame, location, and other terms.

rel-fd781f955698c511c44a5f558b359586.description: Bên Cung Ứng Dịch Vụ must maintain the confidentiality of information obtained during the service.

rel-305b6aa8d251f8bd541937d8b6d10641.description: Bên Cung Ứng Dịch Vụ can request payment from the service user according to the agreement.

rel-d72b862187411907539503a2226047e0.tgt_id: Thông Tin, Tài Liệu, Phương Tiện
rel-d72b862187411907539503a2226047e0.description: Bên Cung Ứng Dịch Vụ receives information, documents, and means from the service user to facilitate the service.

rel-644ab9fbf9d7c3b948e22398f2908a8a.description: Đиều 515 outlines the obligations of the Bên Sử Dụng Dịch Vụ in a service contract.

rel-3591ef28bb9be4f2c8d3141e04b8df67.description: Bên Sử Dụng Dịch Vụ must pay the service provider according to the agreement.

rel-bd24598af6f51f583f9d7a130eada26a.tgt_id: Thông Tin, Tài Liệu, Phương Tiện
rel-bd24598af6f51f583f9d7a130eada26a.description: Bên Sử Dụng Dịch Vụ must provide information, documents, and means to the service provider as per the agreement.

rel-a36c76ebd41607196da31ac9d6020aeb.description: Bên Thuê Khoán is responsible for using the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán as agreed in the lease agreement.

rel-169dd433f58e9f547ea63f14ec6e0fd2.description: Bên Thuê Khoán is bound by the terms of the Hợp Đồng Thuê Khoán, including payment and use of the leased property.

rel-eddc0131e872fdff63209977246c9448.description: Bên Thuê Khoán may also be involved in a Hợp Đồng Mượn Tài Sản, where they borrow property for use without payment.

rel-a5c2426ef10d5d99fb9fa5600f0898f1.description: Bên Thuê Khoán must report the condition of the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán to the Bên Cho Thuê Khoán periodically.

rel-295ff2e97637a1d874a7e3f054c5b17c.tgt_id: Bảo Quản, Bảo Dưỡng Tài Sản Thuê Khoán
rel-295ff2e97637a1d874a7e3f054c5b17c.description: Bên Thuê Khoán is responsible for maintaining and preserving the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán at their own expense.

rel-4535116c0a35f693472b599b7b2e3e90.tgt_id: Hoa Lợi, Thiệt Hại Về Gia Súc Thuê Khoán
rel-4535116c0a35f693472b599b7b2e3e90.description: Bên Thuê Khoán shares profits and losses related to leased livestock with the Bên Cho Thuê Khoán.

rel-2ff6ba89c7daf40a1a5c821847302ab5.tgt_id: Đơn Phương Chấm Dứt Thực Hiện Hợp Đồng Thuê Khoán
rel-2ff6ba89c7daf40a1a5c821847302ab5.description: Bên Thuê Khoán may unilaterally terminate the lease agreement with a reasonable notice period.

rel-fb70a2010d7a68706aef89fa27a3fc41.description: Bên Thuê Khoán must return the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán in a condition consistent with the agreed-upon depreciation at the end of the lease.

rel-9e552a604d309ebe55a9bf2be3ddf049.description: Bên Cho Thuê Khoán owns the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán and is responsible for its management and maintenance.

rel-3f775c452ccafe7016007a76609fe844.description: Bên Cho Thuê K_cho Thuê Khoán is bound by the terms of the Hợp Đồng Thuê Khoán, including the proper use and return of the leased property.

rel-6bba844d9115171affbee547e99d1543.description: Bên Cho Thuê Khoán may also be involved in a Hợp Đồng Mượn Tài Sản, where they lend property for use without payment.

rel-2aceb3fe5095811683e027bae0fc7afa.description: Bên Cho Thuê Khoán monitors the condition of the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán as reported by the Bên Thuê Khoán.

rel-43bcd5bd80f5fb9f01a096b36ad9b57c.tgt_id: Bảo Quản, Bảo Dưỡng Tài Sản Thuê Khoán
rel-43bcd5bd80f5fb9f01a096b36ad9b57c.description: Bên Cho Thuê Khoán expects the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán to be maintained and preserved by the Bên Thuê Khoán.

rel-6a3e58dd0ed0a064d4bc933cddace8f2.tgt_id: Hoa Lợi, Thiệt Hại Về Gia Súc Thuê Khoán
rel-6a3e58dd0ed0a064d4bc933cddace8f2.description: Bên Cho Thuê Khoán shares profits and losses related to leased livestock with the Bên Thuê Khoán.

rel-72d9b90e33a286977ff368c1e65250f0.tgt_id: Đơn Phương Chấm Dứt Thực Hiện Hợp Đồng Thuê Khoán
rel-72d9b90e33a286977ff368c1e65250f0.description: Bên Cho Thuê Khoán may unilaterally terminate the lease agreement with a reasonable notice period.

rel-1cc9f6e1278748a3281eab6a395d204f.description: Bên Cho Thu_cho Thuê Khoán expects the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán to be returned in a condition consistent with the agreed-upon depreciation at the end of the lease.

rel-1546e4f669ff2b4f6e64bc742a77074a.description: The use and management of the Tài Sản Thuê Khoán are governed by the terms of the Hợp Đồng Thuê Khoán.

rel-8b02156890a008fd991ad22a9cce873d.description: Bên cho mượn is responsible for providing the tài sản under the terms of the Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-9cc3b3e32dfcef8401472b268397bd51.description: Bên mượn is responsible for using the tài sản and returning it according to the terms of the Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-571e0076917ad50476c5cac43c132c82.description: Điều 494 defines the legal framework and description of Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-f2b7dbe1fed51fa3dedbae6fd5e05fea.description: Điều 498 specifies the obligations of the Bên cho mượn in a Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-e0f0b6fb2553a83393f8648c5ab1fa5d.description: Điều 499 details the rights of the Bên cho mượn in a Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-7d42be2e794ba937d28f71a5a4bf9db0.description: Điều 496 outlines the obligations of the Bên mượn in a Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-63d5b1997aafe46978bf260da80e14a6.description: Điều 497 details the rights of the Bên mượn in a Hợp đồng mượn tài sản.

rel-6ec033af25bf371fb5746f52dc2102ee.src_id: Hợp Đồng Về Quyền Sử Dụng Đất
rel-6ec033af25bf371fb5746f52dc2102ee.description: Điều 500 defines the legal framework and description of Hợp đồng về quyền sử dụng đất.

rel-c4c21ac93c703fbad81f6dccce328d87.src_id: Hợp Đồng Về Quyền Sử Dụng Đất

rel-280d60a3b3526c0f0b90ab907413319e.description: Đиều 470 outlines scenarios involving disputes over interest rates in term loan contracts.

rel-6360dfc4a845ea6a9181c9901382cdc4.description: Vận đơn serves as evidence of the contract between the parties in the Hợp đồng vận chuyển tài sản.

rel-707abddd3bf23f9f88cd35a3fd751013.description: Bên thuê vận chuyển has the obligation to pay the Cước phí vận chuyển after the goods are loaded onto the transportation vehicle.

rel-3cf4ba7c9a45d1dc15c75b4570272011.description: In a Hợp Đồng Vay Tài Sản, the use of borrowed assets and the lender's right to inspect and demand return of the assets if used improperly are defined.

rel-e8a8a124a3a4275b5ae9fbbbfeac835a.description: Điều 463 defines the contract for lending assets.

rel-474b49ffa82365448bdcd6cd015384e9.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Của Bên Cho Vay
rel-474b49ffa82365448bdcd6cd015384e9.description: Điều 465 outlines the obligations of the lender in a lending contract.

rel-b29acf9fddd84662317175a5bf466249.src_id: Nghĩa Vụ Trả Nợ Của Bên Vay
rel-b29acf9fddd84662317175a5bf466249.description: Điều 466 outlines the repayment obligations of the borrower in a lending contract.

rel-fbd0e17095fc4169e48f39596c47747a.description: Điều 467 defines the use of borrowed assets and the lender's right to inspect and demand return of the assets if used improperly.

rel-178ea91f0e9961fdb79a3ede8490ed84.src_id: Người tổ chức các cuộc thi
rel-178ea91f0e9961fdb79a3ede8490ed84.description: The contest organizer must award the prize to the winner as announced.

rel-a56a818df7cd0f66251c53f2e3a196b7.src_id: Thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-a56a818df7cd0f66251c53f2e3a196b7.tgt_id: Người thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-a56a818df7cd0f66251c53f2e3a196b7.description: The person performing work without authorization has the obligation to perform the work in accordance with their abilities and conditions.

rel-69ffba50c251b57a4117e5a887bbc1b1.src_id: Thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-69ffba50c251b57a4117e5a887bbc1b1.description: Article 574 defines the concept of performing work without authorization.

rel-2005737ff5753ddfc45d30e31ed8c1ae.src_id: Thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-2005737ff5753ddfc45d30e31ed8c1ae.description: Article 578 defines the conditions under which the performance of work without authorization is terminated.

rel-7dd7359338ae5bad184aa4f7dc4f75af.src_id: Người thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-7dd7359338ae5bad184aa4f7dc4f75af.tgt_id: Người có công việc được thực hiện
rel-7dd7359338ae5bad184aa4f7dc4f75af.description: The person performing work without authorization must report the progress and results of the work to the person for whom the work is performed if requested.<SEP>The person for whom the work is performed must accept the work and pay reasonable expenses incurred by the person performing the work without authorization.

rel-27125bb19d9a424884d96f3c91dcd923.src_id: Người thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-27125bb19d9a424884d96f3c91dcd923.description: The person performing work without authorization must continue the work according to the conditions specified in Clause  5 of Article 575.

rel-bc88fdd2a606e00c7409f38befa4acc9.src_id: Người thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-bc88fdd2a606e00c7409f38befa4acc9.description: Article 575 outlines the obligations of the person performing work without authorization.

rel-2fdf7ac11188196ba4dec5cc29946b43.src_id: Người thực hiện công việc không có ủy quyền
rel-2fdf7ac11188196ba4dec5cc29946b43.description: Article 577 details the liability for damages when performing work without authorization.

rel-d987599fb6d69a7492272fb5413cc93e.src_id: Người có công việc được thực hiện
rel-d987599fb6d69a7492272fb5413cc93e.description: Article 576 specifies the payment obligations of the person for whom the work is performed.

rel-aba564282a7c69e3a631879d98a7bac9.description: Người Hứa Thưởng promises a reward to Người Thực Hiện Công Việc for completing a specific task.

rel-b42b6a6769e62b11c405d17fb9001a59.description: Điều 570 specifies the obligation of Người Hứa Thưởng to pay a reward to the party that completes the promised task.

rel-ca57133b290f6b8e3c4986e1e75da2bf.description: Điều 571 allows Người Hứa Thưởng to retract the promise of a reward before the deadline for starting the task.

rel-f9bb0dc4834b37b7c5b2b39d9a78057a.description: Điều 572 details the distribution of rewards to the party or parties that complete the promised task.

rel-f64f204f199a2d85fcaa553d45befbc0.description: Người Tổ Chức Thi is responsible for organizing competitions and awarding prizes to Người Đạt Giải.

rel-8dc1c23e39099c304d9f5d7cae9c318e.description: Điều 573 outlines the rules for organizing competitions, including the publication of conditions and prizes, and the rights of winners.

rel-69db3fa7933258b85f31c79703207ffb.description: Điều 573 outlines the rules for organizing competitions, including the publication of conditions and prizes, and the rights of winners.

rel-abb83c0d7fe08033ec3e3ca329cfc850.description: Người lập di chúc creates a written will, a legal document specifying asset distribution.

rel-65f9aee6ace9b901b70e028f8df63c91.description: Di Tặng is the act of allocating a portion of the estate by the deceased person as specified in their will.

rel-89fdde32e58281a6bceab16cfb027ff1.description: Người Lập Di Chúc creates an oral will, which must be authenticated by a notary or authorized body within 5 working days.

rel-bc2a89aa95da2f43955ce736632303ca.tgt_id: Di Chúc Bằng Văn Bản Không Có Người Làm Chứng
rel-bc2a89aa95da2f43955ce736632303ca.description: Người Lập Di Chúc creates and signs a written will without witnesses.

rel-f70e2239b03d24495b9a0fac94f3108c.tgt_id: Di Chúc Bằng Văn Bản Có Người Làm Chứng
rel-f70e2239b03d24495b9a0fac94f3108c.description: Người Lập Di Chúc creates a written will with at least two witnesses to attest to the authenticity of the signatures or marks.

rel-ae73f72bb913670f1133bc193853eb40.tgt_id: Di Chúc Có Công Chứng Hoặc Chứng Thực
rel-ae73f72bb913670f1133bc193853eb40.description: Người Lập Di Chúc creates a will that is authenticated by a notary or authorized body.

rel-104c5fdaca607cc16f7b146ca5d2f5be.description: Người Lập Di Chúc follows the process of creating and authenticating a di chúc, which can be done at a notary office or local government body.

rel-ad2eff2010073e870124bf1464465473.description: Người Lập Di Chúc must have their oral will authenticated within 5 working days.

rel-7adc4a160f6daa1cca448683d7e2a4f9.description: Người Lập Di Chúc must sign or mark the will to authenticate it.

rel-6382f3184d4e933c212c6579526898cd.description: Người Lập Di Chúc must sign or have a witness sign next to any alterations made to the will.

rel-6cdadd3175f04e854d134405c5af0845.description: The specific instance of a will is witnessed by individuals to ensure its legal validity.

rel-79b5cf83864ae1fdbf7e249ead127abe.tgt_id: Phiên Hợp Giải Quyết Tranh Chấp
rel-79b5cf83864ae1fdbf7e249ead127abe.description: Người Làm Chứng can be invited to participate in the Phiên Hợp Giải Quyết Tranh Chấp.

rel-d54daf5a085cf4d9e1bfb39f8330e32c.tgt_id: Di Sản Dùng Vào Việc Thờ Cúng
rel-d54daf5a085cf4d9e1bfb39f8330e32c.description: A portion of the estate is designated for religious purposes.

rel-0e803ad47a58def5759cbd53e12620b9.tgt_id: Người Thừa Kế Không Là Cá Nhân
rel-0e803ad47a58def5759cbd53e12620b9.description: Người Thừa Kế Không Là Cá Nhân inherits property according to a will.

rel-843017b4edf854814ee77c554d524ed5.src_id: Phần Di Sản Dùng Vào Việc Thờ Cúng
rel-843017b4edf854814ee77c554d524ed5.tgt_id: Người Quản Lý Di Sản Thờ Cúng
rel-843017b4edf854814ee77c554d524ed5.description: The portion of the estate designated for religious purposes is managed by a designated individual.

rel-127db6ea41d4c7b1f2b1a155c5556f18.description: The specific instance of a will requires signatures from the person giving it, the recipient, and at least two witnesses.

rel-28b969c50d3fa7b3876f80c91d2eaa0b.description: Di chúc hợp pháp is a legally valid Di chúc that meets all required conditions.

rel-73a8fc26c75f42c567bef7ce43af7765.description: Di chúc miệng is an emergency form of Di chúc made in oral form.

rel-e3dc56b1905736e6d78a8daa124b2a3d.description: Di chúc bằng văn bản is a written form of Di chúc that can be made with or without witnesses and may be notarized or authenticated.

rel-266ed4400a26aaa10283961aeeb091d0.description: Điều 624 defines Di chúc as a legal document expressing an individual's intent to transfer their assets to others after death.

rel-67c92c4331b476cc3b7f40258bf12e73.description: Đиều 627 specifies that a will must be in written form, unless it is an oral will made in emergency situations.

rel-dee0e1f44225aff6bfa6a247d6e8199e.tgt_id: Người có thẩm quyền chứng thực
rel-dee0e1f44225aff6bfa6a247d6e8199e.description: Người có thẩm quyền chứng thực is responsible for authenticating and validating wills.

rel-c4d4de7bf6d05d43db90886fd94c69c1.description: Quân nhân tại ngũ can have their will authenticated by their commanding officer.

rel-907e651856644df059da88642ef9122c.description: Người chỉ huy phương tiện can authenticate a will for someone on their vessel or aircraft.

rel-b0ad4318e9360a7c590d294627121222.description: Người phụ trách bệnh viện can authenticate a will for someone in their care.

rel-0feb15f123974cd806ce0e878a7fb792.description: Cơ quan lãnh sự can authenticate a will for a Vietnamese citizen abroad.

rel-4f34ab3b1281dd1ddac129d25fcd9be1.tgt_id: Đại diện ngoại giao Việt Nam
rel-4f34ab3b1281dd1ddac129d25fcd9be1.description: Đại diện ngoại giao Việt Nam can authenticate a will for a Vietnamese citizen abroad.

rel-be7e49598174f8164a92388002b7b826.description: Người đang bị tạm giam can have their will authenticated by the facility's responsible person.

rel-b04b8fa16a2cef98cc7b0906d7375dc9.tgt_id: Người đang chấp hành hình phạt tù
rel-b04b8fa16a2cef98cc7b0906d7375dc9.description: Người đang chấp hành hình phạt tù can have their will authenticated by the facility's responsible person.

rel-075505a2729dc0e294b3a7df5d317d36.tgt_id: Người đang chấp hành biện pháp xử lý hành chính
rel-075505a2729dc0e294b3a7df5d317d36.description: Người đang chấp hành biện pháp xử lý hành chính can have their will authenticated by the facility's responsible person.

rel-6b0af0c39d884ed2da7b30001933ec12.description: Người lập di chúc creates a Di chúc hợp pháp that meets all required conditions.

rel-da10c0b12d1678b48bb9d6a63d8f9e5a.description: Điều 625 outlines the conditions under which a person can create a will, including age and mental capacity requirements.

rel-53edd0dd6a270c54aed46bbf440e5f5b.description: Đиều 626 details the rights of the person creating a will, including the ability to designate heirs and assign specific portions of the estate.

rel-13822bceea0ae0239cb1f385801977d6.description: Người lập di chúc can amend their will by adding a portion that has legal effect.

rel-ccc8bdc59c329108b555d8dbbcc4f677.description: Người lập di chúc can replace their existing will with a new one.

rel-1b87f2b35d73557b0f2b4f68bbfe98f6.description: Người chết's estate includes their personal property and their share in jointly owned property.

rel-954f4b119e521174b77c3c45012ed4eb.description: Người quản lý di sản is responsible for managing the estate.<SEP>The person managing the estate has the duty to preserve and manage the estate.

rel-80a5ac7c138d38f2706da62cc03ea139.description: The person who left the estate is the owner of the estate and determines its inheritance.

rel-52d0a2f7bcee8d65c9fceb6d2ff884b7.description: Người làm chứng attests to the validity of a Di chúc miệng.

rel-48cd56cee53770a155fdbcd247119288.description: Hội đồng trọng tài has the authority to summon Người làm chứng to attend a hearing.

rel-32b7f5eb7a573d2fcf1d7e6355ed446a.description: Thẩm phán issues a summoning decision for Người làm chứng to attend a hearing.

rel-52d769ddd2bb0deb22aed70b0c879f60.description: Công chứng viên verifies and authenticates the signatures or marks of witnesses in a Di chúc miệng.

rel-fda28632cea3bbe4ed200b1d2ee33f07.description: Đиều 630 defines the conditions for a will to be considered legally valid, including the mental capacity of the person creating the will and the content of the will.

rel-c7f83aee506b466bc3ea301c2b6f8678.description: Đиều 629 outlines the conditions under which an oral will can be made and the process for validating it.

rel-b8efca0de92d43b2d03cefaa269ad07c.description: Đиều 628 describes the different forms of written wills, including those with and without witnesses, and those that are notarized or authenticated.

rel-d23ea1a6abea5ce431088d801a53ec0f.description: Chủ Sở Hữu Súc Vật is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Súc Vật.

rel-0277236468b8e0a0125c7f64e6b995e9.description: Chủ Sở Hữu Cây Cối is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Cây Cối.

rel-745d7d9e17e974e5c4ba96e9d37a0cb1.description: Người Chiếm Hữu Cây Cối is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Cây Cối.

rel-cb0243ca503ecb1086c9a837d87bb525.tgt_id: Người Được Giao Quản Lý Cây Cối
rel-cb0243ca503ecb1086c9a837d87bb525.description: Người Được Giao Quản Lý Cây Cối is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Cây Cối.

rel-a6d7f338e324974d29da0ecd4519ed0e.src_id: Chủ Sở Hữu Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-a6d7f338e324974d29da0ecd4519ed0e.tgt_id: Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-a6d7f338e324974d29da0ecd4519ed0e.description: Chủ Sở Hữu Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác.

rel-9ff24d98d62995abf3e68f7a6771eb96.src_id: Người Chiếm Hữu Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-9ff24d98d62995abf3e68f7a6771eb96.tgt_id: Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-9ff24d98d62995abf3e68f7a6771eb96.description: Người Chiếm Hữu Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác.

rel-b38377fc9040cfb48f98f5daf6226915.src_id: Người Được Giao Quản Lý, Sử Dụng Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-b38377fc9040cfb48f98f5daf6226915.tgt_id: Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-b38377fc9040cfb48f98f5daf6226915.description: Người Được Giao Quản Lý, Sử Dụng Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác.

rel-59969d8dea6b3f2711d1dac8a28bc1a5.tgt_id: Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác
rel-59969d8dea6b3f2711d1dac8a28bc1a5.description: Người Thi Công is responsible for compensating for any damage caused by Nhà Cửa, Công Trình Xây Dựng Khác during construction.

rel-ab40ec40ab1de5880871008fcf2a52bd.tgt_id: Cá Nhân, Pháp Nhân Sản Xuất, Kinh Doanh Hàng Hóa, Dịch Vụ
rel-ab40ec40ab1de5880871008fcf2a52bd.description: Cá Nhân, Pháp Nhân Sản Xuất, Kinh Doanh Hàng Hóa, Dịch Vụ is responsible for compensating for any damage caused to Người Tiêu Dùng.

rel-0376b8ebe4293fda7ccb4bc8b93d564f.description: Mức Lương Cơ Sở is used as a standard for calculating compensation.

rel-e207c7385d1324c2f0b2940f2c1964b5.tgt_id: Thiệt Hại Do Sức Khỏe Bị Xâm Phạm
rel-e207c7385d1324c2f0b2940f2c1964b5.description: The responsible party must compensate for mental distress in cases of damage to health, with the maximum compensation being no more than fifty times the mức lương cơ sở.

rel-7ba01178c294230ae7bb3a2cf0bbcd89.tgt_id: Thiệt Hại Do Danh Dự, Nhân Phẩm, Uy Tín Bị Xâm Phạm
rel-7ba01178c294230ae7bb3a2cf0bbcd89.description: The responsible party must compensate for mental distress in cases of damage to reputation, with the maximum compensation being no more than ten times the mức lương cơ sở.

rel-d11693c72a210d7fbc6f526e68fb7c26.tgt_id: Thiệt Hại Do Tính Mạng Bị Xâm Phạm
rel-d11693c72a210d7fbc6f526e68fb7c26.description: The responsible party must compensate for mental distress in cases of damage to life, with the maximum compensation being no more than one hundred times the mức lương cơ sở.

rel-e1a37c81781e1f2eefbc30626f1f2364.description: Người giao is responsible for transferring the will to another party.

rel-5675ae9e700ba37504d7989de09d1f8f.description: Người nhận is responsible for receiving the will from another party.

rel-e2c7733d4f484ac098deaa2660693ee4.description: Điều 593 provides the duration for compensation for damages suffered by the person who has been harmed.

rel-729b5bf3ff25dc60e3c96e48bf55d917.tgt_id: Mức bồi thường bù đắp tổn thất về tinh thần
rel-729b5bf3ff25dc60e3c96e48bf55d917.description: Điều 593 specifies the conditions and limits for compensation for mental suffering.

rel-182e8d02a55e3eb2a2f948f463c81ad4.description: Điều 594 specifies that compensation is required if the limits of justifiable defense are exceeded.

rel-dabfc0b34c5832a3b791440bf3bed744.description: Điều 595 addresses compensation for damages caused by exceeding the requirements of a critical situation.

rel-0998ee2e165af56b2c0bc1958fdebe68.description: Đиều 596 deals with compensation for damages caused by individuals under the influence of stimulants.

rel-6d57f31538869d882c6429c2604d5f53.description: Đиều 599 outlines compensation for damages caused by individuals under 15 years old while under the direct management of an educational institution.

rel-7a0086e2aa7000a10a0d2652c0b2d702.description: Đиều 599 outlines compensation for damages caused by individuals lacking civil capacity while under the direct management of a hospital.

rel-cf29001555ac2cd9f1fc96e444db6396.description: Đиều 599 specifies that parents or guardians must compensate if the educational institution, hospital, or other legal entity is not at fault.

rel-94cb011927bb475c6d12ac5257e6d2e8.src_id: Mức bồi thường bù đắp tổn thất về tinh thần
rel-94cb011927bb475c6d12ac5257e6d2e8.description: The maximum compensation for mental suffering is calculated based on the state's base salary.

rel-126203a85b5740a23f1fab8429796679.src_id: Thiệt Hại Do Sức Khỏe Bị Xâm Phạm

rel-126203a85b5740a23f1fab8429796679.description: Thiệt hại do sức khỏe bị xâm phạm is included in the damages for tính mạng bị xâm phạm, and the responsible party must compensate for these damages and a separate amount for mental distress.

rel-b9372b00057accd8e9319cd78f3f7d3e.src_id: Thiệt Hại Do Sức Khỏe Bị Xâm Phạm
rel-b9372b00057accd8e9319cd78f3f7d3e.tgt_id: Người Chịu Trách Nhiệm Bồi Thường
rel-b9372b00057accd8e9319cd78f3f7d3e.description: Người chịu trách nhiệm bồi thường must compensate for the damages as prescribed in Article 590 and a separate amount for mental distress.

rel-ce892f8eeed885387e9f8b2f41745819.src_id: Thiệt Hại Do Tính Mạng Bị Xâm Phạm
rel-ce892f8eeed885387e9f8b2f41745819.tgt_id: Người Chịu Trách Nhiệm Bồi Thường
rel-ce892f8eeed885387e9f8b2f41745819.description: Người chịu trách nhiệm bồi thường must compensate for the damages as prescribed in Article  591 and a separate amount for mental distress for close relatives.

rel-0fbe97efeac22a59ba719f8ec755461a.src_id: Thiệt Hại Do Danh Dự, Nhân Phẩm, Uy Tín Bị Xâm Phạm

rel-0fbe97efeac22a59ba719f8ec755461a.description: Người chịu trách nhiệm bồi thường must compensate for the damages as prescribed in Article 592 and a separate amount for mental distress.

rel-f95fac2f5c0f6bdc4e0b3f4f897db99f.description: The last place of residence of the deceased determines the location for opening the estate.

rel-20d20eb6d24a50f716e51ea743eb8936.description: The person managing the estate has an agreement with the person who left the estate regarding the management of the estate.

rel-a195feb08b73a5346fc2d4ca79369ec4.tgt_id: Nghĩa vụ của người quản lý di sản
rel-a195feb08b73a5346fc2d4ca79369ec4.description: The person managing the estate has specific duties related to managing and preserving the estate.

rel-a8b1f266fcd360eb3d786e862fc5179b.tgt_id: Quyền của người quản lý di sản
rel-a8b1f266fcd360eb3d786e862fc5179b.description: The person managing the estate has specific rights related to managing and preserving the estate.

rel-8749ac4f2af0db664b18b39532e02964.description: The person managing the estate has an agreement with the heirs regarding compensation for their services.

rel-84f0a7e70d720ef5f056202f446e40dc.description: Người Được Di Tặng is the individual who receives a portion of the estate as specified in the will.

rel-0441b22fd4397fd2afb7b4b14e0e76c7.tgt_id: Phần Di Sản Không Được Định Đoạt Trong Di Chúc
rel-0441b22fd4397fd2afb7b4b14e0e76c7.description: Parts of the estate not specified in the will are inherited according to the legal order.

rel-f1c4017b00012654bf0ff2b0ada542ad.description: Phần Di Sản is used to settle the financial obligations of the deceased.

rel-d450283e5289fc093a30a6024a618735.tgt_id: Phần Di Chúc Không Có Hiệu Lực Pháp Luật
rel-d450283e5289fc093a30a6024a618735.description: Parts of the estate related to the parts of the will that are not legally binding are inherited by law.

rel-f3e1f8b66511a165b4956dc1eed886f1.description: A person who uses another's property without legal basis must return any income or profits derived from it.

rel-1ea99724e6d31922ce8f0331b5d845e1.description: A person who suffers a loss due to another's benefit from their property without legal basis is entitled to have the benefit returned.<SEP>A person who benefits from another's property without legal basis must return the benefit to the person who suffered a loss.

rel-994475068ef8ced5633c8b6d7e56cbee.description: The  Law on Enterprises regulates the establishment, management, reorganization, dissolution, and related activities of private enterprises.

rel-49df4733058965175b04f75bcac280fc.description: The Law on Enterprises regulates the establishment, management, reorganization, dissolution, and related activities of a group of companies.

rel-099387db4c4b2f6293ae5db4b5956277.description: Other Laws may have specific regulations regarding the establishment, management, reorganization, dissolution, and related activities of enterprises.

rel-b30e676b029e628eea0a0084740eb61f.description: Doanh nghiệp cung ứng sản phẩm, dịch vụ công ích có quyền và nghĩa vụ được quy định tại Điều 9 của Luật này.

rel-ede6823603ecc7a27e33668cc6cf4cf2.description: Doanh nghiệp xã hội phải đáp ứng các tiêu chí được quy định tại Điều 10 của Luật này.

rel-ac16df9a509fae8ee3742c5abe971eab.description: Điều 10 quy định về quyền và nghĩa vụ của doanh nghiệp xã hội.

rel-0f2e72f5a4b562e4fc2ffe4818234174.description: Điều 10 quy định về tiêu chí mà doanh nghiệp xã hội phải đáp ứng.

rel-8f0fe45ceee799d4401d24b34bafb1fc.description: The registration file for a business entity must comply with the specific law that outlines the registration requirements.

rel-9cd2de836809ec0d452b6433ab715f38.description: The registered capital of a company must comply with the specific law that outlines the registration requirements.

rel-ac55f8886386d160d9dfbf4e2710a6f8.description: Industries and professions that are prohibited from investment and business activities must comply with the specific law that outlines the prohibitions.

rel-b5957ca2a389ca8160288c478d2583b0.description: Financing terrorism must comply with the specific law that outlines the prohibitions.

rel-30624e29c1d7d23dd44869a5711706b9.description: Đиều 26 specifies the responsibility of This Law to govern business registration procedures.

rel-581d506ffe62c562bead74a5cc51e497.description: Luật này refers to the law that contains the provisions such as Điều 53.

rel-4e51ec92f1a0a564f95ee36a3a64799a.description: Luật này refers to the law that contains the provisions such as Điều 54.

rel-9f9484fdcd930572567e321cb5cc40fc.description: Luật này is the legal framework governing the operations and management of companies, including the responsibilities and rights of the board of members and the supervisory board.

rel-cd1b16086863c75fdfe9ab8f73607c05.description: This type of company must disclose information according to the provisions of the law.

rel-2af163c7881ed04b4fd3a6f9e263dbe2.description: Hội đồng thành viên performs the rights and obligations of the company according to the provisions of Luật này.

rel-4cf8ea082aee8643cd15fc8aa17801b0.description: The rights and obligations of common shareholders are governed by this law.

rel-55be61c83223b247db1857f3201e3bfd.description: The Chairman of the company's rights and responsibilities are defined by this law.

rel-0d86f625abca9d38c200d2ae246467af.description: The procedures and decisions of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông are regulated by Luật này.

rel-a01ca44504ccd44b83de51829f4f286f.description: Ban kiểm soát operates within the framework of the laws and regulations specified in Luật này.

rel-4dd8aeb508bab46a739823ee19350665.description: Cổ đông has certain rights and responsibilities as outlined in Luật này.

rel-427aeac630bdb4417524bbac7da88c76.description: The Trung tâm trọng tài operates within the legal framework established by this law.

rel-d69812a40f8c04b60cfb5eea26eb6021.description: Điều 13 is a legal provision within Luật này regarding the loss of the right to object in arbitration.

rel-3025d857b686830f836b30ef650749d6.description: Điều 14 is a legal provision within Luật này regarding the application of laws to resolve disputes.

rel-6cc56fb78b78986ddef933f850884902.description: Điều 15 is a legal provision within Luật này regarding state management of arbitration.

rel-45d433ed179c6381d9f06f2febbe4e23.description: Điều 16 is a legal provision within Luật này regarding the forms of arbitration agreements.

rel-f6fc4115a933dc3576b0689bb2895ec9.description: Chính phủ defines the system of organization for the Business Registration Agency and the registration and operation of household businesses as per Luật này.

rel-7b4b7ed71459c416fb04aa61f31975b8.description: Luật này replaces and renders无效的法律《企业法》第68/2014/QH13。

rel-41bf0ba439d73b5bdb25897e09e6f4cc.description: Luật này provides the legal framework and authority for Hội đồng trọng tài to resolve disputes and make decisions.

rel-987344fe2da887e0e63e599b1828c626.tgt_id: Quy tắc tố tụng trọng tài
rel-987344fe2da887e0e63e599b1828c626.description: Luật này provides the legal framework that includes the Quy tắc tố tụng trọng tài for arbitration proceedings.

rel-47dc2d97b99cab5c7873c8d2ec22924a.tgt_id: Tổ chức trọng tài nước ngoài
rel-47dc2d97b99cab5c7873c8d2ec22924a.description: Tổ chức trọng tài nước ngoài operates in Vietnam according to the provisions of Luật này.

rel-75e34f5801ce589e2d0e1b7a4d30e631.description: Luật này governs the procedures for selecting and designating a replacement Trọng tài viên.

rel-b8e133faba688b038f7cd103c618625b.description: Điều 53 outlines the role of the board of members in deciding the acceptance of new members.

rel-11ca14e3478340a603ceefcee9f2c730.description: The board of members decides on the distribution of capital contributions.

rel-7de102efddd4b21eb62bb964ab43fbd1.tgt_id: Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên
rel-7de102efddd4b21eb62bb964ab43fbd1.description: Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên is the chairperson of the Hội Đồng Thành Viên.<SEP>Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Thành Viên is the chairperson of Hội Đồng Thành Viên and is responsible for convening meetings and making decisions on business matters.

rel-96d5103d2369fc47352226f5a97e22b6.description: Thành viên are members of the company's governing body who can request meetings and participate in decision-making.

rel-1b093acf6c2c68100c4e4b5df16d2779.description: Hội đồng thành viên is the governing body of the company responsible for making decisions.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên makes decisions regarding the company's capital and profit distribution.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên is the Board of Members of a company.<SEP>Công ty is managed by the Hội đồng thành viên, which makes decisions regarding the company's operations.<SEP>The company's operations are governed by the Hội đồng thành viên, which makes decisions regarding the acceptance of new members and other matters.

rel-da35cc941816748157e10bcfe9fc644f.description: Thông báo mời họp is the notice sent to members to attend meetings of the company's governing body.

rel-d6a4f334d91486c483f6788965cfa1dc.description: Tài liệu họp are the documents and materials used during meetings of the company's governing body for decision-making.

rel-0511d3d081ce9695112484908d42a5e8.description: Hội đồng thành viên is involved in the valuation of assets contributed to capital in limited liability companies and partnerships.

rel-5d25a4210fc1d46143cb412ab40dddd1.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên
rel-5d25a4210fc1d46143cb412ab40dddd1.description: Hội đồng thành viên is a board of members that manages the company, consisting of 3 to 7 members appointed by the company owner.

rel-e0808d3d4cbcffe906afe04b25c9ee36.description: Chủ tịch công ty is a member of the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>The Chairman of the company is appointed by the company owner and is responsible for representing the owner and the company.<SEP>The Chairman of the company is appointed by the representative body of the owner and has specific duties and responsibilities.

rel-3bf46063ab0312202ab9a54dd09f32b6.description: Giám Đốc is a person who may be appointed by Hội Đồng Thành Viên to manage the company's operations.

rel-883de39252125ff84249c0590db198fa.description: Tổng giám đốc is a member of the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>The Board of Members appoints the General Director to manage the company's daily business operations.<SEP>Hội đồng thành viên has the right to request information from the Tổng giám đốc regarding the company's financial and operational status.<SEP>The General Director is appointed by the Board of Members and has specific duties and responsibilities.

rel-2ae5af015b8dbaa3a25d1b8ccbc919fc.description: Ban kiểm soát is a member of the Hội đồng thành viên.

rel-80c15980805c098951f769221a14cf7e.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-80c15980805c098951f769221a14cf7e.description: Hội đồng thành viên is part of the management structure of a Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.

rel-c44bca120e650e688f1ade1434de761d.tgt_id: Quy định khác của pháp luật có liên quan
rel-c44bca120e650e688f1ade1434de761d.description: Hội đồng thành viên performs the rights and obligations of the company according to other related legal provisions.

rel-0817e516d15f3423d5356ed7d846a257.description: Hội đồng thành viên is part of the management structure of a Công ty cổ phần.

rel-d74b1dbb6b49fafd6ef657bc0147c849.description: Điều 93 sets the criteria and conditions for the members of the Hội đồng thành viên.

rel-43216ca0df7e6a662d3cb8ca71ae3fa5.description: The Supervisor ensures compliance with the law, the company charter, and the decisions of the company owner.

rel-2ea99398d31d4fd31962db83efd53cc0.description: Hội Đồng Thành Viên makes decisions based on the rules and regulations outlined in Điều Lệ Công Ty.

rel-65cc972758f82757843ef543c677f9e0.description: The Phiếu lấy ý kiến is used to collect opinions from members of the Hội đồng thành viên to make decisions.

rel-11f27a55a01871890176204fbd8704c4.description: Điều 61 outlines the procedures for passing resolutions and decisions of the Hội đồng thành viên through written opinions.

rel-d17ff8e28133b868eece00734350f0db.description: The Biên bản họp records the decisions and resolutions made by the Hội đồng thành viên.<SEP>The minutes of the meeting (Biên bản họp) must be recorded and approved by the Board of Members (Hội đồng thành viên).

rel-bc29d98025b297cf43bd457b1b44b84c.tgt_id: Báo cáo kết quả kiểm phiếu
rel-bc29d98025b297cf43bd457b1b44b84c.description: The Báo cáo kết quả kiểm phiếu summarizes the results of the opinion collection process and is equivalent to the Biên bản họp.

rel-ff70c5e3e2e887cfce8dac2aaac87b27.tgt_id: Thành viên Hội đồng thành viên
rel-ff70c5e3e2e887cfce8dac2aaac87b27.description: Thành viên Hội đồng thành viên are the members who participate in the meetings and decision-making processes of Hội đồng thành viên.

rel-8d8804cd6f73c12d383590e04bbaddab.tgt_id: Cơ quan đại diện chủ sở hữu
rel-8d8804cd6f73c12d383590e04bbaddab.description: Hội đồng thành viên reports to and seeks approval from Cơ quan đại diện chủ sở hữu for certain decisions.

rel-b7826486df8cfb9fd46a7ef0100c4b93.tgt_id: Báo cáo tài chính hằng năm
rel-b7826486df8cfb9fd46a7ef0100c4b93.description: Hội đồng Thành viên approves the annual financial report of the company.

rel-67b2ad972f63aa66ab8e890d0b4f2a99.tgt_id: Phương hướng phát triển công ty
rel-67b2ad972f63aa66ab8e890d0b4f2a99.description: Hội đồng thành viên is responsible for approving the strategic direction or plan for the development of the company.

rel-559451e8487178c62b226264e76e6168.tgt_id: Tổ chức lại hoặc giải体公司
rel-559451e8487178c62b226264e76e6168.description: Hội đồng thành viên负责批准公司的重组或解散。

rel-74f59dc293980c2c8e60bf4a587e0323.description: Hội đồng thành viên's meeting minutes document the discussions, decisions, and conclusions.

rel-de9b6e0b6d4fa0f1e1a148317345780a.tgt_id: Tổ chức lại hoặc giải thể công ty
rel-de9b6e0b6d4fa0f1e1a148317345780a.description: Hội đồng thành viên is responsible for approving the restructuring or dissolution of the company.

rel-1f20afcadfae4a4ea82c2c08d6c5b1e6.description: Hội đồng Thành viên makes decisions and passes resolutions on various matters affecting the company.

rel-de0e07db15eb79bb327e734bc4c7a4a0.description: Người kiểm phiếu and Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên are jointly responsible for the completeness, accuracy, and honesty of the voting report.

rel-9687f111c591e94e39fe5bdb0dc9e621.description: Hội đồng thành viên makes and passes resolutions and decisions that are legally binding.

rel-31e4571bb68a09e51b5495691bb593ce.description: Hội Đồng Thành Viên makes decisions on various business matters and approves resolutions.

rel-f0e263b4f1af8edfffbde38413062de6.description: Hội đồng thành viên has the right to request information from the Phó giám đốc regarding the company's financial and operational status.

rel-fa9e76d0a7d861ca4628075b579b7ee4.description: Hội đồng thành viên has the right to request information from the Phó Tổng giám đốc regarding the company's financial and operational status.

rel-24badfe048600514ad6b869078bde4dc.description: Hội đồng thành viên has the right to request information from the Kế toán trưởng regarding the company's financial and operational status.

rel-68e338f7f5fcbf7d10029492671c847d.description: Hội đồng thành viên has the right to request information from the Người quản lý công ty regarding the company's financial and operational status.

rel-a321529993a34f5824fc318223e75cad.tgt_id: Người đại diện phần vốn góp
rel-a321529993a34f5824fc318223e75cad.description: Hội đồng thành viên has the right to request information from the Người đại diện phần vốn góp regarding the company's financial and operational status.

rel-c96e66383b3af8fc6b193f3499efe67d.description: Hội đồng thành viên can consult with Chuyên gia tư vấn before making important decisions.

rel-dcd9d9f342458834da7ac853b0baea67.description: Hội đồng thành viên is responsible for creating a Biên bản that records the details of the meeting.

rel-a703b92d920a0939b64577e7ccbb263b.tgt_id: Nghị quyết Hội đồng thành viên
rel-a703b92d920a0939b64577e7ccbb263b.description: Hội đồng thành viên makes decisions and passes resolutions that are documented in the Nghị quyết Hội đồng thành viên.

rel-c4e4955e4caaefe23ec3d486a26853af.description: Hội đồng thành viên sets the Quy chế thông tin that defines the information and documents to be provided by the company's leadership.

rel-d82e14884016f194d41cc8bf5c095542.tgt_id: Quy chế quản lý tài chính
rel-d82e14884016f194d41cc8bf5c095542.description: Hội đồng thành viên follows the Quy chế quản lý tài chính for managing financial costs, including the fees for consulting experts.

rel-bbdb1baf07c92a5e57f50d14452da30a.description: Hội đồng thành viên follows the procedures outlined in Điều 98 for conducting meetings and making decisions.

rel-3d08105a2b90cd7c0e4e3f4d239d4490.description: Hội đồng thành viên can decide to exclude a thành viên góp vốn who fails to meet their capital contribution obligations.

rel-88dd4d016b4dd30fe13d9331023ed10f.description: Đại hội đồng cổ đông, or the shareholders' meeting, can decide on the purchase of preferred shares and the conversion of preferred shares into common shares.<SEP>Decisions regarding the rights and privileges of Cổ phần ưu đãi are made at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-7e200748717de776062571342ae1e204.description: Common shareholders have the right to attend, speak, and vote at the General Shareholders' Meeting.<SEP>Common shareholders must notify the General Shareholders' Meeting about their group meetings for nominating individuals to the Board of Directors and Supervisory Board.

rel-b4690e3b58f62c6e970af23533889e9a.description: Cổ đông participates in the general meeting of shareholders and has the right to vote.<SEP>Cổ đông participate in the Đại hội đồng cổ đông to make decisions regarding the company.<SEP>Cổ đông have the right to attend and vote at the meeting.<SEP>Shareholders participate in the meeting and vote on matters discussed.<SEP>Cổ đông participates in the Đại hội đồng cổ đông to discuss and vote on important matters related to the company.

rel-a9816935d31edd32ee1998201e4ccdf2.description: The General Shareholders' Meeting makes decisions regarding the nomination of individuals to the Board of Directors.<SEP>The Đại hội đồng cổ đông elects members of the Hội đồng quản trị.<SEP>The board of directors is involved in the governance decisions made during the meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is responsible for reporting to and being overseen by Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is responsible for managing the company and must convene a meeting of Đại hội đồng cổ đông under certain conditions.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is responsible for organizing and communicating with shareholders at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.
rel-a9816935d31edd32ee1998201e4ccdf2.keywords: board of directors,decision making,election,governance,management,meeting organization,organizational structure,oversight,reporting,shareholder communication

rel-d8b3136ace3ef0ede55d460daa133280.description: The General Shareholders' Meeting makes decisions regarding the nomination of individuals to the Supervisory Board.<SEP>The Đại hội đồng cổ đông elects members of the Ban kiểm soát.<SEP>The audit committee is involved in the governance decisions made during the meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Ban kiểm soát reports to and receives decisions from Đại hội đồng cổ đông regarding the company's operations and policies.<SEP>Ban kiểm soát reports to and participates in the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Ban kiểm soát is responsible for reporting to and being overseen by Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-db7d7204e87923ec79542e8b951f963c.description: Công ty can reduce its registered capital based on the decision made at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Đại hội đồng cổ đông is the highest decision-making body of the company and is composed of all shareholders with voting rights.
rel-db7d7204e87923ec79542e8b951f963c.keywords: capital reduction,decision making,highest decision-making body,shareholder meeting

rel-58b9d1aa15e435e0e51db7ba1d078665.description: Đại hội đồng cổ đông decides on the sale of shares to raise capital for the corporation.

rel-f530ab798614fd4d03a4bfd0bddb29eb.description: The procedures and decisions of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông are also regulated by the Điều lệ công ty.<SEP>Decisions at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông are guided by the rules set in the Điều lệ công ty.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty outlines the rules and procedures for conducting the meeting.<SEP>The meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông is governed by the company's charter or bylaws.<SEP>The company's charter or bylaws govern the meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>The company's charter may contain specific rules for the shareholders' meeting.

rel-e54e40528303d74fa3d6f0fc55fc3ad8.description: The Đại hội đồng cổ đông passes Nghị quyết, which are resolutions.<SEP>The resolution is the outcome of the General Shareholders' Meeting.<SEP>Nghị quyết is passed at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>The Đại hội đồng cổ đông passes resolutions on various issues related to the company.<SEP>The resolutions are passed during the meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-88e4be427b1ca704bc8eb5795167bc7d.tgt_id: Biên bản họp Đại hội đồng cổ đông
rel-88e4be427b1ca704bc8eb5795167bc7d.description: The minutes of the General Shareholders' Meeting document the proceedings of the meeting.

rel-9dbadfb5f3206c3f07ae6c0befc3a370.description: The Đại hội đồng cổ đông reviews and approves the company's financial reports.<SEP>The annual financial report is reviewed and approved during the meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>The Đại hội đồng cổ đông reviews and approves the annual financial report.

rel-e287987788e5f4885691c7d2527cc56e.description: Decisions at the Đại hội đồng cổ đông are made through the process of biểu quyết.<SEP>Voting is conducted during the shareholders' meeting to make decisions on discussed matters.

rel-b6af28b9e7441640b6e507fbf3235256.description: The Đại hội đồng cổ đông makes decisions regarding the restructuring of the company.

rel-2d6028203ccf2b20368426449a9a4844.description: The Đại hội đồng cổ đông makes decisions regarding the dissolution of the company.<SEP>The meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông can make decisions regarding the dissolution or liquidation of the company.

rel-e16a3b9aef9bbf6e6fd450b8e9430b49.description: The method of bầu dồn phiếu is used during the Đại hội đồng cổ đông for electing members.

rel-ef0472b5e02ab12b5b9dac8c35757f11.description: Người triệu tập họp is responsible for organizing the meeting and sending out notifications to all shareholders.<SEP>The person who calls the meeting may have certain rights during the shareholders' meeting.

rel-82ee6d2f32c2d948d54b347248b2e2e3.description: Dự thảo nghị quyết is a draft resolution to be discussed and voted on at the meeting.

rel-ecef1c730dc7318a56b59d70675752d5.description: Phiếu biểu quyết is used by shareholders to cast their votes at the meeting.

rel-827b460bd3dda03de6c4ff1820f46454.description: Meeting materials can be posted on the company's electronic information website.

rel-5d8faa8c476c2b849b6c698591f3e085.description: Văn bản ủy quyền allows shareholders to delegate their voting rights to another person or organization.

rel-5f1b1d97609135fec989879055a02aa2.description: The agenda for the meeting is a key component of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>The agenda outlines the topics to be discussed during the shareholders' meeting.

rel-0ee330797419dc4c2f4800a037f9205e.description: Đại hội đồng cổ đông is the general meeting of shareholders of a company.

rel-f9bedd61d9588b3b592a90b5151d4888.description: The chairperson leads the meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-e393dd8aef80eef6060a7857855d6f22.description: The meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông is governed by specific scenarios or situations outlined in the regulations.

rel-165e7b8fd72da44c294b787fa964c9a0.description: The meeting of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông can make decisions regarding the restructuring of the company.

rel-595b913077d52f836c0d76b37fb7ddce.tgt_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị
rel-595b913077d52f836c0d76b37fb7ddce.description: The Chairman of the Board of Directors presides over the meeting of the shareholders.<SEP>Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị chairs and manages the meetings of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-a72f45265b7f7038236ac245e5a97e42.description: The secretary of the meeting records the proceedings of the shareholders' meeting.

rel-eebfd342fd30e90ee733f093fe2a03d2.description: The counting committee is responsible for counting votes during the shareholders' meeting.

rel-2bf0c69070a4e9450afe9709bedca2aa.description: The head of the supervisory board may preside over the meeting if the chairperson is absent.

rel-701e081f3cdfd37d601447a6f2529a9d.tgt_id: Phê duyệt danh sách công ty kiểm toán độc lập
rel-701e081f3cdfd37d601447a6f2529a9d.description: The general meeting of shareholders approves the list of independent auditing firms that are responsible for conducting audits of the company's financial activities.

rel-80e067384bbb0408db4aeb3b9562def3.tgt_id: Bãi miễn kiểm toán viên độc lập
rel-80e067384bbb0408db4aeb3b9562def3.description: The general meeting of shareholders removes an independent auditor when it is deemed necessary.

rel-b447e2149644862f594376691ddf8a97.description: The secretary of the company supports the organization of the General Shareholders' Meeting.

rel-5ed46190e081315fbcb53a340f9a7474.description: Đại hội đồng cổ đông has the authority to appoint or remove Kiểm soát viên based on specific conditions outlined in the law.

rel-40a7f7175fdfa1f0259f07f3fb107fdd.tgt_id: Nghị quyết Đại hội đồng cổ đông
rel-40a7f7175fdfa1f0259f07f3fb107fdd.description: Đại hội đồng cổ đông makes resolutions, including decisions on the removal of a Kiểm soát viên.

rel-2f41c3fd8b35aaa6863587ed848445da.description: Thành Viên are members of the Hội Đồng Thành Viên and have specific rights within the company.

rel-b95132476b8778c1de98b8675c2bda11.description: Thành viên contribute a portion of capital to the company, known as Phần vốn góp.

rel-141d9fa37b6f5c593d0ee737d37f6691.description: Thành viên's rights and obligations are defined by the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-03ba2ff5d722b02d1cc700bd8ea8e348.description: Thành viên can participate in the decision-making process through the passing of Nghị quyết by the Hội đồng Thành viên.

rel-84f4914d079d3913a6934b1580b38661.description: Thành viên have specific rights and obligations as defined by the legal framework and the company's charter.

rel-d1c7ec615b8fa7016b7c1caba8a7d161.description: Thành Viên's ownership of capital contributions is recorded in the Sổ Đăng Ký Thành Viên.

rel-eec79d2cadcf9ca54e879654f375ddaa.tgt_id: Nghĩa vụ của thành viên Hội đồng thành viên
rel-eec79d2cadcf9ca54e879654f375ddaa.description: Thành viên has specific obligations as defined by the Nghĩa vụ của thành viên Hội đồng thành viên.

rel-1559d988d4da489ef496f643f94e04f2.description: Thành viên has the right to request the company to repurchase their share of capital under certain conditions.

rel-39b19143a96937af9c7be26fd0815e5f.description: Thành viên has the right to transfer their share of capital to another party under certain conditions.

rel-9661f5d748bb30e208795ac615295b47.description: Thành viên can contribute capital to the company and receive profits according to the conditions outlined in Điều 68.

rel-af5529f02bff3a9674bf218b780239de.description: The minutes of the meeting (Biên bản họp) must include the names, capital contribution ratios, and other details of the members (Thành viên) who attended the meeting.

rel-2497cd740331990c4cdf192b4bf6c49e.description: Cổ đông, or shareholders, own Cổ phần phổ thông, or common shares, and have rights and obligations associated with these shares.<SEP>Cổ đông holds common shares in a company and has certain rights and obligations.

rel-046a04e0970bc15671ec9fc9667b33bc.description: Cổ đông, or shareholders, can own Cổ phần ưu đãi, or preferred shares, which come with specific rights and benefits.

rel-fba883b243ca708cbdc5b8867c6e273e.description: Người góp vốn, or individuals who contribute capital, become Cổ đông, or shareholders, after paying for their shares.

rel-63324d6aadfb884beb1e9d691f99dace.description: Cổ Đông's details are recorded in Sổ Đăng Ký Cổ Đông, and notifications about dividend payments are sent to them based on this register.

rel-0e7473fffd17277e0699dbef83fc59bd.description: Cổ đông's rights and responsibilities are defined by the Điều lệ công ty.<SEP>Cổ đông must comply with the articles of association of the company and has certain rights and obligations.<SEP>Cổ đông must adhere to the rules and regulations outlined in Điều lệ công ty.

rel-3dc5d9715c9c519414e6cbf632282eae.description: Cổ đông makes a request regarding lost, damaged, or destroyed shares and assumes responsibility for any disputes arising from the issuance of new shares.

rel-af9ddc791dd2507779c7349bff6125dd.description: Cổ đông has rights and responsibilities regarding the company's shares and must notify the company of any changes in contact information.<SEP>Cổ đông are the owners of Công ty cổ phần and have rights and responsibilities regarding the company's debts and assets.<SEP>Cổ đông are shareholders of a company.<SEP>A shareholder can transfer their shares to another shareholder or a non-shareholder entity.

rel-3dd1f46d167b76febdd284b6c6547c9b.description: Cổ đông holds a share certificate and has certain rights and obligations.

rel-af085f7cef6879d5affbbeb7f56c9529.description: Hội đồng quản trị is responsible for supervising and enforcing the timely payment of shares by Cổ đông.

rel-12af6cc4736ed9f83f5955195405101b.tgt_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-12af6cc4736ed9f83f5955195405101b.description: Cổ đông must pay for the shares they have registered to purchase within 90 days of the company receiving the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.

rel-76fbe0fd1267692940c710ae0f90899c.description: Cổ đông must pay for the Cổ phần they have registered to purchase.<SEP>Cổ đông have the right to freely transfer their Cổ phần to others, except in certain cases defined by the law.

rel-bdb671cf03b38d131a5af00c8e4c4adb.description: Điều 113 outlines the rules for the payment of shares by Cổ đông and the consequences of non-payment.

rel-71569985bc6fd8f0fcd3737d6fc6326d.description: Điều 122 outlines the rules for the registration of shareholders and the recording of their information in the shareholder register.

rel-ed6fd5c1f6de19d772fe8211d98efabf.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi cổ tức
rel-ed6fd5c1f6de19d772fe8211d98efabf.description: Cổ đông has the right to receive higher dividends with Cổ phần ưu đãi cổ tức shares.

rel-739aab2b0cc0cd81198660dee5a1ae8a.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi hoàn lại
rel-739aab2b0cc0cd81198660dee5a1ae8a.description: Cổ đông has the right to request the return of capital with Cổ phần ưu đãi hoàn lại shares.

rel-a709e0a73ec80ce9557d99771b7f3516.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi biểu quyết
rel-a709e0a73ec80ce9557d99771b7f3516.description: Cổ đông has the right to vote with Cổ phần ưu đãi biểu quyết shares.

rel-c2eba93b97b09e4519bb68bfd6e0eeb0.description: Cổ đông has the right to vote in the company's decisions.

rel-fd08e697f04a70ceee2e7265d1c8ebb4.tgt_id: Quyền dự họp Đại hội đồng cổ đông
rel-fd08e697f04a70ceee2e7265d1c8ebb4.description: Cổ đông has the right to attend the General Shareholders' Meeting.

rel-59b3a4973f9f85d3e46c6c8bc4cf4362.tgt_id: Quyền đề cử người vào Hội đồng quản trị và Ban kiểm soát
rel-59b3a4973f9f85d3e46c6c8bc4cf4362.description: Cổ đông has the right to nominate individuals to the Board of Directors and Supervisory Board.

rel-1bd96ae519fb4657347652caeb896727.description: Cổ Đông can request the Trọng Tài to invalidate a resolution of the Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông.

rel-6d8999bdaf4bc72fac845182b7c85943.description: Shareholders can request the court or arbitration to review and potentially annul a resolution of the General Shareholders' Meeting.<SEP>Nghị quyết must be sent to Cổ đông within 15 days after the vote concludes.

rel-3d765818c92499922cf97ed6aa383788.description: Biên bản kiểm phiếu must be sent to Cổ đông within 15 days after the vote concludes.
