rel-368423efb0689f67ca55c610d42f253b.description: Danh sách cổ đông is created based on the Sổ đăng ký cổ đông and includes shareholders who have the right to attend the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.<SEP>Cổ đông have the right to inspect, verify, extract, and copy their information from the Danh sách cổ đông.

rel-653a1db52e40425fe19c4e8dd4d1d317.description: Cổ đông have the right to submit proposals to be included in the agenda of the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-3aa3043dd700a27664446e82027f4531.description: Công Ty is responsible for updating shareholder information and is not liable for failing to contact shareholders due to lack of updated address information.<SEP>Công Ty must pay dividends to Cổ Đông according to the regulations and must ensure it can still meet its financial obligations after paying dividends.<SEP>Cổ Đông has the right to request changes in the shareholder register within 24 hours, as per the company's regulations.

rel-05548ebf2509c9d1d0cae0b1abbfe851.description: Cổ đông has the right to examine certain reports under specific conditions.

rel-b226c5eff032c5453101db6f1ab24857.description: Công ty is managed by the Người quản lý công ty, who oversees the company's operations.

rel-ed1d82d928b785a1a6501447aec43f3c.description: Người quản lý công ty is responsible for providing information from the Sổ đăng ký cổ đông and correcting or supplementing inaccurate information in the Danh sách cổ đông.

rel-f8e0beb084bd447c8152ea720caefe95.description: Company managers are responsible for the dissolution process and its compliance with regulations.

rel-2a2db6993c2c3138707ec820c4dcbb88.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-2a2db6993c2c3138707ec820c4dcbb88.description: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp is the registration certificate for a Doanh nghiệp.<SEP>A business entity is issued a Certificate of Business Registration when it meets certain conditions.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp can have its registration certificate revoked under certain conditions.

rel-e91db00a5c24a5a65f5b17fc9b3b4da0.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-e91db00a5c24a5a65f5b17fc9b3b4da0.tgt_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-e91db00a5c24a5a65f5b17fc9b3b4da0.description: The Business Registration Authority is responsible for issuing the Certificate of Business Registration and reviewing registration documents.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is responsible for issuing the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp to a company after it meets the required conditions.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh issues the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp to confirm the registration of a business.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh issues certificates to businesses upon successful registration.

rel-4f4c42c1e5bc91c04e9f91b2260c6e16.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-4f4c42c1e5bc91c04e9f91b2260c6e16.description: The Arbitration can make decisions that lead to changes in the content of the Certificate of Business

rel-ab12e308ef3d54d68c9439d33f5a12b3.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-ab12e308ef3d54d68c9439d33f5a12b3.tgt_id: Địa chỉ trụ sở chính của doanh nghiệp
rel-ab12e308ef3d54d68c9439d33f5a12b3.description: The main office address of the business entity is included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-f4ee272144433442de7a87ea072eeb0c.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-f4ee272144433442de7a87ea072eeb0c.description: The partner members of a partnership company are included in the Certificate of Business Registration.<SEP>The công ty hợp danh gains legal status upon receiving the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.

rel-3673943a7858c4ae68f9f50cc60a41ae.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-3673943a7858c4ae68f9f50cc60a41ae.description: The owner of a private business entity is included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-abcab1176a57b6d5f668797587efb766.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-abcab1176a57b6d5f668797587efb766.description: The individual members of a limited liability company are included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-84f38a29bd30d373b199b43cda86bffb.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-84f38a29bd30d373b199b43cda86bffb.description: The organizational members of a limited liability company are included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-11bf766e14855f0532a71437e231bea8.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-11bf766e14855f0532a71437e231bea8.description: The registered capital of a company is included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-6d3f4dceb5e7041e0c9269cfccf53fc6.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-6d3f4dceb5e7041e0c9269cfccf53fc6.description: The investment capital of a private business entity is included in the Certificate of Business Registration.

rel-c8f68ec7bc23bbefa18ce5d5585d26f9.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-c8f68ec7bc23bbefa18ce5d5585d26f9.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên
rel-c8f68ec7bc23bbefa18ce5d5585d26f9.description: The business registration certificate is issued when a limited liability company with two or more members is formed.

rel-038773b1b8504e1db90b0cb473876980.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-038773b1b8504e1db90b0cb473876980.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên
rel-038773b1b8504e1db90b0cb473876980.description: The one-member limited liability company is recognized legally upon receiving the certificate of business registration.

rel-f3c2f10efb4f03278ddaaf14a4234c28.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-f3c2f10efb4f03278ddaaf14a4234c28.description: The Sổ đăng ký cổ đông must be established from the time the company receives the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.

rel-8bc82a101827dd9df85d4988eee6e84c.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-8bc82a101827dd9df85d4988eee6e84c.description: Công ty cổ phần gains legal entity status upon receiving the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần obtains legal status from the date it is issued a Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần receives a business registration certificate after completing its formation.
rel-8bc82a101827dd9df85d4988eee6e84c.keywords: document issuance,legal entity status,legal registration,legal status,registration

rel-1d37895614c9c1509a0651281d748c94.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-1d37895614c9c1509a0651281d748c94.tgt_id: Cơ sở dữ liệu quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-1d37895614c9c1509a0651281d748c94.description: Cơ sở dữ liệu quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp tracks the legal status of registered businesses, including the issuance of the Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp.

rel-4f3201797090b70db4344e5782e94237.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-4f3201797090b70db4344e5782e94237.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-4f3201797090b70db4344e5782e94237.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn receives a business registration certificate after completing its conversion.

rel-cfdf012fa3035683ad6fdfd16d5fad2b.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-cfdf012fa3035683ad6fdfd16d5fad2b.description: Chính phủ sets the procedures for revoking the business registration certificate.<SEP>Chính phủ defines the procedures for revoking a business's registration certificate.

rel-c785a9ccc2d3f6a828fa6c6a31955188.src_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-c785a9ccc2d3f6a828fa6c6a31955188.description: The revocation of the business registration certificate can lead to the dissolution of a business.

rel-5538b49c6d725c94dba9c28a6b1d859a.src_id: Hồ sơ đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-5538b49c6d725c94dba9c28a6b1d859a.description: Đиều 26 specifies the responsibility of the Business Registration Application to be submitted to the Business Registration Authority for registering a business.

rel-92c6bcb83aaba31935ff417daf826dce.src_id: Hồ sơ đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-92c6bcb83aaba31935ff417daf826dce.description: A business entity must submit valid and complete registration documents.

rel-ccc829c42d2bc30cfc690d11ced98286.description: The owner of the company is responsible for contributing the registered capital and is liable for the company's financial obligations.

rel-b3d733639eec46fff470f1dcffd011d5.description: Công ty can increase or decrease its registered capital, referred to as Vốn điều lệ.<SEP>Công ty must adjust its registered capital based on the payment status of shares by Cổ đông.

rel-0437c8bce0ac424afd5d550b7eb1cf44.description: Công ty cổ phần's registered capital is determined by the total face value of shares sold.

rel-9547cb29bb41853037ba5aa029f43a9f.tgt_id: Hành Vi Pháp Lý Đơn Phương
rel-9547cb29bb41853037ba5aa029f43a9f.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam governs the legal acts of individuals and legal entities in the context of unilateral legal actions.

rel-f06c4f52486b67ce5ec83c484dc825af.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam determines the obligations to return assets or benefits obtained without legal basis.

rel-5a07412a5aff4e65581c0b02eb5ab97a.tgt_id: Thực Hiện Công Việc Không Có Ủy Quyền
rel-5a07412a5aff4e65581c0b02eb5ab97a.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam governs the performance of tasks without authorization.

rel-75bdb0d5ece9ed258154fddb01652271.tgt_id: Bồi Thường Thiệt Hại Ngoài Hợp Đồng
rel-75bdb0d5ece9ed258154fddb01652271.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam governs the compensation for damages outside of a contract.

rel-d38a987c3305c7efa13591dc4a1af4db.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam outlines the transitional provisions for civil transactions established before the new law takes effect.

rel-b2b374ce6617bcd85b3c08659c05e76f.description: Pháp Luật Việt Nam governs the legal framework for civil transactions, including their content and form.

rel-df5cc90f3f6d029f70416c2465361af4.description: The transitional provisions specify the continued application of Bộ Luật Dân Sự Số 33/2005/QH11 for certain civil transactions.

rel-e7e2712a1b4909a6c7559671c6c067e2.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the parent company and its managers.

rel-35ccd5a420c771cb41b0bf2849f65459.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the subsidiary company and its managers.

rel-cf3476feb6fedfe3b41e6f42e8d0d18a.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include managers of private enterprises and companies.

rel-f45b8bcaad8033961a32138ca49dfaa9.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include individuals or organizations that establish or contribute capital to establish a business.

rel-b46114b146b1dcafdf4e248d8a91a2df.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include foreign individuals or organizations as defined by the Investment Law.

rel-0202ad6524406324a1ed03b033976ab4.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include those with the ability to control the business through ownership or capital contribution.

rel-f56595cff4ce94f8f82fbe298baf6560.tgt_id: Sản Phẩm, Dịch Vụ Công Ích
rel-f56595cff4ce94f8f82fbe298baf6560.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include those involved in essential products and services for the economic and social life of the country, locality, or community.

rel-6e96ca0e6e71dbcc3ec43ee99f42713d.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include individuals or organizations that own a part or the entire registered capital of a limited liability company or partnership.

rel-a0593c80545a7e38f2cc21721259558d.tgt_id: Thành Viên Công Ty Hợp Danh
rel-a0593c80545a7e38f2cc21721259558d.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include members of a partnership, including general partners and capital contributors.

rel-b03ffc71d2121dfa8f8655de708ac506.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include those with voting rights on issues within the authority of the board of members or the general meeting of shareholders.

rel-a0073969d09a7f1c73644dc4da94dd1b.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the biological father of managers and legal representatives.

rel-64dbc4c514b531444d92e762d5398b87.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the biological mother of managers and legal representatives.

rel-bcf54cf43dd2a111a1dc11c20b5dac64.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the adoptive father of managers and legal representatives.

rel-9d8018e8344d123189565d68895c9252.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the adoptive mother of managers and legal representatives.

rel-f0069a0f4d3b9909c6f03870eda82597.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the husband's father of managers and legal representatives.

rel-b5d3f8d94ff0aa2ac437ef80efcdaa1f.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the husband's mother of managers and legal representatives.

rel-f2450c05a4fc971385b4f1b4e9220eb3.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the wife's father of managers and legal representatives.

rel-f2f24616ab976bd3e38ee924577800a8.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the wife's mother of managers and legal representatives.

rel-fe771cafd21c2bc1c4c44c8e0ea9b102.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the biological child of managers and legal representatives.

rel-2f1068282644cf606b0fd3392850b042.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the adopted child of managers and legal representatives.

rel-c257b1356683abd73f18543cddf8a7f6.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the son-in-law of managers and legal representatives.

rel-4f4ca264b59abd30365688536ef988af.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the daughter-in-law of managers and legal representatives.

rel-4a8d7310453d2aac023813675c344941.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the biological sibling of managers and legal representatives.

rel-700999a65302b7a60c83298e54247667.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the brother-in-law of managers and legal representatives.

rel-25c51f3b641546a4af1946b2002b3931.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the sister-in-law of managers and legal representatives.

rel-8eed0588b0c6f088a77c2fc357a33aa2.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the brother-in-law of managers and legal representatives.

rel-d9fa36c0b0078eaf00f1e08345b655c1.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the wife's biological brother of managers and legal representatives.

rel-3a5b0709d448b154fc29a5514687ca7d.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include the husband's biological brother of managers and legal representatives.

rel-d4ae64ed88d926f2eb9c9c3924d9abda.tgt_id: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Một Thành Viên
rel-d4ae64ed88d926f2eb9c9c3924d9abda.description: Transactions between the company and related individuals must be recorded and kept as a separate file of the company.

rel-8c524f0b2ad7c63c3e4494851f1a8ab9.description: An economic group or holding company is a group of companies with interrelated ownership through shares or other forms of association, and a parent company has significant control over a subsidiary.

rel-8090f4b77aa7ba0f61b22dfad2d0c973.description: A parent company has significant control over a subsidiary through share ownership or decision-making power.<SEP>Công Ty Mẹ has responsibilities and rights towards its subsidiary, Công Ty Con.

rel-784bd5d89ec47d21374ea378c8e1e060.description: Chính Phủ provides detailed regulations for the actions of the parent company, Công Ty Mẹ.

rel-f24ac09df4384fdcd95362f183f11b14.description: Chủ Nợ has the right to demand compensation from the parent company, Công Ty Mẹ, on behalf of the subsidiary.

rel-4c036b13046cdcf94e2830365aa393fd.description: Thành Viên, Cổ Đông have the right to demand compensation from the parent company, Công Ty Mẹ, on behalf of the subsidiary.

rel-3ee3f72e48daad35591ba94e4cbb227a.tgt_id: Báo Cáo Tài Chính Hợp Nhất
rel-3ee3f72e48daad35591ba94e4cbb227a.description: Công Ty Mẹ is responsible for preparing the consolidated financial report, Báo Cáo Tài Chính Hợp Nhất, which includes the financial information of both the parent and subsidiary companies.

rel-0514ce24b857106af2c3ff04c3dc48ca.tgt_id: Báo Cáo Tổng Hợp Kết Quả Kinh Doanh
rel-0514ce24b857106af2c3ff04c3dc48ca.description: Công Ty Mẹ is responsible for preparing the report that summarizes the annual business results of both the parent and subsidiary companies, Báo Cáo Tổng Hợp Kết Quả Kinh Doanh.

rel-a8025a1af95661ba5215f98bc41d1613.tgt_id: Báo Cáo Tổng Hợp Công Tác Quản Lý, Điều Hành
rel-a8025a1af95661ba5215f98bc41d1613.description: Công Ty Mẹ is responsible for preparing the report that summarizes the management and operation activities of both the parent and subsidiary companies, Báo Cáo Tổng Hợp Công Tác Quản Lý, Điều Hành.

rel-e64130c4479581ea8c8fa23a4b4e1d64.description: The board of directors is responsible for making decisions and managing the operations of a subsidiary company.

rel-fefb17b425ccc359197b016645cdcea3.description: The director is a senior manager responsible for the operations of a subsidiary company.

rel-0f6b9c21a85a56e3f56f4d9e5fd93d16.description: The general director is a senior manager responsible for the operations of a subsidiary company.

rel-4496c10a14fe647f3590a26587bf8f38.tgt_id: Người Quản Lý Công Ty Mẹ
rel-4496c10a14fe647f3590a26587bf8f38.description: Người Quản Lý Công Ty Mẹ is responsible for the actions taken towards the subsidiary, Công Ty Con.

rel-3ff5f2754a25eabba859dd117ad1d954.tgt_id: Báo Cáo Tổng Hợp Về Mua, Bán và Giao Dịch Khác với Công Ty Mẹ
rel-3ff5f2754a25eabba859dd117ad1d954.description: Công Ty Con is responsible for preparing the report that summarizes the transactions between the subsidiary and the parent company, Báo Cáo Tổng Hợp Về Mua, Bán và Giao Dịch Khác với Công Ty Mẹ.

rel-f8ce07bda45b4fae2f306c7a0e890f4e.description: Thành Viên contributes capital to the company and is liable for the company's debts within the scope of their contributions.

rel-9a90a2fcb206e445c684d732e401a672.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên
rel-9a90a2fcb206e445c684d732e401a672.description: Capital contribution is required for the formation of a limited liability company with two or more members.<SEP>Phần vốn góp is a concept applicable to Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên.

rel-dec7fcd05e28080f55b30ce44ff080a0.description: People or organizations with direct or indirect relationships to a business include foreign organizations established abroad under foreign law.

rel-9a0f41db7eb0429fc9fa97ab2fa76eb8.description: Cổ đông sáng lập are the founding shareholders of a Doanh nghiệp.

rel-48d6dd91160ad2787accf3f98612dd1b.tgt_id: Cổ đông là nhà đầu tư nước ngoài
rel-48d6dd91160ad2787accf3f98612dd1b.description: Cổ đông là nhà đầu tư nước ngoài are foreign investors who are shareholders in a Doanh nghiệp.

rel-43585a6c47c06ce4ddda18658b27ef2b.description: Ngành, nghề kinh doanh refers to the business sectors or industries in which a Doanh nghiệp operates.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp must include information about the business sectors and industries in which it operates in its registration information.

rel-38552c78428f3f8b59a1cc347238df9b.description: Sổ đăng ký cổ đông is the shareholder register of a Doanh nghiệp.

rel-e414bae56c0e3e9febc32d0190755424.description: Hồ sơ are the documents and records required for the registration and change of a Doanh nghiệp's registration content.

rel-4ea63a50ff94b30aa148571a511ea2d6.tgt_id: Thủ tục đăng ký thay đổi
rel-4ea63a50ff94b30aa148571a511ea2d6.description: Thủ tục đăng ký thay đổi are the procedures for registering changes in a Doanh nghiệp's registration content.

rel-bd14a520fbe27d7e69a1bd3b4a048bea.description: Trụ sở chính is the main office or headquarters of a Doanh nghiệp.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp has a main office located within the territory of Vietnam.

rel-421be1d92542bbade21b418d49a6ba60.description: A business entity is assigned a unique Business Registration Number upon establishment.

rel-b606143432a0139c71da3b07b2704d5a.tgt_id: Ngành, nghề đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-b606143432a0139c71da3b07b2704d5a.description: A business entity must register its industry and business activities, which must not be prohibited by law.

rel-79e52e0ee4c3035302c7e009bf5082c6.tgt_id: Lệ phí đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-79e52e0ee4c3035302c7e009bf5082c6.description: A business entity must pay the registration fee according to the law.

rel-c2f0688a0294103be1b854d3eacbbaeb.tgt_id: Cổng thông tin quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-c2f0688a0294103be1b854d3eacbbaeb.description: Doanh nghiệp must publicly announce its registration information on the National Portal for Business Registration.<SEP>Cổng thông tin quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp is used to publicly announce the dissolution of the business entity.

rel-73703fa9dca267c511c429980f89d463.description: Doanh nghiệp receives capital contribution assets from members and shareholders, which must be transferred to the company.

rel-f38921e44b5da51eb3e508ce4c758e40.tgt_id: Danh sách cổ đông sáng lập
rel-f38921e44b5da51eb3e508ce4c758e40.description: Doanh nghiệp must include the list of founding shareholders in its registration information.

rel-792f18fdc2f590be2d141fddeca21780.tgt_id: Danh sách cổ đông là nhà đầu tư nước ngoài
rel-792f18fdc2f590be2d141fddeca21780.description: Doanh nghiệp must include the list of foreign investor shareholders in its registration information.

rel-dd867d3506e131934a1b758f9d4f0ac6.description: Doanh nghiệp uses a seal or digital signature in business transactions.

rel-02e528c9468625dff19d6cb7ea1cf031.description: Doanh nghiệp can establish branches that perform all or part of the business entity's functions.

rel-8f7875f63926c70d1029fc416e9ea1f2.description: Doanh nghiệp conducts specific business activities at designated business locations.

rel-8b8d1a4f3993de4bc634bc52ec976f9f.tgt_id: Hồ sơ đăng ký hoạt động
rel-8b8d1a4f3993de4bc634bc52ec976f9f.description: Doanh nghiệp submits a registration file to the registration authority for the establishment of branches or representative offices.

rel-25e90b077344eacf15d013d0976d1a35.description: Business entities must follow regulations concerning the conditions and circumstances for their dissolution.

rel-6b7870693c20ed31b5baa1391db75cbe.description: Business entities must fulfill contracts signed with customers and employees during the period of temporary suspension.

rel-93604480840ee2dea6a33ad08117ded9.description: Doanh nghiệp must pay off debts, including taxes, after the termination of a branch.

rel-4078b0702f8c6ea80216aba9ba05f979.tgt_id: Giải quyết đủ quyền lợi hợp pháp cho người lao động
rel-4078b0702f8c6ea80216aba9ba05f979.description: Doanh nghiệp must ensure the legal rights of employees who worked at the terminated branch.

rel-bc39d5e04bc05145f5510463855c9561.description: Người quản lý is responsible for ensuring the business entity's debts are settled before dissolution.

rel-6afa1b315f9d74345f2573416c7ccf55.description: Doanh nghiệp must not be involved in dispute resolution processes at Trọng tài during dissolution.

rel-25efa20167a20f4e8cd0386ab187c6ea.description: Chủ doanh nghiệp tư nhân is the owner and manager of the business entity.

rel-a53f91f46146863e1f876713359e4cf3.tgt_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên
rel-a53f91f46146863e1f876713359e4cf3.description: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên leads the board of members in managing the business entity.

rel-f0bcc2bbe2beb867b9da8e2417c932eb.tgt_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị
rel-f0bcc2bbe2beb867b9da8e2417c932eb.description: Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị leads the board of directors in managing the business entity.

rel-198095f317612f87bc5b1a29776a7f81.description: Cơ quan thuế is responsible for ensuring the business entity complies with tax regulations.<SEP>Doanh nghiệp must notify Cơ quan thuế of its activities.

rel-25805f1b2bf0944af991e8b5f3866e58.description: Chủ nợ are creditors of the business entity and must be informed of the dissolution process.

rel-66aa97fa5d552e283056a15371f9b354.tgt_id: Cơ sở dữ liệu quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-66aa97fa5d552e283056a15371f9b354.description: Cơ sở dữ liệu quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp is used to update the legal status of the business entity during the dissolution process.

rel-f9701f4bfb9e0024635b7a0f90ca2b16.description: Nghị quyết is a resolution document used in the process of dissolving the business entity.

rel-aa2b9b4f76df327a9349b8f3dadfadbd.tgt_id: Quyết định giải thể doanh nghiệp
rel-aa2b9b4f76df327a9349b8f3dadfadbd.description: Quyết định giải thể doanh nghiệp is a decision document used in the process of dissolving the business entity.

rel-9d53749cb4c2a638c72ce92152fa8341.description: Biên bản họp is a meeting minutes document used in the process of dissolving the business entity.

rel-3767b89e04debe39b9c658cae1bf960c.description: Phương án giải quyết nợ is a debt resolution plan document used in the process of dissolving the  business entity.

rel-8d789a147e039c0eaa75bf0d660fbba0.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-8d789a147e039c0eaa75bf0d660fbba0.description: Phần vốn góp is a concept applicable to Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.

rel-9f8f742676378d4c45db3bbb62353ede.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-9f8f742676378d4c45db3bbb62353ede.description: Điều lệ công ty is the charter for a Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.

rel-d2237bc469700e092d7d8aca4f5ea2a3.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-d2237bc469700e092d7d8aca4f5ea2a3.description: Doanh nghiệp Nhà nước can be organized under the form of a Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.

rel-47d10f9c5332fde6157181e2130c6764.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-47d10f9c5332fde6157181e2130c6764.description: Doanh nghiệp tư nhân can be converted into a Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn.

rel-92e14c5ed3e836dd42b0f2d97692e03b.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-92e14c5ed3e836dd42b0f2d97692e03b.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn can convert into a Công ty cổ phần and must register this conversion with the business registration agency.

rel-877441c940fba97fae647d4d17510a9c.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-877441c940fba97fae647d4d17510a9c.tgt_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-877441c940fba97fae647d4d17510a9c.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn must register its conversion with the business registration agency, which updates the company's legal status in the National Database on Business Registration.

rel-deaaae01f585e670f711a8e1031a0c98.src_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-deaaae01f585e670f711a8e1031a0c98.description: Điều 202 outlines the procedures for the conversion of limited liability companies into joint-stock companies, including the registration and legal status updates.

rel-acb8ca39a68b92f72e4a8813654ff064.description: Doanh nghiệp Nhà nước can be organized under the form of a Công ty cổ phần.

rel-7194816c781ab7f453499f560b9073f0.description: Công ty cổ phần is responsible for maintaining the Sổ đăng ký cổ đông.<SEP>Sổ đăng ký cổ đông records the ownership of shares in a company.

rel-93462cd2cd9c6db630da7bee6e590f87.description: Công ty cổ phần must comply with the requirements of the Điều lệ công ty regarding the maintenance of the Sổ đăng ký cổ đông.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty contains rules and regulations for the company's operations.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty is the charter of the company that specifies the rules and regulations.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần must publish the Điều lệ công ty on its electronic information site.

rel-1b40878a7c5861bbd2b5283842582553.description: Cổ đông sáng lập are the founding shareholders of a company and have specific rights and obligations.

rel-e35c736697fc948007587b412df49164.description: Cổ phiếu is a share certificate issued by a company and represents ownership.

rel-34e6b27a6bf470cd0209d6a41eea51d1.description: Công ty cổ phần issues and manages shares as part of its capital structure.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần divides its registered capital into equal parts called Cổ phần, which are owned by shareholders.<SEP>Cổ phần represents shares in a company, which can be owned by individuals or organizations.<SEP>Cổ phần are shares in a company that can be purchased and sold.
rel-34e6b27a6bf470cd0209d6a41eea51d1.keywords: company shares,equity division,financial regulation,ownership,ownership structure,share issuance,shareholding

rel-a946ad13b70c60834185f3b18988858d.description: Công ty cổ phần's capital management is regulated by Điều 112.

rel-920e31d8ad03defd431f28a2ada981b5.description: Công ty cổ phần's operations are regulated by Điều 133.

rel-41f2ae8a4bc0426abe81a77fd6bc8c4e.description: Công ty cổ phần's capital management is regulated by Điều 113.

rel-e1698b959623ac2ec2e2e0b78ef65df1.description: Công ty cổ phần has the right to issue Trái phiếu and other securities.<SEP>Trái phiếu are bonds issued by a company that can be converted into shares.

rel-0771e3108a82b65991cd98245dbb5a1a.description: Điều 111 defines the characteristics and rights of a Công ty cổ phần.

rel-536c10a44d60d32b2651258140ed2fcc.description: Điều 125 regulates the private placement of shares in a company that is not publicly traded.

rel-2acc3ce71d7f5881c0b8b0944b95f715.description: Điều 126 regulates the sale of shares in a company.

rel-4f724bc0e0c91639dadeaf0edae5dc28.description: Điều 127 regulates the transfer of shares in a company.

rel-80bf2ec3e2e2f8d4247db1ffd084c4e3.description: Hội đồng quản trị is the board of directors that manages the company.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị is the board of directors of a company.

rel-7253148a3f327c93242b35cc28d9f191.description: Đồng Việt Nam is the national currency of Vietnam used for transactions in the company.

rel-e5909c6b2d5f0047a8d309fa2db5635a.tgt_id: Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi
rel-e5909c6b2d5f0047a8d309fa2db5635a.description: Ngoại tệ tự do chuyển đổi refers to freely convertible foreign currencies used for transactions in the company.

rel-096badcf0790745a9e4fe975185d2261.description: Vàng is gold used as a form of payment in the company.

rel-20783ba5c537049d49e3f937ac1dcb40.description: Quyền sử dụng đất is the right to use land used as a form of payment in the company.

rel-405a2bdf540fad0ac60bc84555fd75a2.description: Công nghệ is technology used as a form of payment in the company.

rel-06e82f6c590c5c26acc7e851202742fe.description: Bí quyết kỹ thuật is technical know-how used as a form of payment in the company.

rel-d764642cbf9f94c2c3e2078ff1cce544.description: Tài sản khác is other assets used as a form of payment in the company.

rel-d9b70ccbb33983f57c6f3ed5c58b35c7.description: Tổ chức thẩm định giá is an organization that provides valuation services for transactions in the company.

rel-5114ac016235b4c61511c4b64a66f068.description: Công ty cổ phần must register changes to its capital within 10 days after converting bonds into shares.

rel-7c42400b246da51a307567b361e1f812.description: Công ty cổ phần must communicate the decision to repurchase shares within 30 days to all shareholders.

rel-fcd434d441500807c187a5976e7af265.description: Công ty cổ phần must repurchase shares within 90 days after receiving a shareholder's request.

rel-7edcb7ebfcc965b0de96b581b2d223a6.tgt_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-7edcb7ebfcc965b0de96b581b2d223a6.description: Công ty cổ phần must register and report to Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh regarding changes in ownership and other relevant information.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần must register its formation with the business registration agency, which updates the company's legal status in the National Database on Business Registration.

rel-21f0b9b0e6142a15edadb01c6b97ece0.description: Công ty cổ phần must submit the Báo cáo kiểm toán to the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-7c54baffb8461052bb70a58a8c61b683.tgt_id: Trụ sở chính của công ty
rel-7c54baffb8461052bb70a58a8c61b683.description: Công ty cổ phần must store certain reports at the Trụ sở chính of the company.

rel-e2ff8173cf3c7a488229bf776b98a924.description: Công ty cổ phần must comply with the regulations outlined in the Luật về kế toán.

rel-30d798f3386dc73941a997f5764deb18.description: Công ty cổ phần must publish the Sơ yếu lý lịch of the members of the Hội đồng quản trị, Kiểm soát viên, Giám đốc, or Tổng giám đốc on its electronic information site.

rel-e2b249632dad9ce3a24fa1558c0c7918.tgt_id: Báo cáo đánh giá kết quả hoạt động hằng năm
rel-e2b249632dad9ce3a24fa1558c0c7918.description: Công ty cổ phần must publish the Báo cáo đánh giá kết quả hoạt động hằng năm on its electronic information site.

rel-2ce1831b4be96a831193e2e05b7013cd.description: Doanh nghiệp tư nhân can be converted into a Công ty cổ phần.

rel-7c8a14be0db1e2944b4baf6aef1db793.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên
rel-7c8a14be0db1e2944b4baf6aef1db793.description: A joint-stock company can be converted into a single-member limited liability company.

rel-aa3a688e1842ed83708511b0693e6d46.description: An organization can receive the transfer of all shares from a joint-stock company.

rel-3e128c6335621023fe3d82a140ed6403.description: Article 203 provides the legal framework for converting a joint-stock company into a single-member limited liability company.

rel-db9ac190a729c73028d61c507eef9be3.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên
rel-db9ac190a729c73028d61c507eef9be3.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên inherits all legal rights and obligations of the công ty cổ phần after conversion.<SEP>Công ty cổ phần can be converted into a công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên through various methods.

rel-4fc74af99b165df5a5f4e03d3664a96b.description: The articles of association include the total value of capital contributions made by members.<SEP>The rules and regulations regarding Phần vốn góp are outlined in the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-a2efd7aa9f0605d3868b726b4605a5e3.description: Thành Viên's rights and responsibilities within the company are governed by the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-d76833bdc011b7223da9950704c55a4d.description: The company charter is the internal document that outlines the responsibilities and procedures within the company.<SEP>Công ty must follow the rules and regulations outlined in the Điều lệ công ty.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty outlines the rules and regulations governing the company's operations.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty outlines the rights and obligations of the company's members.

rel-20a7b8ccb2b73a7f0204604c1db1a9dd.description: Hội đồng Thành viên is guided by the Điều lệ công ty in making decisions and overseeing the company.<SEP>Hội đồng Thành viên follows the rules and procedures outlined in the company's charter or bylaws.

rel-2daae770f14e7c2eab54b51950fb99fb.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên
rel-2daae770f14e7c2eab54b51950fb99fb.description: Điều lệ công ty is the charter for a Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty outlines the structure, operations, and responsibilities of the company's management.

rel-afaeaafcbc72828e6ab39c60c37cc910.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên
rel-afaeaafcbc72828e6ab39c60c37cc910.description: Điều lệ công ty is the charter for a Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên.

rel-93c48c9c2394263846bef1dc61b4f1da.tgt_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên
rel-93c48c9c2394263846bef1dc61b4f1da.description: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên must follow the procedures outlined in the company's charter or bylaws for convening meetings.

rel-ea784dc9b751c124064c5caba360abf1.description: The owner of the company has rights and responsibilities as defined by the company's charter.

rel-4d69e50af218ef7a08b35b8b2b7f2d55.description: The General Director must comply with the company charter and is responsible for managing the company's daily business operations.

rel-28d3809cbc118c932a15f974d4cd38aa.description: The Director must comply with the company charter and is responsible for managing the company's daily business operations.<SEP>Điều lệ công ty defines the rights and obligations of the Giám đốc or Tổng giám đốc.

rel-09cce43f58fc9e41d5b026863e011bf1.description: The Chairman of the company must comply with the company charter and is responsible for representing the owner and the company.

rel-265e2146eb3d7b5dde30c62f304a0723.tgt_id: Chủ tịch và thành viên khác của Hội đồng thành viên
rel-265e2146eb3d7b5dde30c62f304a0723.description: The Board of Members must adhere to the company's charter.

rel-525aac2c0e15fce1a1464c7835b24872.description: The company charter (Điều lệ công ty) specifies the exact ratio required for passing resolutions or decisions (Nghị quyết, quyết định) by the Board of Members.

rel-7dd312cffcfa2669ff809ba120e2df04.tgt_id: Người được quyền mua cổ phần ưu đãi
rel-7dd312cffcfa2669ff809ba120e2df04.description: Điều lệ công ty, or the company's charter, regulates who has the right to purchase Cổ phần ưu đãi, or preferred shares.

rel-1a60ddc4652348397421b2457417ebbf.description: Điều lệ công ty, or the company's charter, defines the types of Cổ phần ưu đãi, or preferred shares, and their regulations.

rel-66f47d557602b5a507ed0c5adfbb77c2.description: The rights and obligations of common shareholders are specified in the company's articles of association and laws.<SEP>The company's articles of association may contain specific provisions regarding the nomination of individuals to the Board of Directors and Supervisory Board by common shareholders.

rel-b1eca3a0826635904e54bcf4c887fbac.description: The Deputy Director's number and authority are defined in the company's charter.

rel-619babe30e6a26916e13db81283e6150.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi cổ tức
rel-619babe30e6a26916e13db81283e6150.description: Điều lệ công ty specifies the rules for Cổ phần ưu đãi cổ tức shares.

rel-5a02c635c967385b11ddcaf3cd5450fd.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi hoàn lại
rel-5a02c635c967385b11ddcaf3cd5450fd.description: Điều lệ công ty specifies the rules for Cổ phần ưu đãi hoàn lại shares.

rel-e1ffff2ad6f7ebb7e8207fa74708d2cd.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi biểu quyết
rel-e1ffff2ad6f7ebb7e8207fa74708d2cd.description: Điều lệ công ty specifies the rules for Cổ phần ưu đãi biểu quyết shares.

rel-da6f92de116bbb8e56cf3ba458baf7e8.tgt_id: Thẩm quyền và thể thức lấy ý kiến cổ đông
rel-da6f92de116bbb8e56cf3ba458baf7e8.description: Điều lệ công ty may have different regulations regarding the process of obtaining shareholder opinions in writing.

rel-92b90b3381b1b62f934864a80cd5181c.description: The Hội đồng quản trị operates within the framework set by the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-7cf7c7ac8b296c7be85362dfa490b090.description: The Ban kiểm soát operates within the framework set by the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-76e8b441e3e978d15f1ee1a6b840d3f7.description: The company's charter or bylaws contain the rules or regulations that govern the company's operations.

rel-1b2b53d7b9d51973628d395ba738179b.tgt_id: Cuộc họp Hội đồng quản trị
rel-1b2b53d7b9d51973628d395ba738179b.description: The Articles of Association provide the rules and procedures for convening and conducting the Board of Directors meeting.

rel-ae0b5485276e153cc0ce9ec5ce32b225.description: Kiểm soát viên must comply with the rules and regulations outlined in Điều lệ công ty when performing their duties.

rel-7223eae5bf8a115362531ca80bdbd4e3.description: The rights and obligations of the Trưởng Ban kiểm soát are defined by the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-fda5eabec751bab9f2a3779395afabb2.tgt_id: Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc
rel-fda5eabec751bab9f2a3779395afabb2.description: The Director or General Director must comply with and execute the company's charter.

rel-5d34c7cd48f82945131be43d893246c9.description: The decision-making process of the Audit Committee is governed by the company's charter or bylaws.

rel-3948eff03c5e05148329337791189a3d.description: Thư ký công ty must adhere to and comply with the rules outlined in the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-a4a4685a23808532614413849fc2fc4a.tgt_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị
rel-a4a4685a23808532614413849fc2fc4a.description: Chủ tịch Hội đồng quản trị must adhere to and comply with the rules outlined in the Điều lệ công ty.

rel-52f3b287a710adc8030b2b07f4160448.tgt_id: Thông báo thay đổi nội dung đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-52f3b287a710adc8030b2b07f4160448.description: Trọng tài can issue decisions that affect the notification of changes in business registration content.

rel-97f4822946643809866b83a8d9e0ecb6.description: Trọng tài can make decisions regarding the validity of company resolutions.<SEP>Nghị quyết can also be challenged by Trọng tài, which can invalidate the resolution.

rel-f001779dda638a1117a3b9e7f916db16.tgt_id: Quyết định hủy bỏ nghị quyết
rel-f001779dda638a1117a3b9e7f916db16.description: Trọng tài can also make a Quyết định hủy bỏ nghị quyết to invalidate a resolution.

rel-f15c5914024c42dbef712d98fd9bb0fe.description: Nguyên đơn initiates the dispute resolution process at Trọng tài.

rel-08f7c3a5dd57e612adee2c4d6450a131.description: Hội đồng trọng tài is part of the Trọng tài process for resolving disputes.

rel-2ef7134d5721c0eb1a9c05f2c8907887.description: Hội đồng quản trị is involved in the valuation of assets contributed to capital in joint-stock companies.

rel-e7f9faebd81bcb5f5d126b53b42c7fd3.description: Common shareholders have the right to request the Audit Committee to review specific issues related to the management and operation of the company.<SEP>The Board of Directors is responsible for managing the company and making decisions, and its actions can be reviewed by shareholders.<SEP>Common shareholders have the right to nominate individuals to the Board of Directors.
rel-e7f9faebd81bcb5f5d126b53b42c7fd3.keywords: governance,management oversight,management responsibility,nomination rights,rights to request review

rel-040e7ebff6adf81cef273a66d7d97932.description: Documents and evidence must be provided regarding violations by the Board of Directors.

rel-ca0599aea14ba7da7adcf437068e03f4.description: Nguyễn Huy Tưởng is a member of the Hội đồng quản trị and is responsible for enforcing the timely payment of shares by shareholders.

rel-c629e486d907c9a4f24d46570e76a441.description: Hội đồng quản trị can decide to repurchase up to 10% of the shares of each type within a 12-month period.

rel-3984f0b81eceb9c0e9f964bc9210b8d1.description: Công ty is managed by the Hội đồng quản trị, which is responsible for making key decisions and overseeing the management of the company.

rel-d80e1c5a4b5ede5d0b97c3bf4c9954b3.tgt_id: Quy chế hoạt động Hội đồng quản trị
rel-d80e1c5a4b5ede5d0b97c3bf4c9954b3.description: Quy chế hoạt động Hội đồng quản trị outlines the procedures and responsibilities for the board's activities.

rel-9811106cce72d44b77ae64882821364c.description: At least 20% of the board members must be independent members in certain company structures.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị includes independent members who are not involved in the company's management.

rel-f95264290d953ac5fb79ce24167eb4d6.description: The audit committee is directly under the board of directors and is responsible for overseeing the financial activities of the company.<SEP>The Audit Committee oversees and has authority over certain financial and internal control matters, reporting to the Board of Directors.<SEP>Ủy ban kiểm toán is a specialized committee under the Hội đồng quản trị responsible for auditing and monitoring the company's financial reports and internal controls.

rel-ef007bbc3c8cb064a96f00296ad98372.description: The secretary of the company supports the organization of meetings of the Board of Directors.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị appoints the Thư ký công ty to assist in administrative duties and support the board's activities.<SEP>Thư ký công ty supports the Hội đồng quản trị in administrative duties and assists in the board's activities.

rel-eecfd1dcde2eeea09e02e693697fced9.description: Kiểm soát viên has the right to access information and reports from Hội đồng quản trị and is responsible for overseeing the company's operations.<SEP>Kiểm soát viên cannot be a family member of the members of Hội đồng quản trị.

rel-288ce277853074517dc38495204fd84a.description: Ban kiểm soát supervises the management and operations of the company, including the activities of the Hội đồng quản trị.<SEP>Hội đồng quản trị oversees the activities of the Ban kiểm soát to ensure compliance with regulations.

rel-c72ff2c06b1bdab1e1ca4f8e9af615ec.tgt_id: Báo cáo kết quả kinh doanh
rel-c72ff2c06b1bdab1e1ca4f8e9af615ec.description: Hội đồng quản trị must submit the Báo cáo kết quả kinh doanh to the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-0178fbfec4acdd6ced9585f0c635d062.description: Hội đồng quản trị must submit the Báo cáo tài chính to the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-c067c4c4b4fa3efef1f831fcbaad3c05.tgt_id: Báo cáo đánh giá công tác quản lý
rel-c067c4c4b4fa3efef1f831fcbaad3c05.description: Hội đồng quản trị must submit the Báo cáo đánh giá công tác quản lý to the Đại hội đồng cổ đông.

rel-321e531a1fd64fc3f3f42110ba53050b.tgt_id: Giám đốc hoặc Tổng giám đốc
rel-321e531a1fd64fc3f3f42110ba53050b.description: The Board of Directors appoints or hires the Director or General Director and oversees their activities.

rel-ed7fae3ff159c662818013631553dd75.description: Giám đốc is responsible for the overall management of the company and is overseen by the Hội đồng quản trị.

rel-aff34bf86275176b84a66ce17eecaa0c.description: Tổng giám đốc is responsible for the highest-level management of the company and is overseen by the Hội đồng quản trị.

rel-a600374e561d3448807bc218e876d7f8.tgt_id: Thành viên Hội đồng quản trị
rel-a600374e561d3448807bc218e876d7f8.description: Thành viên Hội đồng quản trị is a member of the Hội đồng quản trị and has specific responsibilities within the company.

rel-f70ca8cb801a4beef5a7258462102ecd.description: Người quản lý khác has responsibilities within the company and is overseen by the Hội đồng quản trị.

rel-0765747fb6da76943747f59939f581fa.tgt_id: Thành viên Hội đồng quản trị không điều hành
rel-0765747fb6da76943747f59939f581fa.description: Hội đồng quản trị includes non-operational members who do not have management responsibilities.

rel-f10917b82f83017dfc5418c11a17e69d.tgt_id: Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Quản Trị
rel-f10917b82f83017dfc5418c11a17e69d.description: Hội Đồng Quản Trị elects the Chủ Tịch Hội Đồng Quản Trị to lead the board.

rel-0e7edd0459ef5fed90d6b49280712dae.tgt_id: Thành Viên Độc Lập Hội Đồng Quản Trị
rel-0e7edd0459ef5fed90d6b49280712dae.description: Independent board members must meet specific standards and conditions and report to the board of directors.

rel-6f97cd3597cc210abecdcaeb59f16a05.tgt_id: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Một Thành Viên
rel-6f97cd3597cc210abecdcaeb59f16a05.description: The owner of a company can decide on the increase or decrease of the registered capital.

rel-e11fc84474059691fc2a9d2fcc7a41e4.description: The owner of the company may be responsible for the costs associated with initiating a lawsuit under certain conditions.

rel-b9429cd12a5e89c574fc4ab2552c41de.tgt_id: Quyền của chủ sở hữu công ty
rel-b9429cd12a5e89c574fc4ab2552c41de.description: The owner of the company has specific rights and decision-making powers over various aspects of the company's operations.

rel-5982469eb64ce4e8e42216196d7dd39f.tgt_id: Hồ sơ giải thể doanh nghiệp
rel-5982469eb64ce4e8e42216196d7dd39f.description: The owner of the company is responsible for the accuracy of the dissolution file.

rel-0d908607229fcafcddb9eb5ef2cbf05c.src_id: Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật
rel-0d908607229fcafcddb9eb5ef2cbf05c.description: Người Đại Diện Theo Pháp Luật is governed by the responsibilities outlined in Điều 13.

rel-58d51c03303d95756c1e8510ca7d4d75.src_id: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền
rel-58d51c03303d95756c1e8510ca7d4d75.description: Tổ Chức can authorize a representative to act on their behalf.

rel-b49232537340998ce13b90da18a53e5c.src_id: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền
rel-b49232537340998ce13b90da18a53e5c.tgt_id: Văn Bản Cử Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền
rel-b49232537340998ce13b90da18a53e5c.description: Văn Bản Cử Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền is a document that authorizes a representative to act on behalf of the owners, members, or shareholders.

rel-281364593a42a6e68d83dde2598d3324.src_id: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền
rel-281364593a42a6e68d83dde2598d3324.description: Người Đại Diện Theo Ủy Quyền is governed by the conditions specified in Điều 14.

rel-aed60e383dfc4de67cd6983c5d100faf.tgt_id: Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp
rel-aed60e383dfc4de67cd6983c5d100faf.description: Thành Viên's capital contribution is recorded on the Giấy Chứng Nhận Phần Vốn Góp.

rel-8365d7fb12ef0c2962e705d094f49b5e.tgt_id: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Viên Trở Lên
rel-8365d7fb12ef0c2962e705d094f49b5e.description: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Viên Trở Lên has members who are liable for the company's debts within the scope of their capital contributions.

rel-d86e231c59ae5d47535173ca4ab91648.description: Cổ Đông has the right to receive dividends from Công Ty under certain conditions.

rel-0e09199cccdc511e8a01a866a33d41bf.tgt_id: Đại diện Theo Ủy Quyền của Cổ Đông
rel-0e09199cccdc511e8a01a866a33d41bf.description: Cổ Đông can appoint a representative to participate in the company's decision-making process.

rel-33b8adf0f759f39bde441f630ede5c22.description: The owner of the company can transfer ownership to an organization, which then becomes the new owner or member of the company.

rel-e833b7fa50e20b7bd912e3c6f7def0ba.description: Điều 662 outlines the rules for dividing an estate when a new heir appears or an heir's right to inheritance is denied.

rel-31b0a6235a89a2220f92b0fe2c3c7cb5.tgt_id: Quan hệ dân sự có yếu tố nước ngoài
rel-31b0a6235a89a2220f92b0fe2c3c7cb5.description: Điều 663 defines the scope of application for laws governing civil relations with foreign elements.

rel-2434d9229a7674cce8a4e8e5d61582d7.description: Điều 664 specifies how to determine the applicable law for civil relations with foreign elements.

rel-ebb50b0f6bd0b132d87da667e1f19bb2.tgt_id: Quan hệ dân sự có yếu tố nước ngoài
rel-ebb50b0f6bd0b132d87da667e1f19bb2.description: Điều 665 outlines the application of international treaties to civil relations with foreign elements.

rel-69734379f2c718908636359838e8197c.description: di sản is the estate that is to be divided among heirs as part of the Phân chia di sản process.

rel-ba3cb6db5a7ea05015f5600538843859.description: quy định khác refers to alternative agreements that may exist regarding the division of an estate, which can affect the Phân chia di sản process.

rel-b6033aa3424eb4815d27712708272f61.src_id: Quan hệ dân sự có yếu tố nước ngoài
rel-b6033aa3424eb4815d27712708272f61.tgt_id: cá nhân, pháp nhân nước ngoài
rel-b6033aa3424eb4815d27712708272f61.description: cá nhân, pháp nhân nước ngoài are foreign individuals or entities involved in civil relations with foreign elements.

rel-fadb2b45acb5ed4d22b8b1a4ec1d8497.src_id: Quan hệ dân sự có yếu tố nước ngoài
rel-fadb2b45acb5ed4d22b8b1a4ec1d8497.tgt_id: công dân Việt Nam, pháp nhân Việt Nam
rel-fadb2b45acb5ed4d22b8b1a4ec1d8497.description: công dân Việt Nam, pháp nhân Việt Nam are Vietnamese citizens or entities involved in civil relations with foreign elements.

rel-c603a0520743779da1692dc83a2ffc18.description: Thời hạn này is the time limit for dividing an estate, which can be extended if it affects the family's livelihood as requested by bên còn sống.

rel-860535d14ca9c9158bff56f393bb74a7.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-860535d14ca9c9158bff56f393bb74a7.tgt_id: Chi Phí Hợp Lý Mai Táng
rel-860535d14ca9c9158bff56f393bb74a7.description: Funeral costs are prioritized first in the order of payment.

rel-2b026cc1cc3d3a26207dc2abea8a0108.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-2b026cc1cc3d3a26207dc2abea8a0108.description: Unpaid maintenance money is prioritized second in the order of payment.

rel-d2491f21d787679a37cc98be3c3de698.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-d2491f21d787679a37cc98be3c3de698.tgt_id: Chi Phí Bảo Quản Di Sản
rel-d2491f21d787679a37cc98be3c3de698.description: Costs for preserving the estate are prioritized third in the order of payment.

rel-76f315a3326c26c8562122788732567d.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-76f315a3326c26c8562122788732567d.description: Labor compensation is prioritized fifth in the order of payment.

rel-d92fa39877940550d2bd9525e29b0167.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-d92fa39877940550d2bd9525e29b0167.description: Compensation for damages is prioritized sixth in the order of payment.

rel-801adf56ebfa85bbcc133bda628b2ade.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-801adf56ebfa85bbcc133bda628b2ade.tgt_id: Thuế Và Các Khoản Phải Nộp Khác
rel-801adf56ebfa85bbcc133bda628b2ade.description: Taxes and other payments to the state budget are prioritized seventh in the order of payment.

rel-b055736e4d875807097320f91d5991d9.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-b055736e4d875807097320f91d5991d9.description: Other debts to individuals or legal entities are prioritized eighth in the order of payment.

rel-ae91447e9b3b2c4efdd56b7a73981313.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-ae91447e9b3b2c4efdd56b7a73981313.description: Fines are prioritized ninth in the order of payment.

rel-4fc9449a24dd67e42b45528ba9a62e97.src_id: Thứ Tự Ưu Tiên Thanh Toán
rel-4fc9449a24dd67e42b45528ba9a62e97.description: Other expenses are prioritized tenth in the order of payment.

rel-067e647946e5da4b2f812e311dec1b35.src_id: Tiền Trợ Cấp Cho Người Sống Nương Nghiờ
rel-067e647946e5da4b2f812e311dec1b35.description: Subsidy money for dependents is prioritized fourth in the order of payment.

rel-3e6a0f758155e6096d2a3501bc912502.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-3e6a0f758155e6096d2a3501bc912502.tgt_id: Thông báo thay đổi nội dung đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-3e6a0f758155e6096d2a3501bc912502.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is responsible for reviewing and processing the notification of changes in business registration content.

rel-deeaf24afdd121416bdd3502005f3e50.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-deeaf24afdd121416bdd3502005f3e50.description: Điều 26 specifies the responsibility of the Business Registration Authority to register businesses.

rel-f8ab5bddd858283557afb623f1290857.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-f8ab5bddd858283557afb623f1290857.tgt_id: Cơ quan quản lý nhà nước về đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-f8ab5bddd858283557afb623f1290857.description: The State Management Agency for Business Registration and the Business Registration Agency are responsible for providing information on business registration content.

rel-8d2ea2967e399599c60eefc2fecc76ad.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-8d2ea2967e399599c60eefc2fecc76ad.tgt_id: Hệ thống thông tin quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-8d2ea2967e399599c60eefc2fecc76ad.description: The Business Registration Agency accesses information on the National Information System for Business Registration.<SEP>Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh manages the national information system for business registration.

rel-f3224fe6ef93eaee4c91ba5887cda1e5.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-f3224fe6ef93eaee4c91ba5887cda1e5.tgt_id: Giấy chứng nhận đăng ký hoạt động
rel-f3224fe6ef93eaee4c91ba5887cda1e5.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh issues a registration certificate to a business entity for the establishment of branches or representative offices.

rel-e9793ecc1d70febda26ce16db44e26d5.src_id: Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh
rel-e9793ecc1d70febda26ce16db44e26d5.description: Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh has the authority to approve or reject the proposed names of businesses based on the regulations.

rel-d41c984835eb66c274f50c4d0042a5f2.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-d41c984835eb66c274f50c4d0042a5f2.description: Công ty must notify the business registration authority of changes in its registered capital.

rel-9d803166486cf29118e071eb1c1b92b9.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-9d803166486cf29118e071eb1c1b92b9.description: The registration authority enforces regulations concerning the temporary suspension, cessation, and termination of business operations.

rel-09f6fad1433e50503d7a1c6fd5ec0444.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-09f6fad1433e50503d7a1c6fd5ec0444.tgt_id: Thủ tục chuyển đổi loại hình doanh nghiệp
rel-09f6fad1433e50503d7a1c6fd5ec0444.description: The registration authority oversees the process for changing the type of business entity.

rel-c3b4a1c012d3b686f5b2e8c4af111609.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-c3b4a1c012d3b686f5b2e8c4af111609.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh updates the legal status of Công ty nhận sáp nhập in the National Database on Business Registration.

rel-2396a6706b81b79bc6590011713e315a.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-2396a6706b81b79bc6590011713e315a.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh updates the legal status of Công ty bị sáp nhập in the National Database on Business Registration.

rel-832d8ad9a12f7d489df023c7055d546b.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-832d8ad9a12f7d489df023c7055d546b.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn một thành viên
rel-832d8ad9a12f7d489df023c7055d546b.description: The business registration agency issues a business registration certificate and updates the legal status of the company in the national database.

rel-17de80277faac57e7cdbf81540900ac0.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-17de80277faac57e7cdbf81540900ac0.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is responsible for updating the legal status of Công ty bị hợp nhất in the national database.

rel-5c63c9c5999232fd638ca7938ab7338c.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-5c63c9c5999232fd638ca7938ab7338c.description: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh is responsible for registering Công ty hợp nhất and updating its legal status.

rel-4f9115ee4d11223cbf7431001f718ae3.src_id: Cơ Quan Đăng Ký Kinh Doanh
rel-4f9115ee4d11223cbf7431001f718ae3.tgt_id: Cơ Sở Dữ Liệu Quốc Gia Về Đăng Ký Doanh Nghiệp
rel-4f9115ee4d11223cbf7431001f718ae3.description: The business registration agency updates the national database with information about new companies.

rel-1062d3809e11ccda8308d75d534b46ef.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-1062d3809e11ccda8308d75d534b46ef.tgt_id: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên
rel-1062d3809e11ccda8308d75d534b46ef.description: Công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn hai thành viên trở lên must register the conversion with the Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh within 10 days of completing the conversion.

rel-490648fd10d9c67d93527a76181b3957.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-490648fd10d9c67d93527a76181b3957.description: Chính phủ provides detailed regulations and defines the organizational structure of the Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh.

rel-ede1c6b95c246aaebad1a70913f7f897.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-ede1c6b95c246aaebad1a70913f7f897.description: Điều 216 is a legal provision that outlines the responsibilities and authorities of the Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh.

rel-12fdabd2a15655ececa0ed01187a8fc1.src_id: Cơ quan đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-12fdabd2a15655ececa0ed01187a8fc1.description: The business registration authority is responsible for announcing the dissolution process and updating the legal status of the business.

rel-f59172060f79b09a71017d81b4132571.description: Cổ đông sáng lập holds common shares in a company and has specific rights and obligations.

rel-b843fe75a6f7a9489bd175930a932f1d.tgt_id: Cổ phần ưu đãi biểu quyết
rel-b843fe75a6f7a9489bd175930a932f1d.description: Cổ đông sáng lập has the right to hold and vote with Cổ phần ưu đãi biểu quyết shares.

rel-70c78421260e450364bbbf2abbd9b027.description: Information about Người góp vốn, or individuals who contribute capital, is recorded in the Sổ đăng ký cổ đông, or shareholder register.

rel-31bbcf061902d2449466fcd8d4968ed2.description: The Sổ đăng ký cổ đông can be maintained by other organizations with the function of maintaining the shareholder register.

rel-214f195ec5791690dcf24786e3dfea51.description: Điều 122 specifies the information to be recorded in the shareholder register.

rel-e227639f562811ec0ab2a1aaef05481a.description: Hồ sơ is a file or record related to the company.

rel-0bfde051b6687cae8b9f7ed0bb4bc9a3.tgt_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên
rel-0bfde051b6687cae8b9f7ed0bb4bc9a3.description: Điều 25 specifies the responsibility of the Chairman of the Board of Members to sign the amended company charter for a partnership company.

rel-c422879238ce9d27750cdbaf62540cc5.tgt_id: Danh sách thành viên công ty trách nhiệm hữu hạn
rel-c422879238ce9d27750cdbaf62540cc5.description: Điều 25 specifies the requirement for the list of members of a limited liability company.

rel-a8be1f9385908fe85d2b548ce31e6c7f.tgt_id: Danh sách thành viên công ty hợp danh
rel-a8be1f9385908fe85d2b548ce31e6c7f.description: Điều 25 specifies the requirement for the list of members of a partnership company.

rel-eabb42fe8e10bf82c9933d5771ffd952.tgt_id: Danh sách cổ đông sáng lập
rel-eabb42fe8e10bf82c9933d5771ffd952.description: Điều 25 specifies the requirement for the list of founding shareholders.

rel-64940476bddb1113ce91aafb7afb4f19.tgt_id: Danh sách cổ đông là nhà đầu tư nước ngoài
rel-64940476bddb1113ce91aafb7afb4f19.description: Điều 25 specifies the requirement for the list of foreign investor shareholders.

rel-5f4e9540730c9d26895fa231a88d7fd8.description: Điều 25 of the legal document 54/2010/qh12 specifies the registration process for arbitration centers.

rel-3380b14b0fc95ffc6b19d3320fd08685.description: Trung tâm Trọng tài must comply with the registration process outlined in Điều 25.

rel-6739d4e5f7e5e7de623546c0411633a9.tgt_id: Cổng thông tin quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-6739d4e5f7e5e7de623546c0411633a9.description: Đиều 26 specifies the responsibility of the National Business Registration Information Portal to register businesses through electronic means.

rel-7c8b1aa5866469ae901dd2003f15dda6.tgt_id: Hệ thống thông tin quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-7c8b1aa5866469ae901dd2003f15dda6.description: Đиều 26 specifies the responsibility of the National Business Registration Information System to create business registration accounts.

rel-b0b90861d7f11c94b083d1cb7ef08239.tgt_id: Tài khoản đăng ký kinh doanh
rel-b0b90861d7f11c94b083d1cb7ef08239.description: Đиều 26 specifies the responsibility of the Business Registration Account to be used for registering businesses through electronic means.

rel-9cb3a21b226a03a4ab491830657fc7d0.description: Điều 26 of the legal document 54/2010/qh12 outlines the public announcement process for newly established arbitration centers.

rel-a4558224d8e40eafbcd8b35cb294beb8.description: Trung tâm Trọng tài must comply with the public announcement process outlined in Điều 26.

rel-eb8f3ef41a1e35c2855b92dbb263429d.src_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên
rel-eb8f3ef41a1e35c2855b92dbb263429d.description: Đиều 54 outlines the role of the chairperson of the board of members in a company.

rel-9d6e10b630dc2da72e1ba215848097e0.src_id: Chủ tịch Hội đồng thành viên
rel-9d6e10b630dc2da72e1ba215848097e0.description: Kiến nghị are proposals made by members to add items to the agenda of the company's governing body meetings, which must be accepted by the chairperson.

rel-4f51b550e3626d266867d28b3723e978.description: Other managers are responsible for ensuring the company's legal interests and adhering to the law and the company's charter.

rel-98d6fb71645c56cf22fecee335767cb4.description: The company must comply with its charter, which can specify different rules for internal management.

rel-821c126a8b50fda2827dc5a83d623e40.description: Công Ty must update the Sổ Đăng Ký Cổ Đông with changes in shareholders as required by the company's charter.<SEP>Công Ty maintains a shareholder register where information about shareholders and their share purchases is recorded.

rel-ae6678c20ee16956e04ac121d9f09285.description: Công Ty must comply with the legal framework governing securities when registering changes in registered capital.<SEP>Công Ty must comply with the securities law when selling shares to existing shareholders and other regulations.

rel-fc105e896bb566a07f80147feb681948.description: Cổ phần is a share of stock in the company.

rel-3df39a0be8a958303f9aeebcd0ed3637.description: Hội Đồng Quản Trị is responsible for managing the payment of dividends and ensuring the company meets its financial obligations.<SEP>Công Ty can have Hội Đồng Quản Trị decide on the issuance of private bonds if not specified otherwise in the company's charter.<SEP>Hội Đồng Quản Trị has the authority to manage the sale of remaining shares if they are not fully subscribed by existing shareholders.

rel-69b49c577199fe753f76b4a0b897b8d8.description: Sổ kế toán is the accounting ledger of the company.

rel-70c905b2c124a45dd6e7da17c592419d.description: Công Ty must obtain approval from Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông for the issuance of private bonds.<SEP>Đại Hội Đồng Cổ Đông can approve different conditions for selling remaining shares, overriding the board's authority.

rel-2576456294a0b42f50d77b45ef97a72f.description: Đиều 130 regulates the decision-making process for issuing private bonds by Công Ty.

rel-d95b8c9abab51cd336bda2f2e33df023.description: Công Ty increases the number of shares and sells them to existing shareholders, who have the right to purchase additional shares.

rel-5f0dbccad4ab76761ee83980b8a731f7.description: Tổng Giám Đốc oversees the activities of other management personnel within the company.

rel-00302f3da5201c094e85071ac26c2270.description: Tiền Lương is the salary paid to the Tổng Giám Đốc and is included in the company's business expenses.

rel-f4c7c72b13cb928f74de10830bd44d33.description: Tổng Giám Đốc is a person who may be appointed by Hội Đồng Thành Viên to manage the company's operations.

rel-c5ee484c57761728e1fb9d5459c59afa.description: Hội Đồng Quản Trị oversees the operations of the company, including the activities of other management personnel.

rel-2db64c72177d3ba2f4920f1e32f954b1.description: Tiền Lương is the salary paid to other managers and is included in the company's business expenses.

rel-7957616d4a18641af54e4cf2d4b582d4.description: Nghị quyết can be published on the company's Trang thông tin điện tử.

rel-06ce8c68b711e6a1d03c62dfbc169fd5.description: Certain critical decisions require the approval of members owning at least 75% of the capital.

rel-605cad2e93d9ecda9b1f67a272d360ec.description: The company being split must register changes and update its legal status with the Business Registration Authority.

rel-b73ece3b7cb8ed94a988057b8f92aaca.description: Tên Viết Tắt is the abbreviated name of a business entity, derived from its full Vietnamese name or its foreign language name.

rel-555f08558d5d1b0819d296f04dbc5463.description: Tên Chi Nhánh is the name of a branch of a business entity, which must include the name of the business and the term "Chi nhánh".

rel-2d5a37327577f2243d8b45ee7e26b9be.description: Tên Văn Phòng Đại Diện is the name of a representative office of a business entity, which must include the name of the business and the term "Văn phòng đại diện".

rel-5a550d2bd93fffc76d8d9db8daf4c9b0.description: Tên Địa Điểm Kinh Doanh is the name of a business location, which must include the name of the business and the term "Địa điểm kinh doanh".

rel-dabb4896a352d6215406a363e1d4b2c9.description: Tên Trùng refers to identical names of business entities, which are prohibited.

rel-abfb58f24074abb54e989c696b506d22.description: Tên Gây Nhầm Lẫn refers to names that are similar to existing business names, which are also prohibited.

rel-ba40350c53ee0aad4c702b428e57c1ee.description: Điều 38 outlines the prohibitions on naming businesses, including the use of names that are identical or confusingly similar to existing business names.

rel-75e7e5fa6b4ac6ad64b23c602f6ffc0a.description: Điều 39 specifies the rules for naming businesses in foreign languages and the use of abbreviated names.

rel-1d2c6228f9375757fe25e671b6706740.description: Điều 40 outlines the naming rules for branches, representative offices, and business locations.
rel-1d2c6228f9375757fe25e671b6706740.keywords: branch naming,business location naming,representative office naming

rel-04b6be3bcbd28a1509b08e18110fa167.description: Đиều 41 defines what constitutes identical and confusingly similar business names.
rel-04b6be3bcbd28a1509b08e18110fa167.keywords: confusingly similar name definition,identical name definition

rel-a8b6a62ca2eba449fcc85b2796771905.description: Điều 41 outlines the procedures for appointing arbitrators.

rel-d23c6a5cc5d0142991bd585d7ac7a826.description: Điều  41 outlines the procedures for the chief judge of the competent court to assign a judge to appoint an arbitrator.

rel-723d0eab06899a0bbc3c3cc770e98bbe.description: Điều 41 outlines the procedures for the competent court to appoint an arbitrator if the parties cannot agree.

rel-b190a86d5e127b23535e5d983ae5c912.description: Điều 41 outlines the procedures for appointing a single arbitrator if the parties cannot agree within 30 days.

rel-1d89dd4a7524545c501191bb50034650.tgt_id: Hội đồng trọng tài vụ việc
rel-1d89dd4a7524545c501191bb50034650.description: Điều 41 outlines the procedures for forming an arbitration panel.

rel-9010a7b6563c9efeb7c73f67fc01459b.description: Công Ty Trách Nhiệm Hữu Hạn Hai Thành Viên Trở Lên gains legal entity status from the date of receiving the business registration certificate.

rel-b455f79e6886f95a621e35138c4f6ff7.description: Chi nhánh and Địa điểm kinh doanh can be terminated by the business itself or by the government, and the business is responsible for fulfilling contracts and paying debts.

rel-11024da51670485e15b5b5d1ed4c0222.description: Trưởng Chi nhánh is the head of a branch of a foreign arbitration organization operating in Vietnam.

rel-49e02ad7b185f7aabfd59316a66dcc3f.description: Sở Tư pháp is the legal affairs department responsible for registering and monitoring the activities of foreign arbitration organizations in Vietnam.

rel-be38e7b6e2f20b974f5727c3bb594b70.description: The activities of Chi nhánh are regulated by the arbitration law (Luật Trọng Tài) and must comply with Vietnamese legal requirements.

rel-7977b2b9b6a97b671b68f8782b958322.description: Công ty is responsible for reimbursing the reasonable costs associated with convening and conducting meetings of the company's governing body.

rel-b7c7877897cd7b964d591d42d9644cd5.description: Công ty can increase or decrease its registered capital according to the conditions outlined in Điều 68.

rel-0244b35395b6e1c1ea864178a95dc6fd.description: Công ty must include a decision made by the board of members regarding changes in the company's capital.

rel-1710b68a95c037694026ead072ebfc0a.description: Công ty must include the minutes of a meeting held by the board of members regarding changes in the company's capital.

rel-6f69dfb4188eb25c9d3c20348f15400f.description: Công ty must include a financial report when reducing the registered capital of a company.<SEP>Báo cáo tài chính provides information on the company's financial performance and position.

rel-65557983ed022a372e99bacecceb066c.description: Người ký kết hợp đồng must compensate the company for any losses incurred from the contract.

rel-6ac1e113bab7c6f3b0f84553dce04e55.description: Giao dịch must compensate the company for any losses incurred from the transaction.<SEP>Giao dịch is a transaction related to the company.

rel-46f3ac4e07c9074fe9dbf211e6cc3df2.description: Người có liên quan của thành viên must compensate the company for any losses incurred from their association with the members.

rel-c04874e7f1b159d9b5bc7fbb22f23722.description: The Inspector is responsible for ensuring the company's legal interests and adhering to the law and the company's charter.<SEP>Kiểm soát viên is responsible for ensuring compliance with regulations and overseeing the financial activities of the company.<SEP>Kiểm soát viên can be a manager or employee of the company unless the company's charter specifies otherwise.

rel-8d99dfdd83adf61af80357224a3c9500.description: Illegal distribution of profit refers to the distribution of profit that does not comply with the regulations set by the law within the company.

rel-7c546c82a4092d5a845a96f3b24108dd.description: Joint liability refers to the responsibility that members of the company must bear together for the debts and financial obligations of the company.

rel-a609f501dd59e4bc091542b30a89b92b.description: Ủy Ban Nhân Dân Cấp Tỉnh shares information with the national enterprise registration database.

rel-04d206465eabcac95ff3ec8f72507e74.tgt_id: Điều kiện quy định tại khoản 1 Điều 27 của Luật này
rel-04d206465eabcac95ff3ec8f72507e74.description: Doanh nghiệp tư nhân must meet the conditions specified in Article 27, Clause 1 of the Law to be converted into another type of company.

rel-4fc64bb0af5730467645f675e8f0d988.tgt_id: Người Mua Doanh Nghiệp Tư Nhân
rel-4fc64bb0af5730467645f675e8f0d988.description: The owner of a private enterprise must comply with labor laws, and the buyer must register the change of ownership.

rel-a49c0044ba2546bb28b459e9a2f92436.description: The owner of a private enterprise must comply with labor laws.

rel-adb0bbea25e2861af64ad0cb3ad2f1fb.src_id: Cơ sở dữ liệu quốc gia về đăng ký doanh nghiệp
rel-adb0bbea25e2861af64ad0cb3ad2f1fb.description: The legal status of Công ty nhận sáp nhập is updated in the National Database on Business Registration.

rel-4c2b60a48e15acdfbd9c95ae56c35326.description: The legal status of Công ty bị sáp nhập is updated in the National Database on Business Registration.
